title: Sugarcane viral diseases: Epidemiology, detection, and advanced breeding methods for resistance.
note: 综述甘蔗病毒病的流行病学、检测技术和抗性育种方法，强调现代育种技术（RNAi、CRISPR等）和综合管理策略，提出未来研究方向。

title: A Novel Approach to Engineering Tomato Spotted Wilt Virus Infectious Clones by Disarming Key Nodes in Anti-Viral Defenses.
note: 开发了首个美国TSWV分离株的侵染性克隆，通过多种策略抑制宿主防御，在烟草和辣椒中成功实现系统侵染。

title: Grapevine-associated picorna-like virus, an unusual virus identified in wine grapes (Vitis vinifera L.).
note: 在俄勒冈州葡萄中发现新病毒GaPLV，基因组9021nt，具有独特的保守域排列。

title: Novel cinnamic acid derivatives enable the induction of chloroplast-associated immunity and interaction with viral coat proteins for plant viral disease control.
note: 合成31种肉桂酸衍生物并评估抗TMV活性，发现最优化合物B7具有双重抗病毒机制：叶绿体免疫和直接靶向病毒外壳蛋白。

title: Identification and characterization of an endogenous pararetrovirus in Gentiana triflora plants.
note: 通过小RNA测序在龙胆中鉴定出花椰菜花叶病毒类似序列GCVS，分析表明是整合到宿主基因组的内源性副逆转录病毒，无游离病毒形式。

title: Genomic characterization of Actinidia totivirus 1 (AcToV1), a novel member of the genus Totivirus infecting kiwifruit.
note: 利用高通量测序从陕西汉中猕猴桃褪绿斑驳叶片中鉴定出一种新病毒AcToV1，属于Totivirus，基因组5060nt，编码CP和RdRp。

title: Validation of an In-House High-Throughput Total RNA Sequencing Test for the Detection of Plant Viruses and Viroids.
note: 本研究评估了基于总RNA提取、核糖体去除、Illumina测序和生物信息学的内部HTS检测流程对植物病毒和类病毒的性能标准，包括灵敏度、特异性、重复性等。

title: Integrated Metabolomic and Transcriptomic Analysis Reveals the Mechanism of Dappled Fruit Formation in Hop Stunt Viroid-Infected Sweet Cherry.
note: 利用整合代谢组学和转录组学分析HSVd感染甜樱桃导致斑驳果实的机制。

title: Improved Diagnostic Tools to Reliably Detect Modern Wheat Mosaic Virus Isolates.
note: 针对TriMV和WSMV现有引物不可靠，开发了新的通用引物、多重PCR及LAMP检测方法。

title: Design, synthesis, and antiviral activity of novel piperidine-containing pyrazoleamide derivatives.
note: 设计合成新型吡唑酰胺-哌啶衍生物，评价抗TMV活性，发现两个化合物通过不同机制增强植物抗性，为开发新型绿色抗病毒剂提供依据。

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel carlavirus infecting Passiflora edulis in China.
note: 在福建百香果上发现一种新型Carlavirus，与西番莲木质化病毒共侵染，暂命名为passiflora chlorotic crinkle virus，基因组8316nt。

title: Tobacco rattle virus triggers local defense and systemically coordinates taxoid biosynthesis in Taxus baccata revealed by integrated metabolic analysis.
note: 利用TRV作为可控生物诱导子，在水培和农杆菌浸润处理欧洲红豆杉幼苗，触发局部防御，系统协调紫杉烷类代谢物积累。

title: Agathisflavone as a novel natural inhibitor of ToLCNDV suppressor proteins: insights from computational analyses and in planta validation.
note: 通过计算筛选和植物体内验证，确定agathisflavone对ToLCNDV抑制子蛋白的抑制作用，为抗双生病毒策略提供新方向。

title: Ultrasensitive, low-input detection of avocado sunblotch viroid via RPA-CRISPR and nanopore-array single-bead fluorescence readout.
note: 开发了一种低输入超灵敏的ASBVd检测平台，利用RPA-CRISPR和纳米孔阵列荧光读取，检测限达1.68 copies/μL，适用于现场部署。

title: A proposed new virus in the genus Marafivirus detected from Oriental persimmon 'Kumemaru'.
note: 从雄性柿树品种'Kumemaru'中鉴定到一种新的Marafivirus属病毒PerMaV，基因组6397nt，编码多聚蛋白，系统发育表明为Tymoviridae新种。

title: First report of CRISPR/Cas13a-based rapid detection of groundnut bud necrosis virus without amplification.
note: 该研究首次报道基于CRISPR/Cas13a的无扩增快速检测花生芽坏死病毒的方法，为田间应用奠定基础。

title: Novel TPLPV-Mediated Virus-Induced Gene Silencing System for Tea Plants (
note: 开发了基于茶树内源病毒TPLPV的VIGS系统，为茶树基因功能分析提供了有效工具。

title: Structural and phylogenetic analyses of umbravirus and umbra-like virus genomes suggest evolution of capsid-like proteins from 30K movement proteins.
note: 对 umbravirus 和 umbra-like virus 基因组进行结构和系统发育分析，提出 Group 1 ULV 从 umbravirus 通过 30K MP 基因复制及新功能化进化为类衣壳蛋白的机制。

title: Complete genome sequence of ramie marafivirus 1, a novel marafivirus infecting ramie (Boehmeria nivea).
note: 通过HTS和RT-PCR从苎麻中发现一个新的marafivirus，暂命名为RaMaraV1，基因组6607nt，与已知marafivirus最高nt同源性65.4%，低于物种阈值，系统发育分析支持其为新种。

title: Expanding insights into plant rhabdovirus diversity through the discovery of viruses representing 32 putative novel species.
note: 通过HTS鉴定32个植物弹状病毒推定新种，跨越9属，来自多种宿主和地理区域，揭示病毒多样性。

title: Novel cinnamic acid-ribavirin conjugates: design, synthesis, antiviral activity against tobacco mosaic virus and mechanistic study.
note: 设计合成31个肉桂酸-利巴韦林缀合物，评估抗TMV活性，发现A23通过诱导植物免疫有效控制TMV感染

title: Identification of a novel mitovirus in Colocasia esculenta through high‑throughput sequencing and in-silico miRNA prediction for sequence-specific gene silencing.
journal: International microbiology : the official journal of the Spanish Society for Microbiology
note: 通过高通量测序从芋头中鉴定并表征了一种新型线粒体病毒CeaMV2，其基因组编码RdRp，经RT-PCR验证，并预测了可能参与RNA干扰的miRNA。

title: Red clover RNA virus 1: functional analysis of ORF2 protein, associations with co-infecting viruses, and seed transmission.
note: 研究RCRV1的ORF2蛋白功能，发现其不能作为移动蛋白或沉默抑制子；通过转录组分析发现共感染病毒，并证明种子传播，支持其为垂直传播的持久性病毒。

title: Agave associated crinivirus A: a novel monopartite crinivirus homolog isolated from agave.
note: 描述了一种新的单分体crinivirus（AaCA）的完整基因组，通过高通量测序从龙舌兰中发现，并通过PCR和Sanger测序验证其单分体特性。

title: The analysis of the virome associated with Freesia refracta plants with necrotic disorder sheds new light on the phylogenetic relationships in the Konkoviridae and Yueviridae families.
note: 对香雪兰坏死病害进行病毒组分析，发现两个新病毒，扩展了Konkoviridae和Yueviridae科的系统发育关系。

title: Targeting phase separation of TSWV nucleocapsid protein with novel methyl vanillate derivative A10 to inhibit biomacromolecule aggregate formation.
note: 通过生物筛选发现化合物A10能有效抑制TSWV N蛋白相分离，降低病毒RNP增殖和系统感染，为植物病毒防治提供新先导化合物。

title: Library Preparation Biases Plant Virome Detection: Poly(A) mRNA Enrichment vs. rRNA Depletion in Pepper and Garlic.
note: 比较rRNA去除与poly(A)富集两种建库方法对辣椒和大蒜病毒组检测的影响。

title: Molecular identification of a novel virus of the genus Citrivirus from mulberry trees.
note: 利用高通量测序从花叶症状的桑树叶片中发现一种新病毒，暂命名MLBV，属于Citrivirus属。

title: First report of apple stem grooving virus infecting a species of Lilium (Lilium brownii) in China.
note: 首次利用NGS和RT-PCR等技术鉴定出感染Lilium brownii的苹果茎沟病毒新分离株ASGV-LS，并完成全基因组测序。

title: Discovery and characterization of a novel marafivirus from Artemisia argyi plants.
note: 利用RNA-seq在艾草中鉴定出一种新的marafivirus，暂命名AAAaV，引起叶片斑驳和白化，基因组为ssRNA(+)，长6749nt。

title: Complete genome characterization of a novel virus isolated from the ethnic medicine plant Valeriana jatamansi Jones.
note: 在云南昆明采自显示褐色坏死条纹症状的药用植物蜘蛛香中，利用宏转录组和Sanger测序发现一种新型双链RNA病毒，暂命名为蜘蛛香隐潜病毒2（VJCV2），其基因组由两个dsRNA片段组成。

title: Ultrasensitive, Low-Input Detection of Avocado Sunblotch Viroid via RPA-CRISPR and Nanopore-Array Single-Bead Fluorescence Readout.
journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
note: 开发了一种新型超灵敏低输入诊断平台，用于牛油果日灼类病毒检测，结合等温扩增和CRISPR，通过纳米孔阵列读取单珠荧光信号。

title: Evolutionary origin and demographic trajectory of tomato spotted wilt virus (Orthotospovirus tomatomaculae).
note: 利用贝叶斯框架分析136个全球TSWV分离株全基因组，追溯进化起源、分歧时间（约1768年）、地理起源（韩国）及种群历史。

title: Genomic Organization of the Newly Discovered Cassava Congo Cheravirus Reveals a Unique Maf/HAM1 Motif in the C-Terminal Region of the RNA1 Polyprotein and Suggests the Presence of Two Protein Domains Upstream of the Putative Helicase Domain.
note: 发现并描述了一种感染非洲木薯的新型双分体cheravirus（cassava Congo cheravirus），其基因组结构独特。

title: Molecular characterization of a novel partitivirus from quinoa (Chenopodium quinoa) in China.
note: 从中国藜麦中检测并鉴定了一种新型partitivirus，命名为quinoa cryptic virus (QCV)，属于Deltapartitivirus属。

title: Expanding the known nucleorhabdovirus world: the final chapter in a trilogy exploring the hidden diversity of plant-associated rhabdoviruses.
note: 通过挖掘公共宏转录组数据集，鉴定了47种新型核型弹状病毒，显著扩展了已有宿主范围。

title: Single Amino Acid Change at Two Conserved Residues in Tomato Brown Rugose Fruit Virus Coat Protein Compromises Virion Assembly and Viral Systemic Infection.
note: 测定了三个加拿大ToBRFV分离株基因组序列，构建全长感染性cDNA克隆；通过定点突变发现CP蛋白保守残基D89和R114对病毒粒子组装和系统侵染至关重要。

title: Pervasive mixed infections and recurrent begomovirus co-detection in symptomatic pumpkin plants from Guangxi, China.
note: 对广西289份有症状南瓜样品进行小RNA测序和PCR/RT-PCR确认，发现11种病毒，混合感染率高达96.54%，以双生病毒共检出为特征。

title: Design and Synthesis of a Novel Guanidino-Modified Nucleoside and Its Antiviral Activity against Potato Virus Y.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 设计合成了核苷类似物FGN，测试其对PVY的抗病毒活性，并利用转录组和分子对接研究机制。

title: Evaluation of the influence of RNA extraction methods on the detection of citrus viruses and viroids.
note: 比较四种RNA提取方法(CL, CE, TL, SI)对柑橘病毒和类病毒RT-qPCR及HTS检测的影响。

title: A
note: 本研究优化了利用Begomovirus solanumdelhiense载体在甜瓜中构建VIGS系统的条件，通过插入不同长度和位置的CmPDS片段，确定了最佳沉默效果。

title: Raspberry Viruses in the Czech Republic, with Identification of a Novel Virus: Raspberry Virus A.
note: 调查捷克共和国树莓病毒，发现新病毒RaVA，检测12种已知病毒，RBDV最流行。

title: Full-genome sequence of a novel potyvirus infecting Sauropus androgynus.
note: 利用HTS和RT-PCR等方法测定了一种感染守宫木的新型potyvirus（SAPV1）的全基因组序列，并通过系统发育分析确定其为Potyvirus属新成员

title: Peach diseases in a changing climate: Pathogens, resistance, and sustainable solutions.
note: 综述气候变化对桃树主要病原（真菌、细菌、病毒）的影响，重点讨论抗性和可持续防控策略。

title: Discovery of novel antiviral and antifungal agents based on flavonoid derivatives.
note: 以天然黄酮白杨素为先导，设计合成新型衍生物，系统评估抗病毒和抗真菌活性，发现多个高效化合物。

title: [Novel concepts emerged in the development of plant virus vectors].
journal: Sheng wu gong cheng xue bao = Chinese journal of biotechnology
note: 系统阐述植物病毒载体的设计策略、新型功能及应用前景

title: Molecular characterization of a novel begomovirus-satellite complex infecting fiery tasselflower (Emilia coccinea) in Nigeria.
note: 在尼日利亚的火焰花上发现一种新的begomovirus及其卫星复合体，命名为tasselflower yellow mosaic virus，通过滚环扩增和测序获得完整基因组。

title: Identification and characterization of a novel carlavirus isolated from viburnum (Viburnum opulus) in Aotearoa New Zealand.
note: 从Viburnum opulus中鉴定并表征了一种新型carlavirus（VibCV1），与AMV共感染，基因组8444nt，属于Carlavirus属。

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel alphanucleorhabdovirus infecting cassava (Manihot esculenta Crantz) in Brazil.
note: 报告了巴西木薯中一种新型alphanucleorhabdovirus的全基因组序列，命名为CsRV2，与已知病毒序列一致性低于阈值。

title: Novel Pyrazole Derivatives: Blocking the Self-assembly Progress and Breaking the Structure of Tobacco Mosaic Virus.
note: 设计合成了一系列含1,3,4-噻二唑硫醚的吡唑衍生物，发现化合物5c-2对TMV有优异的抗病毒活性，机制是结合外壳蛋白阻断自组装。

title: Indole-based natural product for plant protection: Discovery of alkaloid barrettin and its derivatives as novel antiviral and antifungal agents.
note: 本研究设计合成barettin衍生物，筛选出强抗TMV化合物，并阐明其作用机制为抑制病毒组装

title: First Report of On-Site Detection of Cucurbit Leaf Crumple Virus by an Optimized RPA-Lateral Flow Assay with an Alternative Endonuclease.
note: 开发了使用替代核酸内切酶的RPA-LFT检测方法，用于现场快速检测CuLCrV，无需核酸纯化，30分钟出结果。

title: Discovery of novel hammerhead, twister, and DVRz-associated circular RNAs in
note: 通过分析葡萄科、茄科和蔷薇科植物的rRNA去除转录组数据，鉴定出13个新的类病毒样RNA，包括锤头核酶、双绞链核酶和DVRz相关环状RNA，显著扩展了植物亚病毒RNA的多样性。

title: Arachis ampelovirus 1, a novel ampelovirus infecting forage peanut.
note: 通过高通量测序在饲用花生中发现一种新ampelovirus，基因组12,940 nt，编码7个ORF，与已知ampelovirus的HSP70、RdRp和CP氨基酸相似性低于75%，系统发育分析表明其为新种。

title: Molecular characterization of a proposed novel macluravirus identified in sand ginger (Kaempferia galanga).
note: 本研究通过RT-PCR在沙姜中鉴定出一种新macluravirus（KVA），完成全基因组测序和系统发育分析，表明其为Potyviridae科新种。

title: An Integrated Analysis of the
note: 利用公共数据对西番莲科病毒组进行整合分析，发现新病毒，评估全球分布和交叉传播风险，为病害管理提供信息。

title: Berberine from Corydalis saxicola Bunting reveals anti-tomato spotted wilt orthotospovirus activity with a novel mechanism.
note: 从延胡索中提取小檗碱，发现其抗TSWV活性优于宁南霉素，通过转录组和VIGS证实其通过GSTAU25增强抗性。

title: Discovery of a new konkovirus species in
note: 在阿姆斯特丹植物园的Lachenalia植物中发现一种新的分段负义RNA病毒，命名为LaKoV1，属于Konkoviridae科，与已知病毒显著差异。

title: A Novel ToBRFV cDNA Full-Length Infectious Clone Provides Insights on Virus-Host Range and Inoculation Strategies.
note: 利用Gibson组装构建了ToBRFV全长侵染性克隆，验证其感染性和病毒粒子产生，并开展宿主范围研究，为病毒-宿主互作、抗性筛选和防控剂开发提供工具。

title: Characterization of a novel recombinant begomovirus and tomato leaf curl Kunene virus infecting bottle gourd in Kenya.
note: 在肯尼亚葫芦上发现两种begomovirus：新重组病毒BGLMV和ToLCKunV，通过侵染性克隆验证其致病性。

title: Insights into Novel Viral Threats in Sweetpotato from Burkina Faso: Characterisation of Unexplored Pathogens.
note: 利用滚环扩增和纳米孔测序分析布基纳法索甘薯病毒组，鉴定出多种病毒共感染，扩展了对甘薯病毒多样性的认识。

title: Potato Leafroll Virus in the Aphid Holobiont: Interactions Shaping Vector Biology.
note: 综述PLRV对蚜虫全生物体的影响，探讨进化与机制，提出针对蚜虫和PLRV的管理策略。

title: Morphology effect of a novel biocompatible nucleic acid delivery nanosystem of g-C
note: 利用不同形态g-C3N4纳米材料递送外源核酸至完整叶片，碳点效果最佳，负载TMV CP dsRNA可高效抗病毒，为植物病毒防控提供新工具

title: Identification of the Matrix Protein as a Conserved and Central Determinant of Superinfection Exclusion in Plant Rhabdoviruses.
note: 开发了PhCMoV的反向遗传系统，证实植物弹状病毒存在同种和近缘种间的超级感染排斥，并鉴定M蛋白为关键效应器。

title: A Novel Cogu-like Virus Identified in Wine Grapes.
note: 在爱达荷州霞多丽葡萄中发现一种新的负链RNA病毒，暂命名GaCLIdV，基因组三片段，属于Phenuiviridae科新属Switvirus。

title: Wild Citrus CTV Genomic Data Provides Novel Insights into Its Global Transmission Dynamics.
note: 对中囯三省野生柑橘进行HTS测序，结合公共数据库，用贝叶斯系统地理学分析CTV全球传播动态。

title: Expansion of the genus Bevemovirus: Novel genome discovery and evidence for virus-host co-segregation.
note: 通过公共植物转录组数据挖掘，发现9个新的bevenovirus基因组，扩展该属多样性，并提示病毒与宿主共分离和垂直传播。

title: MALDI-TOF MS technique as a new approach for simultaneous detection and differentiation of potato virus Y strains.
note: 开发MALDI-TOF MS技术同时检测和区分PVY的三种主要株系（PVYO、PVYNTN、PVYN-Wi），为病毒检测提供新方法。

title: Isolation, Anti-TMV Activity, and Modes of Action of Novel Isochromene and Isoquinoline Derivatives from
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 从链霉菌中分离得到新异色满和异喹啉衍生物，其中化合物6具有显著抗TMV活性，通过多模式机制发挥作用，可作为环保抗病毒候选物。

title: First Report of Cyrtanthus Elatus Virus A Infection in Daffodils in Korea.
note: 首次在韩国水仙中检测到Cyrtanthus elatus virus A，通过HTS和RT-PCR确认，描述了症状和基因组特征。

title: A Virome Scanning of Saffron (
note: 首次全国范围HTS调查伊朗藏红花病毒组，检测到三个病毒科及一个新Potyvirus（SaIRV），发现病毒主要通过球茎繁殖传播。

title: Fabrication of novel purine nucleoside derivatives bearing a cinnamic acid moiety for controlling plant viral diseases: synthesis, anti-tobacco mosaic virus activity, and mechanistic study.
note: 合成了34种嘌呤核苷衍生物，筛选出A14作为高效抗TMV候选化合物，并阐明其双重作用机制。

title: Detection and Quantification of Avocado Sunblotch Viroid in California Avocado Orchards Using Digital Loop-Mediated Amplification and Droplet Digital PCR.
note: 开发并验证了数字LAMP和微滴式数字PCR用于加州鳄梨果园中ASBVd的灵敏检测与定量，比较了两种方法的效果。

title: Virome Survey of Banana Plantations and Surrounding Plants in Malawi.
note: 在马拉维全国范围内对香蕉及周边植物进行病毒组调查，利用VANA HTS检测到23种植物病毒，发现两种新病毒，并比较了HTS与PCR的检测效果。

title: Comprehensive Virome Profiling of Apple Mosaic Disease-Affected Trees in Iran Using RT-PCR and Next-Generation Sequencing.

title: Metagenomics-based novel Caulimoviridae virus discovery and its development of identification markers in Lilium lancifolium thunb.
note: 通过宏基因组测序在虎百合中发现两种新型Caulimoviridae病毒（LCaA和LCaB），并开发了基于PCR的诊断标记。

title: Tomato yellow leaf curl Reunion virus: a novel tomato-infecting monopartite begomovirus from Reunion Island.
note: 首次报道留尼汪岛番茄黄叶卷曲病相关的新单分体begomovirus，命名TYLCREV，基因组显示种间重组。

title: Design, synthesis, and biological evaluation of novel derivatives of marine natural product ammosamide B.
note: 以海洋天然产物ammosamide B为母体合成衍生物，评估抗病毒和抗真菌活性，发现高效抗TMV和PVY候选物13a

title: Genome characterization of prunus maculavirus 1 (PrMcV-1), a novel member of the genus maculavirus identified in prunus spp.
note: 在无症状桃树中发现一种新病毒PrMcV-1，基因组为(+)ssRNA，属于Maculavirus属，可嫁接传播。

title: Identification and complete genome sequence of a new cheravirus discovered in grapevine.
note: 在宁夏葡萄样品中发现一种新的cheravirus，命名为grapevine cheravirus，通过HTS、RT-PCR、RACE等方法获得全基因组序列。

title: A novel interspecific-recombinant monopartite begomovirus emerging in tomato (Solanum lycopersicum L.) genotypes with Ty-resistant genes.
note: 通过PCR筛选携带Ty抗性基因的番茄基因型，发现一种新型种间重组begomovirus，命名为ToLCTyPV，由CYVMV和TbCSV重组进化而来。

title: Quinazoline Alkaloids for Plant Protection: Design, Synthesis, and Biological Evaluation of Novel Deoxyvasicinone Derivatives.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 以deoxyvasicinone为母体设计合成系列衍生物，评价抗TMV和抗真菌活性，发现多个化合物优于对照，机制研究揭示干扰病毒组装。

title: Genome-wide DNA methylation analysis of CBCVd-infected hop plants (
note: 对CBCVd感染的啤酒花进行全基因组DNA甲基化分析，揭示类病毒通过RNA指导的DNA甲基化途径改变宿主甲基化模式，参与致病和防御。

title: The complete nucleotide sequence and genome organization of a novel wheat-infecting luteovirus.
note: 通过宏病毒组测序从河北小麦样本中发现一种新型黄矮病毒WLV1，确定其全基因组序列和基因组结构，属于黄矮病毒属新成员。

title: Genome characterization of a newly discovered grapevine leafroll-associated virus S, in the genus ampelovirus by high-throughput sequencing.
note: 通过高通量测序鉴定一种新的葡萄卷叶相关病毒S，描述其基因组特征和系统发育关系。

title: On the Trail of Viroids a Return to Phytosanitary Awareness.
note: 该综述总结了类病毒与病毒的区别，柑橘和鳄梨类病毒的生物学和分子特性，以及诊断技术和矮化应用。

title: A novel varicosavirus associated with Orychophragmus violaceus in China.
note: 在中国二月兰中发现一种新型弹状病毒OVVV，具有双分节段基因组，属于Varicosavirus新种，扩展了宿主范围。

title: Outbreak of Cucumber Mosaic Virus Subgroup IB in Pepper from the Espelette Area (Basque Country, Southwestern France) and First Report of Five Taxa as Natural Hosts of CMV.
note: 针对法国Espelette辣椒产区CMV爆发，采集7300余样本，通过ELISA、RT-PCR和测序鉴定出CMV亚组IB高流行，并发现五种新自然宿主。

title: Data Mining Redefines the Timeline and Geographic Spread of Cotton Leafroll Dwarf Virus.
note: 通过数据挖掘发现CLRDV在美国存在时间远早于首次报告（2006年密西西比），并在加州确认存在，发现新宿主亚麻。

title: Characterization, Detection, and Prevalence of a Novel Strawberry Crinivirus.
note: 报道了一种新的草莓毛形病毒（SKV），通过高通量测序鉴定，开发检测方法，仅在伊朗发现，由粉虱传播，需进一步研究其对草莓产量的影响。

title: Discovery of a novel alphasatellite of the genus Clecrusatellite associated with a wide array of New World tomato-infecting begomoviruses.
note: 在巴西中部五种番茄侵染性begomoviruses混合感染样品中，通过高通量测序发现一种新的alphasatellite，经PCR和Sanger测序确认，属于Clecrusatellite属，建议新种名Clecrusatellite solanumbrasiliensis，为新世界首次报道。

title: The First High-Throughput Sequencing-Based Study of Viruses Infecting Solanaceous Crops in Kosovo Reveals Multiple Infections in Peppers by Six Plant Viruses.
note: 首次使用HTS调查科索沃茄科作物病毒，在辣椒中发现六种病毒混合感染，其中三种为巴尔干地区首次报道。

title: First report of the whole‑genome sequence analysis of Fig badnavirus 2 from China.
note: 通过HTS和PCR鉴定无花果环斑症状相关的新病毒Fig badnavirus 2，完成全基因组测序与系统发育分析。

title: A novel peptide encoded by a rice circular RNA confers broad-spectrum disease resistance in rice plants.
note: 发现水稻环状RNA circ-WRKY9编码的肽WRKY9-88aa在RSMV感染中上调，过表达该肽可抑制RSMV并增强对多种病害的抗性。

title: Detection and In Vivo Validation of
note: 本研究针对双分体病毒属设计40、60、80核苷酸的e-probes，经BLASTn筛选后，利用HTS数据验证，成功检测已知宿主并发现新宿主（Farfugium japonicum）及新毒株。

title: Unveiling the genetic diversity of the genera Enamovirus and Polerovirus through data-driven virus discovery.
note: 通过分析SRA植物转录组数据，鉴定22个推定新型enamo-/polerovirus，扩展遗传多样性与宿主范围，首次在裸子植物发现polerovirus。

title: Identification and characterization of a novel QTL for barley yellow mosaic disease resistance from bulbous barley.
note: 研究利用BSA和转录组分析，从球茎大麦中鉴定了一个稳定抗大麦黄花叶病的新QTL，并缩小候选区间至7H染色体14-39 Mb，发现一个NBS-LRR候选基因。

title: Identification and complete genome sequence of honeysuckle-associated cytorhabdovirus in China.
note: 通过高通量测序从表现褪绿和斑驳的金银花中鉴定了一种新的细胞质弹状病毒(HaCV)，获得5个分离株，基因组长度约13.9kb，含8个ORF。

title: Discovery of Arbutin as Novel Potential Antiviral Agent Against Tomato Yellow Leaf Curl Virus.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 发现天然产物熊果苷能有效抑制TYLCV感染，其机制是与病毒外壳蛋白结合并影响宿主防御信号通路

title: Complete genome sequence of a new virga-like virus identified in Viburnum opulus in China.
note: 通过RNA-seq在Viburnum opulus中鉴定到一个新的类virga病毒，暂命名VoV1，基因组12.5kb，编码7个ORF，提议为Virgaviridae新种。

title: A ribodepletion and tagging protocol to multiplex samples for RNA-seq based virus detection: application to the cassava virome.
note: 该研究开发了一种名为Ribo-M-Seq的高通量测序协议，用于多重样本的木薯病毒组检测，可同时检测DNA和RNA病毒，为大规模流行病学调查提供工具。

title: Virome Characterization of Native Wild-Rice Plants Discovers a Novel Pathogenic Rice Polerovirus With World-Wide Circulation.
note: 对约1000个野生稻群落进行病毒组分析，发现一种新Polerovirus（RLTV），可经蚜虫传播至栽培稻引起分蘖减少症状，且全球流行。

title: Discovery and characterization of a novel carlavirus in Ligularia jaluensis plants.
note: 在中国橐吾上发现一种新香石竹病毒LJCV，与已知ISMV共同侵染，引起褪绿黄环斑。LJCV基因组8497 nt，含6个ORF，属Carlavirus属。

title: Diversity and evolution of viroids and viroid-like agents with circular RNA genomes revealed by metatranscriptome mining.
note: 利用宏转录组挖掘发现大量新型类病毒样环状RNA，包括大小达5kb的核酶病毒，表明其多样性远超先前认知，促进对原始RNA世界的理解。

title: Characterization of mint virus C, a new member of the genus Carlavirus.
note: 报告了意大利薄荷上一种新的香石竹潜隐病毒属病毒MVC的全基因组序列，通过电镜和NGS鉴定，检测了不同地区样品

title: A new capulavirus infecting sugar beet (Beta vulgaris L.) in France.
note: 通过高通量测序在法国诺曼底甜菜中鉴定出一种新型capulavirus，命名为beet capulavirus 1，基因组2744 nt，与已知capulavirus序列一致性低。

title: Complete genome sequence of a new beny-like virus from winter wheat (Triticum aestivum L.) in France.
note: 在法国冬小麦中发现一种新beny-like病毒，通过高通量测序获得完整基因组，建议命名为wheat beny-like virus 1。

title: Potential effect of
note: 通过宏转录组分析揭示T. truncatus螨虫携带多种植物病毒和新型病毒，研究内生菌和环境因素对病毒组的影响。

title: In-depth population genetic study of
note: 对黑海地区野生葡萄进行群体遗传学和病毒组分析，鉴定10种病毒和1种类病毒，发现两个新病毒，并组装91个病毒基因组。

title: Detection of Tomato Leaf Curl New Delhi Virus-ES by Real-Time Quantitative PCR.
note: 提出一种实时定量PCR协议，用于检测和定量ToLCNDV-ES在任何园艺寄主中的病毒载量。

title: New insights into viral threats in soybean (
note: 通过高通量测序分析孟加拉国大豆病毒组，发现三种RNA病毒和一种DNA病毒，包括新型crinivirus SMYBV。

title: Identification and Characterization of a Novel Cytorhabdovirus Associated with Pear (P. communis 'Bartlett') Through RNA-seq.
note: 通过重新分析梨转录组RNA-seq数据，鉴定出一种新的细胞质弹状病毒PRV-1，基因组15,628 nt，含6个ORF。

title: Characterization of the complete genome of a novel allexivirus infecting Sauropus androgynus in China.
note: 在中国守宫木曲叶黄化植株中发现一新病毒，暂命名SaV，基因组为8007nt的正义单链RNA，属于葱线形病毒属。

title: Correction: First reports of several viruses and a viroid including a novel vitivirus in Japan, found through virome analysis of bulk grape genetic resources.
note: 通过病毒组分析日本葡萄种质资源，首次报道多种病毒和一种类病毒，包括一个新的葡萄病毒属病毒。

title: Complete genome sequence of a new poacevirus infecting wild oat (Avena fatua L.) in France.

title: Arachis mottle-associated virus, a new polerovirus infecting Pinto peanut.

note: 通过高通量测序在草果中发现新病毒TkSMV，确定其完整基因组并基于序列分析确认其分类地位

title: A survey on the occurrence of papaya ringspot virus-P (PRSV-P) in Malaysia and genetic diversity assessment of the coat protein region.

title: Three-fold expansion of the genetic diversity of blunerviruses through plant (meta)transcriptome data-mining.
note: 通过挖掘公共植物转录组数据，发现18种新蓝病毒，扩展了该属遗传多样性，为后续生物学研究提供基础

title: New persistent plant RNA virus carries mutations to weaken viral suppression of antiviral RNA interference.
note: 通过深度测序发现新型持久polerovirus RTIV2，其P0蛋白突变致弱VSR活性，揭示了持久病毒弱抑制宿主防御实现长期感染的策略。

title: Genomes of Alphanucleorhabdovirus Physostegiae Isolates from Two Different Cultivar Groups of
note: 通过HTS在俄罗斯茄子品种中鉴定到两种弹状病毒分离物，属于PhCMoV，基因组结构典型。

title: Genomic characterization of novel viruses associated with Olea europaea L. in South Africa.
note: 对南非橄榄样品进行宏病毒组分析，首次在该地区检测到已知病毒并发现多种新病毒。

title: Synthesis, Anti-TMV Activities, and Action Mechanisms of a Novel Cytidine Peptide Compound.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 合成一系列胞苷肽化合物，筛选出SN11具有抗TMV活性，在多种烟草上验证其保护和治疗作用，并通过转录组分析揭示其抗病毒机制

note: 研究利用体外热疗法结合茎尖培养，从新柑橘杂交种中消除柑橘外皮类病毒（CEVd）和啤酒花矮化类病毒（HSVd），并建立了微繁殖方案。

title: Complete genome sequence of grapevine yellow speckle viroid 3, a novel apscaviroid infecting grapevine, characterized by high-throughput sequencing.

title: Olive Leaf Mottling Virus: A New Member of the Genus
note: 通过HTS在表现叶片斑驳症状的橄榄树中发现新病毒OLMV，基因组为单链RNA约16.5kb，含10个ORF，属于Olivavirus属，与OLYaV氨基酸差异>25%，建议为新种。

title: High-Throughput Sequencing Reveals New Viroid Species in
note: 通过高通量测序从墨西哥仙人掌梨样品中检测病毒和类病毒，发现3种病毒和3种类病毒，其中2种为新类病毒，丰富了该作物病毒组认知。

title: A Novel Cryptic Virus Isolated from
note: 在墨西哥两种Galphimia spp.药用植物中通过HTS发现一种新的隐潜病毒，暂命名GCV，属于Deltapartitivirus属。

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel totivirus isolated from the leaves of Myrica rubra.

title: Discovery of Brassica Yellows Virus and Porcine Reproductive and Respiratory Syndrome Virus in
note: 通过宏转录组测序，在取食感染CLas的柑橘苗的柑橘木虱中检测到BrYV及其相关RNA和PRRSV。

title: Complete genome sequence of zoysia mosaic virus, a novel member of the genus Poacevirus.
note: 报道从日本进口到美国的结缕草中分离的一种新病毒ZoMV的基因组特征。

title: Identification of a putative novel cholivirus in the transcriptome of Gymnema sylvestre R. Br.
note: 利用公共转录组数据鉴定武靴藤中一种推定的新病毒GysV1，属于Cholivirus亚属，通过序列相似性和系统发育分析确认其新种地位。

title: MAP30 and luffin-α: Novel ribosome-inactivating proteins induce plant systemic resistance against plant viruses.
note: 研究四种RIPs的亚细胞定位和抗病毒活性，证明MAP30和luffin-α通过激活植物系统性防御有效控制多种植物病毒。

title: Diversity of viroids infecting grapevines in the South African Vitis germplasm collection.
note: 分析了南非葡萄种质资源中229个样本的RNA-Seq数据，鉴定出五种已知类病毒和一种推定类病毒，首次报道JGVd和GHVd在南非的存在。

title: Discovery of Barakacin and Its Derivatives as Novel Antiviral and Fungicidal Agents.
note: 以双吲哚生物碱barakacin为先导，合成系列衍生物，发现化合物14b具有高效抗TMV活性及广谱抗真菌作用。

title: In-depth study of tomato and weed viromes reveals undiscovered plant virus diversity in an agroecosystem.
note: 利用HTS对全国番茄和杂草进行病毒组研究，发现125种病毒（79新种），揭示作物与非作物植物中丰富的病毒多样性及潜在交换。

title: Expanding the Repertoire of the Plant-Infecting Ophioviruses through Metatranscriptomics Data.
note: 通过公共宏转录组数据集，鉴定并分子表征了33种新的ophiovirus，首次将宿主范围扩展到苔藓、地钱和蕨类。

title: Citrus Bright Spot Virus: A New Dichorhavirus, Transmitted by
note: 鉴定了一种新的柑橘斑驳病毒，属于Dichorhavirus，基因组与已知种类相似度低于73%，建议为新种Dichorhavirus australis。

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel member of the genus Polerovirus from Cnidium officinale in South Korea.
note: 从韩国川芎中鉴定并测序一种新的Polerovirus病毒，命名为CnPV1，基因组6090 nt，编码7个ORF，与已知Polerovirus同源性低。

title: Efficient Purification of Cowpea Chlorotic Mottle Virus by a Novel Peptide Aptamer.
note: 建立了一种高效、经济的CCMV纯化方法，利用肽适配体亲和层析替代超速离心，显著提高纯度和可放大性

title: Identification and genetic characterization of a new totivirus from Bursera graveolens in western Ecuador.
note: 从厄瓜多尔西部的Bursera graveolens中鉴定了一种新totivirus BgTV-1，基因组为4794 nt的dsRNA，系统发育分析表明其与植物相关的totiviruses聚类。

title: First report of tomato chlorosis virus (ToCV) and detection of other viruses in field-grown tomatoes in North-Western region of India.
note: 检测印度西北部田间番茄上19种病毒和1种类病毒，发现9种病毒，ToCV首次在该地区报道，ToLCNDV最普遍（64.47%），存在多重感染。

title: Diagnostic and Historical Surveys of Sweet Cherry (
note: 对俄勒冈州甜樱桃园进行病毒和类病毒病害调查，检测多种已知病原，发现CLRV在当地新出现，并扩展了其他病毒的地理分布。

title: A Novel, Divergent Member of the
note: 描述了一种新的弹状病毒StrV-3，开发了三重RT-PCR和CRISPR-Cas检测方法，灵敏度达1 fg总RNA，用于草莓无病毒材料筛查。

title: Discovery of Flavone Derivatives Containing Carboxamide Fragments as Novel Antiviral Agents.
note: 基于结构多样性衍生策略设计合成一系列含羧酰胺片段的黄酮衍生物，系统评价其对TMV的抗病毒活性，发现化合物4m具有与宁南霉素相当的活性。

title: Snake River alfalfa virus, a persistent virus infecting alfalfa (Medicago sativa L.) in Washington State, USA.
note: 报道SRAV在华盛顿州苜蓿中的发生，认为是一种类似Endornaviridae的持续新病毒，可通过种子传播。

title: The complete genome sequence of Stellaria aquatica virus A, a new member of the genus Alphacarmovirus, family Tombusviridae.
note: 在Stellaria aquatica中通过高通量RNA测序检测到一种新的Alphacarmovirus，暂命名为StAV-A，基因组4017 nt，含5个预测ORF。

title: A Novel miRNA in Rice Associated with the Low Seed Setting Rate Symptom of Rice Stripe Virus.
note: 发现水稻条纹病毒下调miRNA Seq119表达，抑制其表达导致低结实率症状，与病毒症状相似，揭示miRNA在病毒症状形成中的作用。

title: Molecular characterization of horse nettle virus A, a new member of subgroup B of the genus Nepovirus.
note: 利用高通量测序在horse nettle中发现并鉴定了一种新的正链RNA病毒，命名为horse nettle virus A，属于Nepovirus属B亚组。

title: Complete genome and molecular characterization of a putative novel citrivirus from Rudbeckia sp.
note: 从Rudbeckia sp.中鉴定出推定的新病毒RuCVA，基因组全长8821 nt，编码三个ORF，系统发育分析显示与柑橘叶斑病毒等亲缘较近。

title: Novel resistance to the Bymovirus BaMMV established by targeted mutagenesis of the PDIL5-1 susceptibility gene in barley.
note: 利用CRISPR技术靶向突变大麦PDIL5-1易感基因，获得抗BaMMV的突变体，且生长和产量无不良影响。

title: New Virus Diagnostic Approaches to Ensuring the Ongoing Plant Biosecurity of Aotearoa New Zealand.
note: 综述了新西兰植物生物安全中病毒诊断新技术，包括PCR、高通量测序和等温扩增（RPA/LAMP），强调现场检测（PoU）的重要性，以提高边境检疫效率。

title: The coat protein of the ilarvirus prunus necrotic ringspot virus mediates long-distance movement.
note: 研究PNRSV外壳蛋白在长距离运动中的作用，构建全长cDNA克隆并进行重配和缺失突变分析。

title: Discovery of novel whitefly vector proteins that interact with a virus capsid component mediating virion retention and transmission.
note: 通过免疫沉淀和DUALmembrane cDNA文库筛选，鉴定与CCYV CPm互作的烟粉虱蛋白，揭示半持久性传播机制。

title: Identification and Functional Analyses of Host Proteins Interacting with the P3a Protein of Brassica Yellows Virus.
note: 以BrYV的P3a蛋白为诱饵筛选拟南芥膜酵母双杂交cDNA文库，鉴定到138个互作基因，并验证AtPUP14等三个蛋白与P3a体内互作及在病毒感染中的作用。

title: Viroids: Non-Coding Circular RNAs Able to Autonomously Replicate and Infect Higher Plants.
note: 综述类病毒的非编码环状RNA特性、分类、复制滚环机制、系统运动、传播、致病机制及生物技术应用。

title: Molecular characterization of a novel gammacarmovirus infecting cucurbits in India.
note: 描述印度侵染西葫芦的新型gammacarmovirus，暂命名cucurbit carmovirus (CuCV)，基因组4274 nt，与MNSV序列同源性低于种阈值，确认为新种。

title: Characterization of a putative novel higrevirus infecting Phellodendron amurense Rupr. in China.
note: 在中国黄檗中鉴定到一种推定的新病毒PaHLV，通过RNA-seq获得三个近全长RNA，并确定了完整序列，建议为新种Higrevirus amur。

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel ophiovirus associated with chlorotic disease of pepper (Capsicum annuum L.) in Japan.
note: 2018年7月在日本高知县辣椒上发现一种新的欧菲病毒，通过HTS和Sanger测序获得完整基因组，命名为PepCaV。

title: Complete genome sequence of polygonatum mosaic-associated virus 1, a novel member of the genus Potyvirus in China.
note: 对自然感染多花黄精的新型Potyvirus进行全基因组测序和系统发育分析，确定其为新成员。

title: Complete genome sequence of mimosa mosaic virus, a new sobemovirus infecting Mimosa sensitiva L.
note: 通过高通量测序从含羞草中发现一种新sobemovirus，命名为MimMV，基因组4595 nt，系统发育分析表明为Sobemovirus新种。

title: Cohombrillo-associated virus: a novel virus infecting Ecballium elaterium plants.
note: 确定了一种感染Ecballium elaterium的新病毒全基因组，命名为cohombrillo-associated virus，属于Stralarivirus属。

title: On the early identification and characterization of pear blister canker viroid, apple dimple fruit viroid, peach latent mosaic viroid and chrysanthemum chlorotic mottle viroid.
note: 回顾四种植物类病毒的发现与分子特征，讨论经典方法与当前高通量测序的差异，指出传统生物学研究对确定类病毒性质的必要性

title: Silencing
note: 构建靶向PVX、PVY和PSTVd的amiRNA，转化马铃薯获得同时抗三种病毒/类病毒的转基因植株。

title: Understanding tobamovirus-plant interactions: implications for breeding resistance to tomato brown rugose fruit virus.
journal: Journal of plant pathology : an international journal of the Italian Phytopathological Society
note: 综述烟草花叶病毒属与植物互作，重点讨论ToBRFV克服Tm-2^2抗性的机制及育种策略，包括传统育种、基因工程和CRISPR。

title: Brome mosaic virus detected in Kansas wheat co-infected with other common wheat viruses.
note: 利用纳米孔测序对堪萨斯小麦田间病毒种群进行三年调查，首次在堪萨斯州发现雀麦花叶病毒（BMV），且常与其他小麦病毒如WSMV、TriMV等共感染。

title: Detection of single nucleotide polymorphisms in virus genomes assembled from high-throughput sequencing data: large-scale performance testing of sequence analysis strategies.
note: 比较14个植物病毒学实验室使用不同生物信息学流程检测PepMV三种样本中21个变异体的能力，评估SNP检测关键步骤。

title: A novel deltacryptic virus identified in Allium cepa from Brazil.
note: 从巴西洋葱RNA-seq数据中组装到一个新的partitivirus基因组，由三个dsRNA组成，与arhar cryptic virus 1亲缘近，命名为allium deltapartitivirus，首次在葱属植物中发现隐症病毒。

title: African eggplant-associated virus: Characterization of a novel tobamovirus identified from Solanum macrocarpon and assessment of its potential impact on tomato and pepper crops.
note: 在从荷兰进口的非洲茄子果实中发现一种新型烟草花叶病毒，命名为African eggplant-associated virus，表征其宿主范围和基因组，评估对番茄和辣椒的风险。

title: In-silico prediction of RT-qPCR-high resolution melting for broad detection of emaraviruses.
note: 针对Emaravirus属设计简并引物，开发RT-qPCR-HRM检测方法，结合计算机预测熔解温度，实现高灵敏度检测。

title: Identification and characterization of a novel
note: 从枸杞中鉴定出一种新胞质弹状病毒GCVA，通过HTS测序，基因组14,812 nt，与已知病毒同源性低，系统发育支持其为新种。

title: Identification and characterization of two closely related virga-like viruses latently infecting rubber trees (
note: 从橡胶树中鉴定并表征两种新的virga-like潜伏病毒，通过基因组比较和系统发育分析确认其属于新型植物病毒组。
在墨西哥Colima州采集Sida和Malvastrum杂草，通过circomics鉴定新种Sida chlorotic leaf virus，该病毒由重组产生，能侵染黄瓜。

title: Integrated transcriptome and microRNA sequencing analyses reveal gene responses in poplar leaves infected by the novel pathogen bean common mosaic virus (BCMV).
note: 研究BCMV感染杨树导致光合抑制、黄酮积累，通过转录组和miRNA测序发现miR156/SPL模块调控病毒症状发展。

title: Novel strains of a pandemic plant virus, tomato spotted wilt orthotospovirus, increase vector fitness and modulate virus transmission in a resistant host.
note: 研究四种新的抗性突破株系和非RB株系对西花蓟马适合度及番茄中病毒传播的影响，发现RB株系选择性地提高媒介适合度，获得流行病学优势。

title: Discovery of Resveratrol and its Derivatives as Novel Antiviral and Anti- Phytopathogenic-Fungus Agents.
note: 设计合成一系列白藜芦醇衍生物，系统评价其抗TMV和抗真菌活性，发现多个高效抗病毒化合物。

title: First Detection and Genome Characterization of a New RNA Virus, Hibiscus Betacarmovirus, and a New DNA Virus, Hibiscus Soymovirus, Naturally Infecting
note: 在夏威夷欧胡岛采集的有症状木槿叶片中，通过高通量测序发现两种新病毒：一种RNA病毒（hibiscus betacarmovirus）和一种DNA病毒（hibiscus soymovirus），并完成基因组表征和分布调查。

title: Genomic characterization of a novel potyvirus infecting Barleria repens in South Africa.
note: 对南非Western Cape省表现病毒样叶花叶症状的Barleria repens进行基因组测序，鉴定为新病毒BaRMoV，系统发育分析显示与YMV近缘

title: Transcriptome Mining Expands Knowledge of RNA Viruses across the Plant Kingdom.
note: 对1079个植物转录组进行病毒挖掘，发现大量新RNA病毒，显著扩展宿主范围，揭示病毒与宿主共进化关系

title: Structural Optimization of the Natural Product: Discovery of Almazoles C-D and Their Derivatives as Novel Antiviral and Anti-phytopathogenic Fungus Agents.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 基于海洋天然产物almazoles C-D设计合成衍生物，系统性评估抗TMV和抗真菌活性，发现多种化合物抗TMV活性优于ribavirin。

title: Discovery of Hyrtinadine A and Its Derivatives as Novel Antiviral and Anti-Phytopathogenic-Fungus Agents.
note: 研究以海洋天然产物hyrtinadine A为先导，设计合成衍生物，筛选抗TMV和抗真菌活性，发现8a为抗病毒候选物。

title: Antiviral modes of action of the novel compound GLY-15 containing pyrimidine heterocycle and moroxydine skeleton against tobacco mosaic virus.
note: 研究了一种含嘧啶杂环和吗啉胍骨架的新型化合物GLY-15对TMV的抗病毒作用机制，发现其通过诱导宿主防御反应和直接作用于病毒蛋白发挥抗病毒活性

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel polerovirus infecting chickpea (Cicer arietinum L.).
note: 报道了一种侵染鹰嘴豆的新型polerovirus，命名为chickpea leafroll virus (CpLRV)，基因组5770 nt，通过小RNA测序和RT-PCR等方法鉴定。

title: Complete genome sequence of a new badnavirus infecting a tea plant in China.
note: 在安徽茶树上发现一种新badnavirus，暂命名CSBV1，基因组8195 bp，属于Badnavirus属，与Camellia lemon glow virus同源性68.6%。

title: Genome sequence of pineapple secovirus B, a second sadwavirus reported infecting Ananas comosus.
note: 通过高通量测序确定了一种感染夏威夷瓦胡岛菠萝的新病毒PSV-B的完整基因组序列，代表Sadwavirus属Cholivirus亚属的一个新种。

title: First report of
note: 首次报道伊朗藏红花感染芜菁花叶病毒（TuMV），病株出现花色改变、褪绿和花叶症状。

title: Tobacco mosaic virus movement protein complements a Potato spindle tuber viroid RNA mutant impaired for mesophyll entry but not mutants unable to enter the phloem.
note: 利用PSTVd突变体分析TMV MP的RNA运输功能，发现MP能互补叶肉进入缺陷突变体，但不能互补韧皮部进入突变体。

title: Uncovering Plant Virus Species Forming Novel Provisional Taxonomic Units Related to the Family
note: 通过公开数据分析，揭示贝尼样病毒新分类单元、寄主扩展、跨界宿主转换及运动蛋白进化。

title: Expanding known viral diversity in plants: virome of 161 species alongside an ancient canal.
note: 对运河沿岸161种植物进行病毒组分析，发现245个植物相关病毒基因组，揭示复杂病毒群落，扩展对植物病毒多样性和宿主范围的认识。

title: Metagenomic Analysis of Ampelographic Collections of Dagestan Revealed the Presence of Two Novel Grapevine Viruses.
note: 利用高通量测序分析达吉斯坦两个葡萄品种收集圃的病毒组，鉴定出两种新病毒和多种已知病原。

title: Rose Virome Analysis and Identification of a Novel Ilarvirus in Taiwan.
note: 对台湾有机农场玫瑰样品进行病毒组分析，鉴定出七种病毒，包括一种新ilarvirus，暂命名rose ilarvirus 2，为台湾首次报道玫瑰病毒病。

title: Analysis of
note: 通过转录组分析鉴定黑加仑中与BRV抗性相关的候选R基因，发现一个CC-NBS-LRR类基因在侵染后显著表达。

title: The Discovery of Novel Ferulic Acid Derivatives Incorporating Substituted Isopropanolamine Moieties as Potential Tobacco Mosaic Virus Helicase Inhibitors.
note: 基于TMV解旋酶靶标设计天然阿魏酸衍生物，筛选出高效抑制剂A19，揭示了其作用机制和构效关系，为新型抗植物病毒药物提供候选。

title: Integrated next-generation sequencing and comparative transcriptomic analysis of leaves provides novel insights into the ethylene pathway of Chrysanthemum morifolium in response to a Chinese isolate of chrysanthemum virus B.
note: 通过转录组和VIGS技术，发现乙烯途径在菊花响应CVB感染中发挥关键作用

title: Novel RNA Viruses Discovered in Weeds in Rice Fields.
note: 通过宏转录组测序从水稻田杂草中鉴定出224种RNA病毒，其中39种高度分化的新病毒，潜在感染植物。

title: A National Catalogue of Viruses Associated with Indigenous Species Reveals High-Throughput Sequencing as a Driver of Indigenous Virus Discovery.
note: 汇编新西兰本土物种相关病毒目录，共701种病毒，包括126种植物病毒，展示高通量测序驱动病毒发现。

title: Mixed Infection of Blackcurrant with a Novel Cytorhabdovirus and Black Currant-Associated Nucleorhabdovirus.
note: 对黑加仑新品系KB1进行病毒组筛选，发现一种新的细胞质弹状病毒BCRV2，并与黑加仑相关核弹状病毒BCaRV共感染。

title: Transcriptome Analysis Reveals a Comprehensive Virus Resistance Response Mechanism in Pecan Infected by a Novel Badnavirus Pecan Virus.
note: 通过转录组分析揭示PMV感染山核桃后，绿叶和黄叶中不同的抗病毒免疫机制，涉及脂肪酸、激素信号及SAR差异

title: Identification of a novel vitivirus from pineapple in Reunion Island.
note: 报道了感染菠萝的Vitivirus属新病毒（pineapple virus A）的完整基因组序列，通过高通量测序获得，系统发育分析确认分类地位。

title: Complete genome sequence of Aconitum amalgavirus 1, a distinct member of the genus Amalgavirus.
note: 在中国乌头中发现一种新病毒AcoAV-1，基因组3370nt，编码两个部分重叠的ORF，属于Amalgavirus属。

title: A new flavi-like virus identified in populations of wild carrots.
note: 利用dsRNA高通量测序在野生胡萝卜中发现一种新的flavi-like病毒（CtFLV-1），基因组21.8kb，单一ORF，与gentian Kobu-sho-associated virus密切相关，可能代表黄病毒科新属Koshovirus。

title: Identification, Characterization, and Detection of a Novel Strawberry Cytorhabdovirus.
note: 2020年在草莓中发现一种与莴苣坏死黄化病毒近缘的新型弹状病毒，命名为StrV-2，获得完整基因组并进行生物信息学分析，用两种蚜虫测试传播，开发多重RT-PCR检测方法并用于筛查种质资源库。

title: The Quest to Identify a New Virus Disease of Sunflower from Nebraska.
note: 2010-2018年从内布拉斯加州西部向日葵病株中鉴定出一种新病毒，命名为向日葵环斑斑点病毒，属于番茄丛矮病毒属。

title: Design, Synthesis, and Bioactivity of Eighteen Novel 2H-1,4-Benzoxazin-3(4H)-one Containing a Propanolamine Moiety.
note: 设计合成含丙醇胺结构的苯并噁嗪酮衍生物，测试其对TMV等病原的生物活性，发现化合物2i对TMV有较好治疗活性。

title: Investigating Grapevine Red Blotch Virus Infection in
note: 分析了GRBV感染对葡萄初级和次级代谢的影响，发现保守和可变的代谢及转录响应，包括植物防御响应

title: The Molecular Characterization of a New
note: 对Prunus物种进行病毒组表征时，在两种野生种和一种杏中发现了新的cheravirus（AWPV），并完成了两个分离株的基因组序列。

title: Common but Nonpersistent Acquisitions of Plant Viruses by Plant-Associated Fungi.

note: 评估Paronychia argentea提取物对TMV感染番茄的保护活性，发现其显著降低病毒积累、促进生长，并诱导系统性防御反应。

note: 研究了中国甘蔗条纹病毒的发生率、地理分布和遗传多样性。平均发生率25.1%，主要流行A株系并分为8个亚组，大部分感染无症状。

note: 利用KASP标记快速筛选豌豆种质对PSbMV P1株系的抗性，验证已知抗性等位基因并发现新来源，为抗病育种提供材料

note: 在陕西商业猕猴桃园系统调查，通过高通量测序检测到13种病毒，包括3种新病毒和10种已知病毒，并确定了基因组序列。

title: Characterisation of a novel alphaendornavirus isolated from balloon flower (Platycodon grandiflorus).
note: 从安徽桔梗叶片中分离到一种新型alphaendornavirus，命名为BfEV，其完整基因组为15180nt，编码多聚蛋白，系统发育分析表明属于Alphaendornavirus属。

title: Whole-genome sequence analysis of paris virus 1: a novel member of the genus Potyvirus infecting Paris polyphylla var. yunnanensis.
note: 本研究测定了侵染滇重楼的一种新potyvirus——paris virus 1的完整基因组序列，并进行了比较分析。

title: Viromes of Ten Alfalfa Plants in Australia Reveal Diverse Known Viruses and a Novel RNA Virus.
note: 本研究对澳大利亚10份苜蓿样本进行病毒组分析，通过dsRNA纯化及高通量测序等方法，鉴定了多种RNA和DNA病毒，包括一种新型emaravirus，并组装了首个澳大利亚AMV完整基因组。

title: Identification and functional characterization of NbMLP28, a novel MLP-like protein 28 enhancing Potato virus Y resistance in Nicotiana benthamiana.
note: 本研究首次鉴定并功能分析本氏烟MLP-like蛋白28，证实其通过JA信号途径增强对PVY的抗性

title: Characterization of the Complete Genome and P0 Protein for a Previously Unreported Genotype of Cotton Leafroll Dwarf Virus, an Introduced Polerovirus in the United States.
note: 本研究通过高通量测序和RT-PCR获得了美国阿拉巴马州棉花卷叶矮缩病毒新基因型（CLRDV-AL）的完整基因组，分析了其基因组结构和进化关系。

title: Novel combined biological antiviral agents Cytosinpeptidemycin and Chitosan oligosaccharide induced host resistance and changed movement protein subcellular localization of tobacco mosaic virus.
note: 研究CytPM-COS对TMV的抗性效果及机制，发现其通过ROS和防御基因上调抑制病毒，并影响MP定位。

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel polerovirus in Ornithogalum thyrsoides from South Africa.
note: 通过高通量测序在南非的Ornithogalum thyrsoides中发现一种新型polerovirus，并完成全基因组测序。

title: Genomic characterization of Malus domestica virus A (MdoVA), a novel velarivirus infecting apple.
note: 通过高通量测序在苹果中发现一种新的velarivirus，命名为MdoVA，并对其进行基因组特征分析。

title: A potyvirus isolated from Mirabilis jalapa in China represents a new species.
note: 从紫茉莉中分离到一种潜在的马铃薯Y病毒属病毒，完整基因组测序显示其与Basella rugose mosaic virus（BaRMV）序列相似性低，建议为新种。

title: Complete genomic sequence of crow-dipper mosaic-associated virus, a novel macluravirus infecting Pinellia ternata.
note: 通过高通量测序在中国半夏中发现并鉴定一个新病毒CrdMV，克隆获得全基因组，系统发育分析表明其为凹脉病毒属新成员

title: RNA sequence analysis of diseased groundnut (Arachis hypogaea) reveals the full genome of groundnut rosette assistor virus (GRAV).
note: 测定肯尼亚西部花生丛簇病株中GRAV两个分离物的完整基因组，分析其结构，建议将其归类为Polerovirus属。

title: Identification and characterization of Miscanthus yellow fleck virus, a new polerovirus infecting Miscanthus sinensis.
note: 利用高通量测序技术在表现黄色斑点症状的芒草叶片中鉴定出一种新的Polerovirus病毒，命名为Miscanthus yellow fleck virus。

title: Characterization and complete genome sequences of two novel variants of the family Closteroviridae from Chinese kiwifruit.
note: 对无症中华猕猴桃进行HTS，发现两个新型Closteroviridae变体，通过RT-PCR和RACE获得全长基因组，并进行系统发育分析

title: Complete genome sequence of rose virus A, the first carlavirus identified in rose.
note: 通过高通量测序在Rosa wichuraiana中发现一种新病毒，暂命名为rose virus A (RVA)，为Carlavirus属新成员，基因组8849 nt，编码6个ORF。

title: Is There a "Biological Desert" With the Discovery of New Plant Viruses? A Retrospective Analysis for New Fruit Tree Viruses.
note: 综述分析了2011年以来32种果树78个新病毒/类病毒的出版物，评估其生物学信息完整性，提出基线优先化方法以促进风险评估。

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel capillovirus infecting Hevea brasiliensis in China.
note: 对中国一株患有割面干涸症的橡胶树中发现的一种新capillovirus进行全基因组测序和分析，暂命名为rubber tree virus 1。

title: Complete genomic sequence of tea-oil camellia deltapartitivirus 1, a novel virus from Camellia oleifera.
note: 通过高通量测序从油茶中发现一种新的三段dsRNA病毒，命名tea-oil camellia deltapartitivirus 1，属于Deltapartitivirus属。

title: Complete sequence of a new bipartite begomovirus infecting Sida sp. in Northeastern Brazil.
note: 在巴西东北部Sida sp.上发现一种新双组分begomovirus，引起金色花叶症状，命名为Sida yellow golden mosaic virus。

title: Complete nucleotide sequence of loquat virus A, a member of the family Betaflexiviridae with a novel genome organization.
note: 通过深度测序发现一株枇杷卷叶症状相关的新病毒LoVA，属于Betaflexiviridae科Capillovirus属，具有独特的基因组结构。

title: A bushel of viruses: Identification of seventeen novel putative viruses by RNA-seq in six apple trees.
note: 对6棵苹果树（4棵衰退、2棵健康）进行RNA-seq，检测到8种已知病毒和苹果锤头类病毒，并发现17种新型推定病毒，但均未与苹果衰退病特异性关联。

title: First report of begomoviruses infecting
note: 在墨西哥黄瓜田中发现五种begomovirus感染，其中一种为新病毒，首次报道北美黄瓜感染begomovirus。

title: Virome of
note: 对江西、重庆出现叶部症状的山茶植株进行宏病毒组测序，发现五种新病毒并解析基因组，检测到已知病毒，研究其与症状关系。

title: Nanovirus Disease Complexes: An Emerging Threat in the Modern Era.
note: 综述纳米病毒的多细胞生活方式、传播、进化、感染机制、宿主范围和地理分布，强调新种出现和宿主范围扩展，及其对全球经济的潜在影响。

title: Real-time tracking of Tomato brown rugose fruit virus (ToBRFV) outbreaks in the Netherlands using Nextstrain.
note: 利用Nextstrain实时追踪荷兰ToBRFV爆发，调查68家公司，17家感染，50个基因组分为3个簇，代表三个原始来源，未发现基因型与公司或流行病学关联。

title: Novel Fig-Associated Viroid-Like RNAs Containing Hammerhead Ribozymes in Both Polarity Strands Identified by High-Throughput Sequencing.
note: 通过HTS在夏威夷无花果中鉴定出一种新型类病毒样RNA（FHVd-LR），为环状RNA，两种极性链均含锤头状核酶，与已知类病毒和卫星RNA相似。

title: The Plant Negative-Sense RNA Virosphere: Virus Discovery Through New Eyes.
note: 综述了利用高通量测序发现植物负义单链RNA病毒的最新进展，强调该技术揭示了病毒多样性和进化。

title: A novel computational approach to the silencing of
note: 通过计算预测甘蔗miRNA靶向SCBGAV基因组，鉴定sof-miR396为候选抗病毒miRNA

title: Sixty Years After the First Description: Genome Sequence and Biological Characterization of European Wheat Striate Mosaic Virus Infecting Cereal Crops.
note: 通过高通量测序鉴定并表征了欧洲小麦条纹花叶病毒的15个基因组序列，确认其媒介为飞虱Javesella pellucida，宿主范围包括多种谷物但非牧草，并发现RNA2在机械接种后丢失的异常现象。

title: Fusion of a Novel Native Signal Peptide Enhanced the Secretion and Solubility of Bioactive Human Interferon Gamma Glycoproteins in
note: 通过改造BaMV表达载体，融合信号肽和糖基化基序，显著提高了人干扰素γ的分泌和可溶性，获得具有生物活性的糖蛋白

title: Identification of Trichosanthes associated rhabdovirus 1, a novel member of the genus Cytorhabdovirus of the family Rhabdoviridae, in the Trichosanthes kirilowii transcriptome.
note: 在栝楼根转录组中发现一种新病毒TrARV1，属于细胞质弹状病毒属，基因组含6个ORF，编码5个结构蛋白和一个附属蛋白。

title: A Novel Interaction Network Used by Potyviruses in Virus-Host Interactions at the Protein Level.
note: 本研究揭示了potyvirus利用翻译起始因子eIF4E进行宿主互作的新网络，HCpro和VPg通过4E结合基序与eIF4E互作。

title: A functional investigation of the suppression of CpG and UpA dinucleotide frequencies in plant RNA virus genomes.
note: 通过改造PVY基因组二核苷酸频率，发现CpG和UpA高突变体复制严重受损，且不依赖siRNA，揭示植物中未知的病毒限制机制。

title: Molecular characterization of a novel potyvirus infecting noni.
note: 从中国非树（诺丽果）中鉴定了一种新的马铃薯Y病毒属病毒，暂命名为noni mosaic virus (NoMV)，基因组全长9645nt，编码大聚蛋白。

title: Apple chlorotic fruit spot viroid: a putative new pathogenic viroid on apple characterized by next-generation sequencing.
note: 2016年在奥地利苹果上发现类病毒样症状，通过二代测序确定全基因组序列（354 nt），结构特征表明属于Apscaviroid属。

title: First identification and molecular characterization of a novel cherry robigovirus.
note: 通过高通量测序从无症樱桃中鉴定出一种新病毒CRV-5，基因组8384nt，与Robigovirus属其他成员相似，但缺少ORF5a。

title: Identification and genomic characterization of grapevine Kizil Sapak virus, a novel grapevine-infecting member of the family Betaflexiviridae.
note: 在土库曼斯坦的葡萄样品中通过HTS发现一种新病毒GKSV，基因组7604 nt，属于Betaflexiviridae科Trivirinae亚科，与FLV-1亲缘近，建议为新属。

title: Genome sequence and phylogenetic analysis of a novel comovirus from tabasco pepper (Capsicum frutescens).
note: 通过dsRNA测序鉴定了一种新的comovirus，暂命名为PepMMV，分析其基因组结构和系统发育关系。

title: Molecular and biological characterization of a putative new sobemovirus infecting Physalis peruviana.
note: 报道了一种疑似新的sohemovirus——physalis rugose mosaic virus，描述了其近全长基因组序列、粒子形态及寄主反应。

title: Complete genome sequence of a new bipartite begomovirus infecting tomato in Brazil.
note: 通过Illumina测序发现一种新的双分体菜豆金色花叶病毒属病毒，命名为ToICV2，基因组结构典型，符合新种标准。

title: Thladiantha Dubia Mosaic Virus: A Novel Potyvirus Infecting Manchurian Tubergourd (
note: 在Manchurian tubergourd中发现一种新病毒，引起严重花叶，基因组与PLDMV相似度最高，命名为ThDMV。

title: Discovery of Novel Thrips Vector Proteins That Bind to the Viral Attachment Protein of the Plant Bunyavirus Tomato Spotted Wilt Virus.
note: 鉴定西花蓟马一龄若虫中与番茄斑萎病毒附着蛋白GN互作的六个蛋白，重点分析了两个蛋白的互作，为理解持久性传播机制和新防控策略提供靶点。

title: Design, Synthesis, and Bioactivity Evaluation of Novel Isoxazole-Amide Derivatives Containing an Acylhydrazone Moiety as New Active Antiviral Agents.
note: 设计合成一系列含酰腙基团的新型异噁唑酰胺衍生物，评价其对TMV和CMV的抗病毒活性，发现最佳化合物7t活性优于宁南霉素

title: Characterization of three new viruses of the family Betaflexiviridae associated with camellia ringspot disease.
note: 通过电镜和HTS在茶花环斑病株中鉴定出三个新病毒，分别属于Prunevirus和Capillovirus，命名为CRSaV-1/2/3。

title: Facile synthesis of novel dithioacetal-naphthalene derivatives as potential activators for plant resistance induction.
note: 设计合成系列二硫缩醛-萘衍生物，评价其抗TMV和CMV活性及细菌活性，发现S16活性最优，结构-活性关系表明萘基是关键。

title: Molecular characterization of a new vitivirus discovered in a blueberry plant with green mosaic symptoms.
note: 通过二代测序在表现绿色花叶症状的蓝莓植株中发现一种新的Vitivirus病毒，暂命名为BGMaV，基因组具有典型Vitivirus特征。

title: Molecular characterization of a new badnavirus infecting green Sichuan pepper (Zanthoxylum schinifolium).
note: 从绿花椒叶脉透明症状植株中发现一种环状双链DNA新病毒，基因组8014 bp，典型Badnavirus特征，暂名GSPVCaV。

title: Genomic detection and molecular characterization of two distinct isolates of cycas necrotic stunt virus from Paeonia suffruticosa and Daphne odora.
note: 研究了对牡丹和瑞香中两个CNSV分离株进行全基因组测序，系统发育和序列比较显示它们是不同的变种，但并非新种。

title: Exploring the diversity of Poaceae-infecting mastreviruses on Reunion Island using a viral metagenomics-based approach.
note: 使用RCA-RA-PCR和高通量测序的宏基因组学方法，调查留尼汪岛禾本科感染mastrevirus多样性，发现三个新种，确认该岛是AfSV多样性热点。

title: Complete genome sequence of a previously undescribed badnavirus occurring in Polyscias fruticosa L. (Ming aralia).
note: 在羽叶福禄桐上发现一种新的badnavirus，引起轻度花叶和叶片衰老，全基因组测序并命名为polyscias mosaic virus (PoMV)。

title: Cold Atmospheric Plasma as a Novel Method for Inactivation of Potato Virus Y in Water Samples.
note: 本研究首次证明冷大气等离子体可快速灭活水样中的马铃薯Y病毒，为控制灌溉水传播植物病毒提供一种环保、经济的新方法。

title: Pepper yellow leaf curl Aceh virus: a novel bipartite begomovirus isolated from chili pepper, tomato, and tobacco plants in Indonesia.
note: 从印尼亚齐省患黄化卷曲症状的辣椒、番茄、烟草中分离到一种新型双组分begomovirus，命名为PepYLCAV，与已知病毒有重组。

title: A New Tymovirus Isolated From
note: 从厄瓜多尔naranjilla中分离到一种新tymovirus，暂命名NarMMV，基因组6348 nt，系统发育上与NarCMV等近缘，引起轻花叶。

title: Characterization of Ti Ringspot-Associated Virus, a Novel Emaravirus Associated with an Emerging Ringspot Disease of
note: 报道夏威夷ti植物环斑病相关的新型emaravirus，通过HTS鉴定基因组，系统发育和同源性分析确定为新种，并检测到潜在螨虫传播载体

title: Genomic regions on chromosome 5H containing a novel QTL conferring barley yellow dwarf virus-PAV (BYDV-PAV) tolerance in barley.
note: 利用栽培大麦与野生大麦的双单倍体群体，在三个田间试验中鉴定与BYDV耐受相关的QTL，发现一个新的位点位于5H染色体。

title: Full genome sequence of a novel potexvirus from Euonymus bungeanus Maxim based on RNA-Seq analysis.
note: 通过RNA-Seq分析发现并鉴定了一种来自白杜的新potexvirus，命名为EuYMaV，基因组6784 nt。

title: Transmission of a New Polerovirus Infecting Pepper by the Whitefly
note: 报道了由烟粉虱传播的新型辣椒Polerovirus PeWBVYV，该病毒为重组病毒，首次发现粉虱传播黄症病毒科病毒。

title: A Novel Biological Agent Cytosinpeptidemycin Inhibited the Pathogenesis of Tobacco Mosaic Virus by Inducing Host Resistance and Stress Response.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 研究了微生物农药CytPM抗TMV的分子机制，发现其诱导宿主抗性和胁迫响应，涉及内质网蛋白加工

title: High-Throughput Sequencing Analysis of Small RNAs Derived from Coleus Blumei Viroids.
note: 利用高通量测序分析单独或双重感染CbVd-1、-5、-6的彩叶草植株中的类病毒来源小RNA（vd-sRNAs），鉴定其特征及生物发生机制。

title: First Anti-ToCV Activity Evaluation of Glucopyranoside Derivatives Containing a Dithioacetal Moiety through a Novel ToCVCP-Oriented Screening Method.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 本研究针对番茄褪绿病毒，通过表达纯化其外壳蛋白，设计合成系列衍生物，筛选出两种高效抗病毒化合物，并验证其抗病毒活性。

title: A Survey on Plant Viruses in Natural Brassicaceae Communities Using RNA-Seq.
note: 通过RNA-Seq对日本中部三个野生十字花科植物群落进行病毒调查，检测到多种已知病毒及一个假定新病毒，分析其分布和传播。

title: Two new begomoviruses infecting tomato and Hibiscus sp. in the Amazon region of Brazil.
note: 在巴西亚马逊地区帕拉州分离到两种新双生病毒，分别感染非栽培木槿和栽培番茄，基于完整基因组鉴定为新种。

title: Nanopore sequencing of a novel bipartite New World begomovirus infecting cowpea.
note: 在巴西田间豇豆上发现一种新双组分begomovirus，引起亮金花叶症状，暂命名为豇豆亮黄花花叶病毒。

title: Complete genome sequence of a highly divergent carrot torradovirus 1 strain from Apium graveolens.
note: 在芹菜中发现CaTV1高度分化株系，确定完整基因组，与CaTV1相近但不同。

title: Molecular characterization and detection of two carlaviruses infecting cactus.
note: 通过高通量测序从仙人掌样品中鉴定到两种香石竹潜隐病毒属病毒，命名为CCV-1和CCV-2，完成全基因组分析。CCV-1是已知病毒HSO-2016a的分离物，CCV-2可能为新种。

title: Structural basis for the multitasking nature of the potato virus Y coat protein.
note: 利用冷冻电镜解析PVY柔性病毒粒子的近原子结构，揭示外壳蛋白C末端区域与RNA的相互作用及其对病毒粒体稳定性和感染性的关键作用。

title: Molecular Characterization of a New Virus Species Identified in Yam (
note: 利用高通量测序在山药种质中发现一种新病毒YVY，基因组含5个ORF，属于Betaflexiviridae科。

title: First report of cucumber mosaic virus infecting antamul vine (
note: 首次报道黄瓜花叶病毒（CMV）感染印度药用植物antamul，引起黄色环斑症状，通过电镜和RT-PCR鉴定。

title: Bulked segregant RNA-sequencing (BSR-seq) identified a novel rare allele of eIF4E effective against multiple isolates of BaYMV/BaMMV.
journal: TAG. Theoretical and applied genetics. Theoretische und angewandte Genetik
note: 通过BSR-seq和等位性测试，在大麦地方品种中鉴定出eIF4E新等位基因，对多种大麦黄花叶病毒分离株有广谱抗性，并开发了分子标记

title: Characterization of
note: 发现一种新的大豆病毒SoyYSV，属Potyviridae科，测定其完整基因组，研究结构、生物学和分子特性，包括寄主范围和传播方式。

title: Discovery of Cucumis melo endornavirus by deep sequencing of human stool samples in Brazil.
note: 通过深度测序人类粪便样本获得两个CmEV毒株的近乎完整基因组序列，显示与参考毒株高度同源，首次在巴西发现。

title: Molecular analysis of maize (Zea mays L.)-infecting mastreviruses in Ethiopia reveals marked diversity of virus genomes and a novel species.
note: 对埃塞俄比亚主要玉米产区进行病毒调查，利用滚环扩增分析全基因组，发现三种玉米侵染的mastrevirus，包括一种暂命名为玉米矮化条纹病毒的新种。

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel member of the family Potyviridae isolated from Phellodendron amurense Rupr. in Liaoning, China.
note: 从辽宁黄檗上分离到一种新病毒，命名为PYRaV，属于Potyviridae科Roymovirus属，引起黄色环斑症状

title: Grapevine virus M, a novel vitivirus discovered in the American hybrid bunch grape cultivar Blanc du Bois in Texas.
note: 在德克萨斯州American hybrid bunch grape品种Blanc du Bois中发现一种新的ssRNA(+)病毒，属于Vitivirus属，命名为葡萄病毒M。

title: Areca Palm Necrotic Ringspot Virus, Classified Within a Recently Proposed Genus
note: 报道了槟榔坏死环斑病（ANRSD），发现一种新病毒ANRSV，属于Potyviridae科Arepavirus属，并完成基因组测序。

title: Novel bird's-foot trefoil RNA viruses provide insights into a clade of legume-associated enamoviruses and rhabdoviruses.
note: 从百脉根转录组数据中鉴定出两种新病毒，BFTV-1为负义ssRNA弹状病毒，BFTV-2为正义ssRNA耳突花叶病毒，系统发育分析揭示与豆科相关病毒的关系。

title: Use of plant viruses and virus-like particles for the creation of novel vaccines.
note: 综述植物病毒VLP疫苗构建原理，涵盖物理、化学、遗传和免疫学方面

title: Redefining the medicago sativa alphapartitiviruses genome sequences.
note: 对紫花苜蓿样本进行高通量测序，发现两个alphapartitivirus成员，其中MsAPV2为新种，并修正了MsAPV1的基因组序列。

title: The complete nucleotide sequence and genome organization of a novel virus of the order Tymovirales isolated from Prunus davidiana (Carr.) Franch. in Liaoning, China.
note: 2017年9月在中国辽宁山桃上发现黄色斑点叶病，观察球形病毒粒子，经小RNA深度测序获得全长基因组6072nt，提议为新病毒PYSaV，属于Tymovirales目新属Gratylivirus。

title: High Throughput Sequencing For Plant Virus Detection and Discovery.
note: 综述了利用高通量测序进行植物病毒检测和发现的过程，以及现有分析流程的比较。

title: Characterisation of a novel nucleorhabdovirus infecting alfalfa (Medicago sativa).
note: 2010年在奥地利采集到病毒样症状的苜蓿，通过电镜和高通量测序鉴定出一个新的核型杆状病毒，命名为AaNV，基因组13,875 nt，含7个ORF。

title: Molecular characterisation of a novel gemycircularvirus associated with olive trees in Italy.
note: 从意大利橄榄树中鉴定出一种新的gemycircularvirus，命名为橄榄相关gemycircularvirus 1，基因组为2145 nt的环状ssDNA。

title: Duplex RT-PCR assay for simultaneous detection of TSWV and CSVd in chrysanthemum.
note: 开发了同时检测菊花中TSWV和CSVd的双重RT-PCR方法，优化引物组合并评估其灵敏度和诊断性能。

title: Molecular characterization of a new recombinant brassica yellows virus infecting tobacco in China.
note: 描述了一个感染烟草的BrYV新分离物，基因组全长5741 nt，在ORF5区域检测到重组事件，可能源于BrYV-BBJ和BWYV-LS的种间重组，导致从十字花科作物传播到烟草。

title: A new seed-transmissible begomovirus in bitter gourd (Momordica charantia L.).
note: 从印度苦瓜上分离到一个双生病毒分离物，鉴定为新种BgYMV，并发现其可通过种子传播。

title: Kodoja: A workflow for virus detection in plants using k-mer analysis of RNA-sequencing data.
note: 开发了Kodoja流程，整合核苷酸k-mer分析和蛋白质比对，用于植物RNA-seq数据中病毒检测，在葡萄和覆盆子样本中验证，灵敏度优于传统方法。

title: A Novel Genetic Variant of Grapevine leafroll-associated virus-3 (GLRaV-3) from Idaho Grapevines.
note: 在爱达荷州葡萄中鉴定出GLRaV-3的新变异ID45，代表新系统发育组IX，开发了区分检测的RT-PCR方法。

title: Natural Products for Drug Discovery: Discovery of Gramines as Novel Agents against a Plant Virus.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 合成gramine及其类似物，系统评估抗TMV活性，发现多个化合物活性优于对照，初步机制为抑制病毒组装。

title: Discovery of Pimprinine Alkaloids as Novel Agents against a Plant Virus.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 制备了pimprinine生物碱衍生物，系统评估其抗TMV活性，发现多个高效化合物，并研究了构效关系。

title: Air potato (Dioscorea bulbifera) plants displaying virus-like symptoms are co-infected with a novel potyvirus and a novel ampelovirus.
note: 本研究通过高通量测序鉴定出空气山药上两种新病毒，描述了其基因组特征和系统发育位置。

title: Complete genome sequence of a putative novel potyvirus isolated from Platycodon grandiflorum.
note: 报道了从桔梗中分离的推定新马铃薯Y病毒属病毒（PlaMMV）的完整基因组序列及其分子特征

title: Enhanced anti-tumor efficacy and reduced cardiotoxicity of doxorubicin delivered in a novel plant virus nanoparticle.
note: 利用植物病毒JgCSMV纳米颗粒偶联叶酸负载阿霉素，实现肿瘤靶向递送，增强抗肿瘤效果并降低心脏毒性

title: Characterisation of a novel virus infecting orchids of the genus Pleione.
note: 从荷兰和捷克的Pleione属兰花中发现一种新potyvirus，命名为PlFBV，引起花叶和花碎色症状。

title: Double-Stranded RNA High-Throughput Sequencing Reveals a New Cytorhabdovirus in a Bean Golden Mosaic Virus-Resistant Common Bean Transgenic Line.
note: 通过dsRNA高通量测序在抗BGMV的普通豆转基因品系中鉴定出5种RNA病毒，其中一种为新的细胞质杆状病毒，暂命名为BaCV。

title: Identification of a novel plant RNA virus species of the genus Amalgavirus in the family Amalgaviridae from chia (Salvia hispanica).
note: 从奇亚种子转录组中发现一种新植物RNA病毒ShRV1，属于Amalgaviridae科Amalgavirus属，具两个ORF，通过+1程序性核糖体移码表达。

title: Discovery of highly divergent lineages of plant-associated astro-like viruses sheds light on the emergence of potyviruses.
note: 通过分析6600多个植物转录组数据，发现11个高度分化的星状样病毒(plastroviruses)，基因组结构与星状病毒相似，但部分特征与马铃薯Y病毒相关，可能揭示其演化起源。

title: Characterization of Proteins Involved in Chloroplast Targeting Disturbed by Rice Stripe Virus by Novel Protoplast⁻Chloroplast Proteomics.
note: 通过新型原生质体-叶绿体蛋白质组学，发现RSV感染改变了蛋白质靶向叶绿体的生物学过程，并鉴定了关键蛋白因子。

title: Identification and subcellular location of an RNA silencing suppressor encoded by mulberry crinkle leaf virus.
note: 本研究鉴定了桑树卷叶病毒（MCLV）编码的V3蛋白为RNA沉默抑制因子，确定了其最小活性区域为N端94个氨基酸，并发现V3蛋白定位于细胞质和细胞核。

title: Identification and Characterization of a Novel Emaravirus Associated With Jujube (
note: 在辽宁枣树上发现黄斑驳病，通过小RNA高通量测序鉴定了一种新病毒JYMaV，具有6个RNA片段，典型负义RNA病毒特征，与树莓叶斑驳病毒相关。

title: Zostera virus T - a novel virus of the genus Tepovirus identified in the eelgrass, Zostera muelleri.
note: 从Zostera muelleri转录组发现一种新型RNA病毒ZoVT，属于Tepovirus属，为第三个已知tepovirus种。

title: Characterization of the first tenuivirus naturally infecting dicotyledonous plants.
note: 从法国甜瓜中分离到一种新病毒，命名为MeCSV，基因组为8条RNA，总长20,079 nt，与已知纤细病毒亲缘较远，只感染双子叶植物，可机械传播。

title: A 1,000-Year-Old RNA Virus.
note: 从约1000年前的古代玉米穗中发现了新的双链RNA病毒，属于Chrysoviridae科，命名为Zea mays chrysovirus 1。在现代玉米中也发现序列相似性约97-98%的近缘病毒。

title: Tomato yellow leaf curl virus intergenic siRNAs target a host long noncoding RNA to modulate disease symptoms.
note: 研究揭示TYLCV通过非编码RNA机制调控症状：病毒IR区转录产生vsRNA沉默宿主lncRNA SlLNR1，导致发育异常

title: Diverse and variable virus communities in wild plant populations revealed by metagenomic tools.
note: 利用小RNA深度测序技术，在野生长叶车前群体中发现大量病毒，包括已知的PlLV和四种潜在新病毒，并分析了其流行率和分布。

title: Immunocapture of virions with virus-specific antibodies prior to high-throughput sequencing effectively enriches for virus-specific sequences.
note: 利用病毒特异性抗体免疫捕获植物汁液中的病毒粒子，再进行高通量测序，可有效富集病毒序列，该方法简单便宜，用于四种马铃薯病毒研究。

title: A new virus found in garlic virus complex is a member of possible novel genus of the family
note: 通过HTS从巴西大蒜种质中鉴定到一个贝塔线状病毒科新病毒，暂命名GYMaV，在8个品种中7个存在。

title: A Sensitized Genetic Screen to Identify Novel Components and Regulators of the Host Antiviral RNA Interference Pathway.
note: 在拟南芥中建立敏化遗传筛选系统，通过CMV-∆2b感染筛选抗病毒RNAi缺陷突变体，鉴定新组分和调控因子。

title: Monitoring Seasonal Distribution of Thrips Vectors of Soybean Vein Necrosis Virus in Alabama Soybeans.
note: 监测阿拉巴马州大豆田中SVNV的蓟马传播媒介的季节分布和丰度，为理解流行病学提供基础。

title: Molecular characterization and detection of a new closterovirus identified from blackcurrant by high-throughput sequencing.
note: 通过高通量测序从黑加仑中鉴定出一种新的葡萄卷叶病毒，命名为黑加仑葡萄卷叶病毒1（BCCV-1），基因组全长17320 nt，含10个ORF，系统发育分析表明属于葡萄卷叶病毒属新种。

title: Identification of rehmannia virus 1, a novel putative member of the genus Closterovirus, from Rehmannia glutinosa.
note: 通过转录组测序分析有症状的地黄植株，发现两种已知RNA病毒和一种新病毒，并研究了该新病毒的分子和生物学特征。

title: Red clover-associated luteovirus - a newly classifiable member of the genus Luteovirus with an enamo-like P5 protein.
note: 报告了从红三叶草分离的新病毒RCaV的完整基因组序列，其基因组特征与典型黄病毒不同，缺少ORF3a和ORF4，P5蛋白类似enamovirus。

title: Analysis of the complete genomic sequence of a novel virus, areca palm necrotic spindle-spot virus, reveals the existence of a new genus in the family Potyviridae.
note: 分析了一种新病毒ANSSV的完整基因组序列，发现其属于Potyviridae科中的一个新属。

title: Complete nucleotide sequence of a new virus, peach chlorotic leaf spot virus, isolated from flat peach in China.
note: 通过高通量测序在三个桃样品中发现与苹果褪绿叶斑病毒同源的contigs，获得两个分离物完整基因组，序列相似性低于70%，系统发育分析表明为新种，暂命名为Peach chlorotic leaf spot virus。

title: Identification of a new turncurtovirus in the leafhopper Circulifer haematoceps and the host plant species Sesamum indicum.
note: 从伊朗东南部的叶蝉和芝麻中鉴定出一种新的turncurtovirus，命名为sesame curly top virus (SeCTV)，与巴基斯坦的sesame yellow mosaic virus (SeYMV)亲缘近。

title: Design, Synthesis, and Biological Activity of Novel Myricetin Derivatives Containing Amide, Thioether, and 1,3,4-Thiadiazole Moieties.
note: 设计合成了一系列含酰胺、硫醚和1,3,4-噻二唑的杨梅素衍生物，并评估其对TMV的抗病毒活性。

title: Virome analyses of Hevea brasiliensis using small RNA deep sequencing and PCR techniques reveal the presence of a potential new virus.
note: 利用小RNA深度测序和生物信息学分析巴西橡胶树病毒组，鉴定出潜在新病毒HBrV，并通过PCR验证其存在。

title: Viroid research and its significance for RNA technology and basic biochemistry.
note: 综述类病毒发现47年来对RNA技术和生物化学的贡献，包括创新方法、RNA折叠、基因沉默等。

title: Detection of Jasmine virus H and characterization of a second pelarspovirus infecting star jasmine (Jasminum multiflorum) and angelwing jasmine (J. nitidum) plants displaying virus-like symptoms.
note: 研究检测到夏威夷星茉莉病毒样症状样品中两种共感染的Pelarspovirus病毒（JaVH和JMaV），并开发了PCR鉴别检测方法。

title: Novel alleles of rice eIF4G generated by CRISPR/Cas9-targeted mutagenesis confer resistance to Rice tungro spherical virus.
note: 通过CRISPR/Cas9靶向水稻eIF4G基因获得抗RTSV的新等位基因，鉴定出关键抗性突变位点，并验证了农艺性状。

title: Wuhan poty-like virus 1 is a possible member of the genus Macluravirus.
note: 分析已报道的Wuhan poty-like virus 1基因组序列，根据多蛋白序列相似性将其归为Macluravirus属可能新种。

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel virus, classifiable within the Potyviridae family, which infects passion fruit (Passiflora edulis).
note: 首次报道以色列西番莲中一种新Potyviridae病毒PeSV的完整基因组，系统发育分析表明其与RoYMV共同构成新属Roymovirus。

title: Potato Spindle Tuber Viroid Modulates Its Replication through a Direct Interaction with a Splicing Regulator.
note: 研究PSTVd与剪接调控因子RPL5的互作，发现PSTVd通过结合RPL5促进TFIIIA-7ZF表达，从而调控自身复制。

title: Gomphocarpus mosaic virus, a distinctive member of the genus Potyvirus.
note: 2015年在台湾西南部采集到表现花叶、斑驳、皱缩症状的气球植物，经电镜、超薄切片和基因组测序确定为新Potyvirus，命名为GoMV。

title: Identification and molecular characterization of a novel circular single-stranded DNA virus associated with yerba mate in Argentina.
note: 在阿根廷马黛茶样品中检测到一种新的环状单链DNA病毒，命名为YMaCV，基因组2707 nt，具有独特的基因组结构和进化关系。

title: Molecular characterization and detection of a novel vitivirus infecting blackberry.
note: 对表现黄脉症状的黑莓进行分子鉴定，发现一种新vitivirus，评估重组事件，研究种群结构，并开发了常规检测方法。

title: Naamines and Naamidines as Novel Agents against a Plant Virus and Phytopathogenic Fungi.
note: 合成了海洋天然产物Naamines和Naamidines及其衍生物，首次评价其对植物病毒和真菌的活性，发现化合物15d具有优良抗病毒和广谱抗真菌活性。

title: Complete genomic sequence of a novel macluravirus, alpinia oxyphylla mosaic virus (AloMV), identified in Alpinia oxyphylla.
note: 在益智中鉴定了一种新macluravirus，命名为Alpinia oxyphylla mosaic virus，并测定其完整基因组序列。

title: Complete genome sequences of two divergent isolates of strawberry crinkle virus coinfecting a single strawberry plant.
note: 首次报道草莓皱缩病毒两个遗传差异较大的分离株的完整基因组序列，它们共同感染同一草莓植株。

title: High-throughput sequencing reveals a novel closterovirus in arracacha (Arracacia xanthorrhiza).
note: 在巴西的arracacha植物中通过高通量测序发现并鉴定了一种新的长线形病毒，暂命名为arracacha virus 1，为首次在该植物中报道长线形病毒。

title: Molecular characterization of a new begomovirus infecting Synedrella nodiflora in South India.
note: 从印度南部的杂草Synedrella nodiflora中分离到一种新的begomovirus，伴随β卫星，基因组为典型单分体旧世界类型，序列分析确定为新种。

title: Analysis of the complete genome sequence of a potyvirus from passion fruit suggests its taxonomic classification as a member of a new species.
note: 测定中国百香果上TeMV分离物PasFru的全基因组序列，通过序列比较分析建议其为Potyvirus属新种

title: Wheat streak mosaic virus: a century old virus with rising importance worldwide.
note: 综述了小麦条纹花叶病毒百年历史、全球重要性、生物学特性、传播循环、检测方法及防治策略。

title: Unveiling the complete genome sequence of clerodendrum chlorotic spot virus, a putative dichorhavirus infecting ornamental plants.
note: 利用高通量测序和RT-PCR确定了三个疑似菜莉褪绿斑点病毒分离株的全基因组序列，支持将其归为Dichorhavirus新种，并讨论了种划分标准。

title: First Report of Coleus blumei viroid 5 and Molecular Confirmation of Coleus blumei viroid 1 in Commercial Coleus blumei in Canada.
note: 首次在加拿大商业彩叶草中检测并分子确认CbVd-5和CbVd-1的存在。

title: A Virus in American Blackcurrant (
note: 通过高通量测序在一株有症状的美国黑加仑中发现新病毒RAVA，基因组特征介于Tymovirales各属之间。

title: Complete genome sequence of yam chlorotic necrosis virus, a novel macluravirus infecting yam.
note: 从表现褪绿坏死症状的山药中鉴定并测定了一个Macluravirus新成员的全基因组序列，系统发育支持其为新种。

title: Screening of some Croatian autochthonous grapevine varieties reveals a multitude of viruses, including novel ones.
note: 对4个克罗地亚本土葡萄品种进行NGS总RNA测序，发现一个新病毒GBV-1，并首次在克罗地亚检测到多种已知病毒和类病毒。

title: Identification and molecular characterization of a novel varicosa-like virus from red clover.
note: 利用高通量测序从患病红三叶草中发现一种新病毒RCaVV，基因组10kb双片段，系统发育与Varicosavirus属相关。

title: Identification and Characterization of Citrus Chlorotic Spot Virus, a New Dichorhavirus Associated with Citrus Leprosis-Like Symptoms.
note: 在巴西发现一种新双分体负义RNA病毒，引起柑橘褪绿斑症状，基因组与咖啡环斑病毒等相似，由短须螨传播。

title: Combining Analysis of DNA in a Crude Virion Extraction with the Analysis of RNA from Infected Leaves to Discover New Virus Genomes.
note: 开发了一种结合粗病毒提取物DNA和感染叶片RNA分析的宏基因组方法，用于鉴定具有环状DNA基因组的植物病毒及其转录本。

title: Molecular Characterization of Divergent Closterovirus Isolates Infecting
note: 在茶藨子中鉴定出5个Closteroviridae新成员分离物，暂命名为黑加仑卷叶相关病毒1，基因组17kb，编码10个蛋白。

title: Complete nucleotide sequence of a new carlavirus in chrysanthemums in China.
note: 在中国发现一种引起菊花严重矮化病的新病毒，命名为chrysanthemum virus R (CVR)，通过高通量测序鉴定并完成全序列测定。

title: Using genomic analysis to identify tomato Tm-2 resistance-breaking mutations and their underlying evolutionary path in a new and emerging tobamovirus.
note: 利用基因组分析鉴定番茄Tm-2抗性打破突变及其进化路径，发现新出现的ToBRFV通过宿主转移演化而来

title: Genomic characterization of grapevine virus J, a novel virus identified in grapevine.
note: 利用高通量测序从葡萄品种'Kizil Sapak'中发现并鉴定了一种新型RNA病毒，暂命名为grapevine virus J (GVJ)，全基因组7390 nt，属于Vitivirus属。

title: Plant virus nanoparticles: Novel and robust nanocarriers for drug delivery and imaging.
note: 综述了植物病毒纳米颗粒在生物医学中的应用，特别是作为药物递送和成像的纳米载体

title: Discovery of Viruses and Virus-Like Pathogens in Pistachio using High-Throughput Sequencing.
note: 通过高通量测序调查加州开心果树病毒和类病毒，发现新病毒PAVA和推定类病毒CBCVd-pis，并评估了发生率。

title: Re-analysis of long non-coding RNAs and prediction of circRNAs reveal their novel roles in susceptible tomato following TYLCV infection.
note: 通过生物信息学分析鉴定番茄响应TYLCV的lncRNA和circRNA，并利用VIGS验证其功能，表明这些RNA在易感番茄中负调控病毒感染。

title: Characterization of the genome of a novel ilarvirus naturally infecting Cape gooseberry (Physalis peruviana).
note: 在哥伦比亚灯笼果中鉴定到一个新的ilarvirus，命名为CGIV-1，通过高通量测序和分子检测确认，系统发育分析表明与ageratum latent virus最接近，属于亚组1。

title: A new virus, classifiable in the family Tombusviridae, found infecting Solanum tuberosum in the UK.
note: 在英国马铃薯品种Nadine中发现一种新病毒，属于Tombusviridae科Alphanecrovirus属，命名为potato necrosis virus，与烟草坏死病毒相关。

title: Discovery of a novel geminivirus associated with camellia chlorotic dwarf disease.
note: 通过小RNA测序和PCR克隆，鉴定了引起山茶花褪绿矮缩病的新双生病毒CaCDaV，其基因组特征支持归入双生病毒科新属。

title: Chloroplast Proteome of Nicotiana benthamiana Infected by Tomato Blistering Mosaic Virus.
note: 研究番茄疱疹花叶病毒(ToBMV)感染本氏烟后的叶绿体蛋白质组变化，通过2-DE和质谱鉴定差异蛋白，探索病毒复制与宿主互作机制。

title: Design, Synthesis, Antiviral Bioactivity, and Defense Mechanisms of Novel Dithioacetal Derivatives Bearing a Strobilurin Moiety.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 设计合成了一系列含strobilurin母体的二硫缩醛衍生物，系统评估其抗PVY、CMV、TMV活性，发现C14效果最佳，并初步探究了防御机制。

title: Characterization of Papaya ringspot virus isolates infecting transgenic papaya 'Huanong No.1' in South China.
note: 研究华南转基因木瓜上PRSV的分离株，分析遗传变异和重组，解释抗性丧失原因。

title: Characterization of a new apple luteovirus identified by high-throughput sequencing.
note: 通过高通量测序鉴定苹果树中与快速苹果衰退病（RAD）相关的一个新黄病毒，并对其基因组进行了完整测序和分子特征分析。

title: The complete nucleotide sequence and genome organisation of a novel member of the family Betaflexiviridae from Actinidia chinensis.
note: 报道了从新西兰奥克兰中华猕猴桃中分离的一种新病毒ASbLV的完整基因组序列，属于Betaflexiviridae科Prunevirus属。

title: Molecular characterization of a novel rhabdovirus infecting blackcurrant identified by high-throughput sequencing.
note: 通过高通量测序从黑加仑品种中发现一新核型弹状病毒，暂命名black currant-associated rhabdovirus，基因组14432 nt，与已知核型弹状病毒核苷酸一致性41-52%，可能代表新种。

title: Characterization of a New Tymovirus Causing Stunting and Chlorotic Mosaic in Naranjilla (Solanum quitoense).
note: 2015年在厄瓜多尔naranjilla上发现一种新的tymovirus，引起矮化和褪绿花叶，通过机械接种和分子鉴定，暂命名为Naranjilla chlorotic mosaic virus。

title: The first phlebo-like virus infecting plants: a case study on the adaptation of negative-stranded RNA viruses to new hosts.
note: 鉴定了一种与柑橘凹痕病相关的新型负义RNA病毒，基因组结构类似Phlebovirus，揭示了跨王国适应和模块化基因组进化。

title: Grapevine virus I, a putative new vitivirus detected in co-infection with grapevine virus G in New Zealand.
note: 从新西兰霞多丽葡萄中鉴定出一种新的葡萄病毒I，属于Vitivirus属，与葡萄病毒E和G近缘，常与葡萄病毒G共感染。

title: Molecular characterization and complete genome of a novel nepovirus from red clover.
note: 从有症状的红三叶草叶片中发现并鉴定了一种新线虫传多面体病毒RCNVA，完成了全基因组测序和特征分析。

title: A Functional Link between RNA Replication and Virion Assembly in the Potyvirus
note: 本研究揭示Potyvirus RNA复制与病毒粒子组装的功能联系，发现P3蛋白N端178氨基酸及HCPro等因子对衣壳蛋白稳定和组装至关重要，且复制是组装必需。

title: Identification of Two Novel Amalgaviruses in the Common Eelgrass (
note: 从大叶藻转录组中鉴定出两种新的Amalgavirus，命名为ZmAV1和ZmAV2，分析其基因组结构和系统发育。

title: Complete genomic sequence of Raphanus sativus cryptic virus 4 (RsCV4), a novel alphapartitivirus from radish.
note: 从萝卜无症状幼苗中发现并测序一种新alphapartitivirus，命名为RsCV4，属于Partitiviridae科。

title: Improved detection of grapevine latent viroid by RT-qPCR, its bioassay analysis, and its rare occurrence worldwide.
note: 开发了检测GLVd的一步RT-qPCR方法，调查中国葡萄园感染率低（2/226），生物测定显示GLVd仅感染'Kyoho'葡萄，不感染草本植物，序列变异小。

title: Molecular Characterization of a Novel Species of Capillovirus from Japanese Apricot (Prunus mume).
note: 通过高通量测序从日本杏叶片中鉴定出一种新型Capillovirus，命名为Mume virus A，与樱桃病毒A和醋栗病毒A相关。

title: Discovery of novel inhibitors of RNA silencing suppressor P19 based on virtual screening.
note: 结合虚拟筛选和实验筛选发现P19抑制剂，化合物VS14和VS15在植物体内对TBSV具有抗病毒活性。

title: Complete nucleotide sequence of jasmine virus H, a new member of the family Tombusviridae.
note: 报道了与茉莉花黄化花叶症状相关的新病毒JaVH，完成全基因组测序和分析，预测为Tombusviridae科Pelarspovirus属成员。

title: Molecular characterization of a novel luteovirus infecting apple by next-generation sequencing.
note: 发现一种新的苹果相关黄症病毒，基因组5890nt，与樱桃相关黄症病毒韩国分离株核苷酸一致性53.4%，暂命名AaLV。

title: Complete genome sequence of a new member of the genus Badnavirus, Dioscorea bacilliform RT virus 3, reveals the first evidence of recombination in yam badnaviruses.
note: 首次报道山药Badnavirus属新成员DBRTV3的完整基因组序列，属于K5单系群，发现其与DBSNV和DBALV发生重组。

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel bromovirus infecting elderberry (Sambucus nigra L.) in the Czech Republic.
note: 报道了捷克共和国接骨木上的一种新bromovirus，通过dsRNA纯化和NGS测序获得完整三组分基因组，系统发育分析支持为新种，提议名称为sambucus virus S（SVS）。

title: Complete genome sequence of two tomato-infecting begomoviruses in Venezuela: evidence of a putative novel species and a novel recombinant strain.
note: 克隆测序了委内瑞拉两个番茄双生病毒分离物的完整基因组，发现一个为新种（提议Tomato wrinkled mosaic virus），另一个为番茄褪绿扭曲叶病毒新株系，可能重组起源。

title: Characterization of Pepper leafroll chlorosis virus, a New Polerovirus Causing Yellowing Disease of Bell Pepper in Saudi Arabia.
note: 在沙特阿拉伯甜椒上发现一种新Polerovirus，引起卷叶和脉间黄化，通过棉蚜传播，可感染多种植物。

title: Peach RNA viromes in six different peach cultivars.
note: 对六种不同桃树品种进行宏转录组分析，鉴定出多种病毒和类病毒，获得完整或接近完整基因组，并分析变异和载量。

title: Monoclonal antibody-based colloid gold immunochromatographic strip for the rapid detection of Tomato zonate spot tospovirus.
note: 为快速检测番茄斑萎病毒属新种TZSV，制备了特异性单克隆抗体，并开发了胶体金免疫层析试纸条，实现5-10分钟快速诊断。

title: Next generation sequencing elucidates cacao badnavirus diversity and reveals the existence of more than ten viral species.
note: 利用二代测序从加纳和科特迪瓦的可可样品中重建20个新基因组，发现7个CSSV新种，使相关病毒种增至10个；斯里兰卡样品确定为新病毒CBSLV。

title: Determination of the complete genomic sequence of grapevine virus H, a novel vitivirus infecting grapevine.
note: 从葡萄牙无症状葡萄树中鉴定并完成了一个新病毒Grapevine virus H的完整基因组测序，该病毒属于Vitivirus属。

title: A Negative-Stranded RNA Virus Infecting Citrus Trees: The Second Member of a New Genus Within the Order
note: 从意大利南部甜橙树中鉴定出一种新的负链RNA病毒，命名为CiVA，具有双分体基因组，属于新属Coguvirus，与柑橘凹胶病相关病毒CCGaV相似。

title: High-Throughput Sequencing and the Viromic Study of Grapevine Leaves: From the Detection of Grapevine-Infecting Viruses to the Description of a New Environmental
note: 利用RNAseq从葡萄叶样本中组装了已知病毒和类病毒的全基因组，并发现一种可能代表新属的ssRNA+新病毒（6033 nt），类似Tymoviridae。

title: Molecular characterization of a novel Aureusvirus infecting elderberry (Sambucus nigra L.).
note: 通过高通量测序从接骨木叶片中鉴定出一种新型Aureusvirus（ElAV1），完成全基因组测序，确定为新种，并在捷克广泛分布。

title: A novel citrus viroid found in Australia, tentatively named citrus viroid VII.
note: 在澳大利亚新南威尔士州的无症状柠檬树中发现一种新型柑橘类病毒，暂命名为CVd-VII，属于Apscaviroid属。

title: Metagenomic-based impact study of transgenic grapevine rootstock on its associated virome and soil bacteriome.
note: 利用宏基因组学评估转基因葡萄砧木对其病毒组和土壤细菌组的影响，重点分析GFLV和根系微生物

title: A novel grablovirus from non-cultivated grapevine (Vitis sp.) in North America.
note: 从美国加州野生葡萄中检测到新型grablovirus，通过RCA和克隆测序获得完整基因组

title: Identification of a novel vitivirus from grapevines in New Zealand.
note: 利用两种高通量测序策略从葡萄中鉴定了一种新型葡萄病毒，命名为葡萄病毒G，基因组结构与其他同属病毒相似。

title: Complete genome sequence of datura leaf curl virus, a novel begomovirus infecting Datura innoxia in Sudan, related to begomoviruses causing tomato yellow leaf curl disease.
note: 报道了苏丹曼陀罗上一种新begomovirus——datura leaf curl virus的全基因组序列，系统发育显示其与番茄黄化卷叶病毒相关

title: Discovery of Plant Viruses From Tea Plant (
note: 通过宏基因组学从茶树中鉴定7种病毒，重点发现两种新病毒TPNRBV和TPLPV，分析其遗传特征和进化关系，并设计检测引物。

title: The genetic diversity of narcissus viruses related to turnip mosaic virus blur arbitrary boundaries used to discriminate potyvirus species.
note: 研究日本水仙花叶条纹病相关potyvirus的遗传多样性，发现多个新种，并提出可视为单一巨种的标准。

title: Grapevine virus T diversity as revealed by full-length genome sequences assembled from high-throughput sequence data.
note: 通过HTS组装了9个GVT全长基因组，并从公共数据挖掘14个，分析其多样性，发现至少7个组，重组和保守选择，与GRSPaV类似。

title: A novel badnavirus discovered from Betula sp. affected by birch leaf-roll disease.
note: 通过RNA-Seq病毒组分析在患桦树叶卷病的桦树中鉴定出一种新badnavirus，暂命名BLRaV，首次发现感染桦树的badnavirus。

title: High-Throughput Sequencing Facilitates Characterization of a "Forgotten" Plant Virus: The Case of a Henbane Mosaic Virus Infecting Tomato.
note: 利用HTS在番茄中首次检测到天仙子花叶病毒，组装全基因组，通过小RNA测序分析历史分离株，进行系统发育分类。

title: Transcriptome sequencing reveals novel Citrus bark cracking viroid (CBCVd) variants from citrus and their molecular characterization.
note: 通过转录组测序获得巴基斯坦柑橘类病毒全长基因组，发现新的CBCVd变体，并与中国等地CBCVd进行分子特征比较。

title: Molecular characterization of an unusual new plant RNA virus reveals an evolutionary link between two different virus families.
note: 从枸杞中分离到一种新病毒GBCV，基因组为正链ssRNA，具有独特特征，表明其可能代表Benyviridae和Virgaviridae之间的进化连接。

title: Absolute Quantification of
note: 利用质谱方法绝对定量GRBV病毒蛋白，首次在蛋白水平检测到V1（衣壳蛋白）和V2，并发现类黄酮生物合成酶上调。

title: Cryopreservation of virus: a novel biotechnology for long-term preservation of virus in shoot tips.
note: 报道了一种通过超低温保存感染茎尖来长期保存植物病毒的新型生物技术，证实了ASGV可在活茎尖中有效冻存且遗传稳定。

title: Plant and Insect Viruses in Managed and Natural Environments: Novel and Neglected Transmission Pathways.
note: 本文综述了植物病毒和昆虫病毒在自然和管理环境中12种被低估的传播途径，分析其时空动态及对病毒扩散的影响，强调全面认识传播途径对优化病毒病害管理的重要性。

title: Chemical addressability of potato virus X for its applications in bio/nanotechnology.
note: 通过结构建模和化学修饰策略，系统研究了PVX颗粒上的半胱氨酸反应活性，并开发了可用于双模态成像的多功能PVX纳米颗粒。

title: Proteomic composition of the acrostyle: Novel approaches to identify cuticular proteins involved in virus-insect interactions.
note: 研究蚜虫口针acrostyle的蛋白质组组成，开发新工具鉴定与植物病毒（CaMV、CMV）互作的角质蛋白，发现多个RR-2亚家族蛋白及病毒结合序列。

title: Complete genome sequence of a putative new caulimovirus which exists as endogenous pararetroviral sequences in Angelica dahurica.
note: 在药用植物白芷中发现了一种暂定新种花椰菜花叶病毒AnBSV，其基因组8300 nt，具有典型特征，并以宿主基因组内源性副反转录序列形式存在。

title: Complete genome analysis of a novel umbravirus-polerovirus combination isolated from Ixeridium dentatum.
note: 从韩国奉化的 Ixeridium dentatum 黄化斑驳植株中分离到两种新病毒，暂命名为 IxYMaV-1 和 IxYMaV-2，分别属于 Polerovirus 和 Umbravirus 属。

title: Complete genomic sequence of common reed chlorotic stripe virus, a novel member of the family Potyviridae.
note: 从中国甘肃表现褪绿条纹症状的芦苇中鉴定并测定了全基因组序列，确定为一个新的马铃薯Y病毒科成员

title: Complete genome sequence of a new bipartite begomovirus infecting Macroptilium lathyroides in Brazil.
note: 在巴西东北部发现一种新的双组分begomovirus，感染Macroptilium lathyroides引起黄色花叶，通过滚环扩增克隆并测序完整基因组，基于分类标准定为新种，命名为Macroptilium common mosaic virus (MacCMV)。

title: The proposed new species, cacao red vein virus, and three previously recognized badnavirus species are associated with cacao swollen shoot disease.
note: 对西非可可肿胀芽病相关坏病毒进行基因组和系统发育分析，发现并描述了新种Cacao red vein virus（CRVV），可能是快速死亡症状的候选病原

title: Full genome sequence of jujube mosaic-associated virus, a new member of the family Caulimoviridae.
note: 从枣树花叶症状植株中鉴定到一个新的环状DNA病毒，基因组7194 bp，包含5个ORF，与Caulimoviridae科成员序列相似性低。

title: Complete genome sequence of rice virus A, a new member of the family Tombusviridae.
note: 利用二代测序技术在水稻中鉴定出一种新的RNA病毒RVA，完成其全基因组测序，并分析其分类地位。

title: The complete nucleotide sequence and genome organization of a novel betaflexivirus infecting Citrullus lanatus.
note: 利用RNA测序、小RNA测序和Sanger测序确定了感染西瓜的新型正单链RNA病毒WVA的完整基因组，属于Betaflexiviridae科，但分类未定。

title: Exploitation of a surrogate host, Saccharomyces cerevisiae, to identify cellular targets and develop novel antiviral approaches.
note: 本文描述了如何利用酵母模型系统筛选TBSV的宿主易感因子和限制因子，并验证其在植物宿主中的抗病毒作用，提出新型抗病毒方法。

title: Rice stripe virus NS3 protein regulates primary miRNA processing through association with the miRNA biogenesis factor OsDRB1 and facilitates virus infection in rice.
note: 研究发现RSV NS3蛋白与水稻miRNA加工复合体关键组分OsDRB1互作，作为支架促进pri-miRNA加工，诱导特定miRNA积累，增强病毒感染性。

title: Resolution of cassava-infecting alphaflexiviruses: Molecular and biological characterization of a novel group of potexviruses lacking the TGB3 gene.
note: 对感染木薯的potexviruses进行分类鉴定，发现三个主要系统发育组，其中CsNAV和CsVX缺乏TGB3基因，具有独特基因组结构。

title: New species in the papaya ringspot virus cluster: Insights into the evolution of the PRSV lineage.
note: 报道了苏丹发现的两种PRSV簇新病毒（WMVBV和SuWMV），通过序列和生物学分析确定为新种，并探讨其进化起源。

title: Novel α,β-unsaturated amide derivatives bearing α-amino phosphonate moiety as potential antiviral agents.
note: 基于阿魏酸结构设计合成含α-氨基膦酸酯的α,β-不饱和酰胺衍生物，评估其对CMV和TMV的抗病毒活性。

title: Deep sequencing reveals the first fabavirus infecting peach.
note: 通过深度测序鉴定桃树病害相关病原，发现一种新病毒PLPaV，属于豇豆花叶病毒科蚕豆病毒属，为首次报道感染桃树的蚕豆病毒。

title: Molecular characterization of a novel luteovirus from peach identified by high-throughput sequencing.
note: 通过高通量测序在桃中鉴定出一种新型黄化病毒，命名为peach-associated luteovirus，基因组全长约5.8 kb，含有8个ORF，属于luteovirus属。

title: Identification and characterization of privet leaf blotch-associated virus, a novel idaeovirus.
note: 通过NGS在女贞叶斑病株中鉴定出一种新病毒PrLBaV，具有双组分正单链RNA基因组，分类为Idaeovirus属新种。

title: Complete sequence and genomic annotation of carrot torradovirus 1.
note: 对胡萝卜块状病毒1进行完整基因组测序与注释，确认其为Secoviridae科Torradovirus属新种。

title: Complete genome sequence of longan witches' broom-associated virus, a novel member of the family Potyviridae.
note: 报道了龙眼丛枝综合征相关病毒的全基因组序列，属于Potyviridae新成员，可能为新属代表

title: Erratum to: Complete genome sequence of longan witches' broom-associated virus, a novel member of the family Potyviridae.
note: 未提及

title: Identification of a viroid-like RNA in a lychee Transcriptome Shotgun Assembly.
note: 从荔枝转录组中鉴定出一种新的类病毒样RNA，全长304 nt，属于Apscaviroid属，可形成典型杆状二级结构，在中国荔枝样品中广泛存在，但未能通过农杆菌接种和RNA接种感染其他寄主。

title: A novel geminivirus identified in tomato and cleome plants sampled in Brazil.
note: 通过高通量测序在巴西番茄和Cleome中鉴定出一种新型双生病毒TaGV1，与Capulavirus属相似，不引起明显症状。

title: The complete genome sequence of a novel virus, bellflower veinal mottle virus, suggests the existence of a new genus within the family Potyviridae.
note: 从表现脉斑驳症状的风铃草中分离新病毒，测定全基因组序列并电镜观察，基于系统发育分析提出属于Potyviridae科新属

title: Molecular characterization of yerba mate chlorosis-associated virus, a putative cytorhabdovirus infecting yerba mate (Ilex paraguariensis).
note: 对阿根廷马黛茶上一种引起褪绿症状的新病毒进行分子鉴定，基于基因组结构和系统发育分析确定为细胞质杆状病毒属新成员，暂命名为YmCaV。

title: Complete genome sequence of jacquemontia yellow vein virus, a novel begomovirus infecting Jacquemontia tamnifolia in Venezuela.
note: 报道了委内瑞拉感染野生旋花科植物Jacquemontia tamnifolia的一种新begomovirus（JacYVV）的完整基因组序列。

title: Citrus leprosis virus N: A New Dichorhavirus Causing Citrus Leprosis Disease.
note: 本研究报道了引起柑橘麻风病的一种新 Dichorhavirus，暂命名为柑橘麻风病 N dichorhavirus，通过高通量测序鉴定，并重新评估 Dichorhavirus 属分类。

title: Discovery and molecular characterization of a novel enamovirus, Grapevine enamovirus-1.
note: 利用高通量测序在巴西葡萄中发现一种新型Enamovirus (GEV-1)，仅在南巴西检测到，感染多个葡萄品种，并进行了嫁接传播实验。

title: Genome Sequences of Spinach Deltapartitivirus 1, Spinach Amalgavirus 1, and Spinach Latent Virus Identified in Spinach Transcriptome.
note: 从菠菜转录组中鉴定三种新型RNA病毒，序列分析表明其中两种为新种，第三种为已知种。

title: Occurrence of a novel mastrevirus in sugarcane germplasm collections in Florida, Guadeloupe and Réunion.
note: 利用VANA宏基因组学在甘蔗样品中检测到新型mastrevirus，经克隆测序和系统发育分析确认为新种Sugarcane striate virus，可能源自亚洲

title: Characterization of a new badnavirus from Wisteria sinensis.
note: 从北京紫藤上分离到一种新badnavirus，命名为WBV1，基因组为环状dsDNA，7362 bp，与PYMAV同源性最高。

title: Complete genome sequences of cowpea polerovirus 1 and cowpea polerovirus 2 infecting cowpea plants in Burkina Faso.
