note: 利用重叠RT-PCR和RACE-PCR确定了两种侵染豇豆的新polerovirus的全长基因组序列，CPPV1和CPPV2分别与chickpea chlorotic stunt virus和phasey bean mild yellow virus最相似。

title: Sequencing and phylogenetic analysis of tobacco virus 2, a polerovirus from Nicotiana tabacum.
note: 本研究测定并鉴定了烟草新病毒TV2的完整基因组，与马铃薯卷叶病毒(PLRV)同源性87%，属于黄症病毒科马铃薯卷叶病毒属。

title: Molecular characterization of a new begomovirus infecting Mirabilis jalapa in northern India.
note: 在印度北部的紫茉莉上发现一种新的begomovirus，伴随alphasatellite和betasatellite，引起卷叶斑驳，基于序列相似性界定为新种。

title: Novel mastreviruses identified in Australian wild rice.
note: 通过深度测序在澳大利亚野生稻中发现两个新的mastrevirus种（RLV1和RLV2），与已知病毒同源性低于70%，扩展了澳大利亚单子叶植物感染mastrevirus的多样性。

title: Characterization of badnaviruses infecting Dioscorea spp. in the Pacific reveals two putative novel species and the first report of dioscorea bacilliform RT virus 2.
note: 对太平洋地区山药上badnaviruses进行鉴定，发现两个新种和一个已知种的新分离株。

title: Novel trans-Ferulic Acid Derivatives Containing a Chalcone Moiety as Potential Activator for Plant Resistance Induction.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 设计合成含查尔酮的阿魏酸衍生物，评估抗TMV活性，发现F27可作为新型植物抗性激活剂。

title: Characterization of Canna yellow mottle virus in a New Host, Alpinia purpurata, in Hawaii.
note: 首次报道CaYMV感染红姜花，描述症状和基因组特征，评估其经济影响和宿主扩展风险。

title: Virus surveys of Capsicum spp. in the Republic of Benin reveal the prevalence of pepper vein yellows virus and the identification of a previously uncharacterised polerovirus species.
note: 2014-2015年对贝宁辣椒进行病毒调查，首次在该国报道PeVYV，并从马里非洲茄子中鉴定出一个新的多分体病毒物种AeYV。

title: A novel block of plant virus movement genes.
note: 研究HGSV的运动基因模块，证明ORF2和ORF3形成二元运动块（BMB），介导病毒细胞间运动

title: Two new begomoviruses that infect non-cultivated malvaceae in Brazil.
note: 报道巴西两种侵染非栽培锦葵科植物的双组分begomovirus新种，命名为SiAMV和SiCVV。

title: Capulavirus and Grablovirus: two new genera in the family Geminiviridae.
note: 报告了双生病毒科两个新属（Capulavirus和Grablovirus）及多个新种的建立，并明确了部分病毒的传播媒介。

title: Comprehensive Transcriptome Analyses Reveal that Potato Spindle Tuber Viroid Triggers Genome-Wide Changes in Alternative Splicing, Inducible
note: 利用综合转录组分析，研究PSTVd感染番茄时对宿主基因表达调控的影响，发现可变剪接、miRNA活性变化等，并激活植物免疫。

title: Diversity, Distribution, and Evolution of Tomato Viruses in China Uncovered by Small RNA Sequencing.
note: 利用小RNA测序分析170份中国番茄样品的病毒组，鉴定出22种病毒，包括新发现的Cytorhabdovirus病毒，并分析了TYLCV的起源进化及vsiRNA特征。

title: A new, widespread emaravirus discovered in blackberry.
note: 在黑莓中发现新病毒BLMaV，引起叶斑驳、环斑和叶脉弯曲，与黑莓黄脉病相关，通过瘿螨传播。

title: Identification of a Nanovirus-Alphasatellite Complex in Sophora alopecuroides.
note: 利用高通量测序在伊朗的苦豆子中鉴定出新的Nanovirus-Alphasatellite复合体，包含8个病毒组分和14个卫星分子。

title: Molecular characterization of previously elusive badnaviruses associated with symptomatic cacao in the New World.
note: 对特立尼达可可树表现症状的样品进行测序，鉴定出两种新的badnavirus，命名为可可轻花叶病毒和可可黄脉带病毒。

title: Full-length genome sequence of the tospovirus melon severe mosaic virus.
note: 测定了甜瓜严重花叶病毒(MSMV)全长基因组序列，分析其基因组结构和系统发育，未发现重组或重配。

title: Complete nucleotide sequence of clematis chlorotic mottle virus, a new member of the family Tombusviridae.
note: 描述了新病毒ClCMV的完整基因组序列，预测为Tombusviridae科Pelarspovirus属成员，引起铁线莲褪绿斑驳等症状。

title: Inhibitory activity of different medicinal extracts from Thuja leaves, ginger roots, Harmal seeds and turmeric rhizomes against Fig leaf mottle-associated virus 1 (FLMaV-1) infecting figs in Mecca region.
note: 评估四种药用植物提取物对FLMaV-1的抑制作用，发现姜、姜黄、侧柏和Harmal提取物可减轻症状并影响病毒增殖

title: Actinidia chlorotic ringspot-associated virus: a novel emaravirus infecting kiwifruit plants.
note: 通过NGS、电镜和分子生物学鉴定了一种新型emaravirus，命名为AcCRaV，感染猕猴桃导致叶片褪绿环斑，基因组由5个负义RNA片段组成。

title: Tomato leaf curl Burkina Faso virus: a novel tomato-infecting monopartite begomovirus from Burkina Faso.
note: 首次报道布基纳法索番茄上的一种新型单组分begomovirus，暂名ToLCBFV，基因组序列与PepYVMLV同源性85%，系统发育归入旧世界单组分begomovirus。

title: Complete genome sequences of two novel bipartite begomoviruses infecting common bean in Cuba.
note: 报道古巴感染菜豆的两个新Begomovirus种的全基因组序列。

title: Genome Sequence of Spinach Cryptic Virus 1, a New Member of the Genus
note: 从菠菜转录组数据中鉴定出一种新的双链RNA隐病毒SpCV1，基因组含两个片段，编码RdRp和CP，系统发育分析表明其为Alphapartitivirus新成员。

title: Synthesis and Antiviral Activity of Novel 1,4-Pentadien-3-one Derivatives Containing a 1,3,4-Thiadiazole Moiety.
note: 设计合成新化合物，评估其对TMV和CMV的抗病毒活性，发现多个化合物活性优于利巴韦林。

title: Characterization and complete genome sequence of a panicovirus from Bermuda grass by high-throughput sequencing.
note: 通过电镜观察和高通量测序，从百慕大草中鉴定出一种新的panicovirus，暂命名为BGLV，基因组4404 nt，属于Tombusviridae科Panicovirus属新成员。

title: Molecular characterization of a new soybean-infecting member of the genus Nepovirus identified by high-throughput sequencing.
note: 利用高通量测序鉴定了一种新的大豆感染病毒SLSV，属于Nepovirus属亚组C，并完成全长序列克隆和侵染性克隆接种。

title: Genome characterization, infectivity assays of in vitro and in vivo infectious transcripts of soybean yellow mottle mosaic virus from India reveals a novel short mild genotype.
note: 对印度绿豆分离的SYMMV进行基因组测序和比较，构建感染性克隆并通过体外转录和农杆菌接种验证感染性，为后续研究提供工具。

title: Viroid quasispecies revealed by deep sequencing.
note: 通过深度测序分析感染不同PSTVd变体的植物中产生的vsRNA，揭示PSTVd在感染过程中形成的准种及进化特征。

title: Complete sequence and variability of a new subgroup B nepovirus infecting potato in central Peru.
note: 利用小RNA测序和Sanger测序获得秘鲁中部马铃薯上一种新的线虫传多面体病毒完整双组分基因组，命名为Potato virus B (PVB)，属于B亚组。

title: Interference between variants of peach latent mosaic viroid reveals novel features of its fitness landscape: implications for detection.
note: 研究PLMVd自然群体中两类变异体（class I和class II）的干扰关系，揭示适应度景观新特征，并设计通用/特异性检测方法。

title: The genome sequence of Dioscorea bacilliform TR virus, a member of the genus Badnavirus infecting Dioscorea spp., sheds light on the possible function of endogenous Dioscorea bacilliform viruses.
note: 测定DBTRV完整基因组序列，分析其近缘关系；设计引物检测其在薯蓣种质中的流行情况；发现D. cayenensis-rotundata基因组中存在DBTRV样内源序列，可能参与抗病毒防御。

title: Pepo aphid-borne yellows virus: a new species in the genus Polerovirus.
note: 报道了南非两个PABYV分离物的基因组，通过NGS和Sanger测序，系统发育分析支持其为Polerovirus新种。

title: Characterization of a new carmovirus isolated from an Adonis plant.
note: 从栽培Adonis植物中分离到一种新的等轴病毒，命名为adonis mosaic virus (AdMV)，与香石竹斑驳病毒亲缘关系近。

title: Identification and characterization of a new member of the genus Luteovirus from cherry.
note: 确定了一种樱桃树新病毒的全基因组序列，属于Luteovirus属，暂命名为cherry-associated luteovirus (ChALV)。

title: Biological and molecular characterization of a putative new potexvirus infecting Senna occidentalis.
note: 报道了感染Senna occidentalis的疑似新potexvirus SenMV的完整基因组序列、多克隆抗体制备及生物学测定。

title: Description of a Novel Monopartite Geminivirus and Its Defective Subviral Genome in Grapevine.
note: 通过高通量测序在韩国葡萄中鉴定出一种新型双生病毒，包含完整基因组和缺陷亚病毒DNA，可嫁接传播。

title: The complete genome sequence, occurrence and host range of Tomato mottle mosaic virus Chinese isolate.
note: 测定并分析了中国云南和西藏辣椒上两个ToMMV分离株的全基因组序列，并进行系统发育和寄主范围研究。

title: The complete nucleotide sequence and genomic characterization of grapevine asteroid mosaic associated virus.
note: 利用RNA-Seq、sRNA-Seq和Sanger测序获得了GAMaV全长基因组序列（6719 nt），分析了其基因组结构和系统发育关系。

title: Alfalfa virus S, a new species in the family Alphaflexiviridae.
note: 在苏丹苜蓿样品中发现并鉴定一种新病毒，暂命名为alfalfa virus S (AVS)，属于Alphaflexiviridae科Allexivirus属，基因组全长8349 nt，编码6个ORF。

title: Complete genome sequence of a putative new secovirus infecting yam (Dioscorea) plants.
note: 在巴西从表现花叶症状的薯蓣植物中鉴定了一种新病毒，基因组由两条正单链RNA组成，暂定名为薯蓣花叶相关病毒。

title: VirusDetect: An automated pipeline for efficient virus discovery using deep sequencing of small RNAs.
note: 开发了一个基于小RNA深度测序的病毒发现流程VirusDetect，可高效识别已知和新型病毒。

title: Ecological Factors Affecting Infection Risk and Population Genetic Diversity of a Novel Potyvirus in Its Native Wild Ecosystem.
note: 研究伊比利亚半岛常绿橡树林中马铃薯Y病毒属病毒多样性，发现新病毒MeRV，分析其自然宿主感染的生态因素和种群遗传多样性。

title: Pathogenic seedborne viruses are rare but Phaseolus vulgaris endornaviruses are common in bean varieties grown in Nicaragua and Tanzania.
note: 调查尼加拉瓜和坦桑尼亚菜豆品种中的种子传播病毒，发现PvEV-1和PvEV-2普遍存在但不致病，仅在坦桑尼亚一处样品中检出Cowpea mild mosaic virus。

title: The Triticum Mosaic Virus 5' Leader Binds to Both eIF4G and eIFiso4G for Translation.
note: 研究TriMV 5'UTR介导的无帽翻译所需翻译起始复合物组分，发现eIF4G和eIF4A关键作用。

title: Two Negative-Strand RNA Viruses Identified in Watermelon Represent a Novel Clade in the Order Bunyavirales.
note: 从西瓜中鉴定出两种新型负链RNA病毒WCLaV-1和WCLaV-2，基因组为三分段，属于布尼亚病毒目Phenuiviridae科新分支。

title: Molecular characterization of a novel cryptic virus infecting pigeonpea plants.
note: 鉴定了一种侵染木豆的新隐病毒ArCV-1，基因组由三条dsRNA组成，共4.64 kb，感染植物无症状。

title: Function and Structural Organization of the Replication Protein of
note: 综述了BaMV复制蛋白的功能域和酶活性，特别讨论了独特的加帽机制及其与宿主因子的互作。

title: Characterization of a not so new potexvirus from babaco (Vasconcellea x heilbornii).
note: 从厄瓜多尔的babaco中分离并全基因组测序了一个新的Potexvirus，命名为babaco mosaic virus，基因组6692 nt，含AlkB结构域，与PapMV、AltMV等密切相关但宿主范围不同。

title: Genetic Dissection of Novel QTLs for Resistance to Leaf Spots and Tomato Spotted Wilt Virus in Peanut (
note: 通过多年田间表型和QTL分析，鉴定了花生对叶斑病和番茄斑萎病毒抗性的遗传位点，为分子育种提供标记和候选基因。

title: Tomato Apical Leaf Curl Virus: A Novel, Monopartite Geminivirus Detected in Tomatoes in Argentina.
note: 发现并鉴定感染番茄的新型双生病毒ToALCV，通过基因组克隆、系统发育和重组分析揭示其模块化起源，预测媒介为树蝉。

title: Efficient Transient Expression of Recombinant Proteins in Plants by the Novel pEff Vector Based on the Genome of Potato Virus X.
note: 开发了基于PVX的新型pEff载体，通过缩短骨架和整合沉默抑制子提高重组蛋白表达效率，成功生产流感疫苗候选物。

title: Identification and characterization of microRNAs in Humulus lupulus using high-throughput sequencing and their response to Citrus bark cracking viroid (CBCVd) infection.
note: 通过高通量测序鉴定啤酒花中miRNA，分析其对CBCVd感染的响应，发现差异表达miRNA及其靶基因，揭示调控机制。

title: Ecogenomic survey of plant viruses infecting Tobacco by Next generation sequencing.
note: 通过深度测序104份烟草样品的sRNA，鉴定出8种病毒22个分离株，进行系统发育和重组分析，展示NGS在植物病毒发现中的有效性。

title: A +1 ribosomal frameshifting motif prevalent among plant amalgaviruses.
note: 通过挖掘转录组鸟枪法组装(TSA)数据库，鉴定多个新植物amalgaviruses完整编码区，分析其+1核糖体移码基序、保守卷曲螺旋和RNA聚合酶区域。

title: A novel member of the Tombusviridae from a wild legume, Gompholobium preissii.
note: 从澳大利亚无症状野生豆科植物中发现并鉴定了一个新的Tombusviridae科病毒，命名为Gompholobium virus A。

title: Enrichment of Phosphatidylethanolamine in Viral Replication Compartments via Co-opting the Endosomal Rab5 Small GTPase by a Positive-Strand RNA Virus.
note: 发现TBSV通过劫持Rab5阳性内体富集磷脂酰乙醇胺于复制复合物，为病毒高效复制所必需。

title: Molecular characterization of a novel putative ampelovirus tentatively named grapevine leafroll-associated virus 13.
note: 报道了在表现典型卷叶症状的葡萄中检测到一种暂命名为GLRaV-13的新型葡萄卷叶相关病毒，并完成了其全基因组分子特征分析。

title: A new virus discovered by immunocapture of double-stranded RNA, a rapid method for virus enrichment in metagenomic studies.
note: 开发一种利用抗dsRNA单克隆抗体免疫捕获dsRNA的新方法，富集病毒核酸后经NGS测序，快速鉴定植物病毒。

title: A pathogenic long noncoding RNA redesigns the epigenetic landscape of the infected cells by subverting host Histone Deacetylase 6 activity.
note: 发现Hop stunt viroid (HSVd)通过招募并功能性挟持宿主组蛋白去乙酰化酶HDA6，促进感染细胞的表观遗传改变，从而引发致病过程中的转录变化，并有利于病毒复制。

title: Molecular identification and biological characterization of a new potyvirus in lettuce.
note: 在意大利拉齐奥发现一种引起莴苣坏死和叶片扭曲的新potyvirus，寄主范围有限，由桃蚜传播，完整基因组9829 nt，与asparagus virus 1氨基酸相似性52%，建议为新种。

title: Transmission of grapevine Pinot gris virus by Colomerus vitis (Acari: Eriophyidae) to grapevine.
note: 研究旨在鉴定GPGV的传播媒介，从感染葡萄的瘿螨中检测到病毒，并通过传播试验证明其传播能力。

title: Rice Dwarf Virus P2 Protein Hijacks Auxin Signaling by Directly Targeting the Rice OsIAA10 Protein, Enhancing Viral Infection and Disease Development.
note: 研究水稻矮缩病毒P2蛋白通过靶向OsIAA10蛋白干扰生长素信号，抑制OsIAA10降解，导致生长素不敏感，从而增强病毒感染和致病。

title: Changes in the composition of the RNA virome mark evolutionary transitions in green plants.
note: 通过转录组分析非被子植物中RNA病毒组，发现藻类以dsRNA病毒为主，陆生植物增加了ssRNA病毒，且30K运动蛋白出现在石松和蕨类中。

title: Complete genome sequence of a new bipartite begomovirus infecting cotton in the Republic of Benin in West Africa.
note: 报道了从贝宁棉花中分离的一种新型双组分菜豆金色花叶病毒（CYMV）的完整基因组序列，通过Illumina和Sanger测序确定。

title: Analysis of the coding-complete genomic sequence of groundnut ringspot virus suggests a common ancestor with tomato chlorotic spot virus.
note: 首次测定花生环斑病毒（GRSV）分离株的全部基因序列，与番茄褪绿斑病毒（TCSV）比较M RNA编码基因和蛋白相似性>90%，支持共同祖先假说。

title: The complete nucleotide sequence and genomic characterization of tropical soda apple mosaic virus.
note: 首次报道TSAMV的完整基因组序列，长6,350 nt，编码4个蛋白，与PMMoV同源性80.4%，系统发育分析显示其属于感染茄科的烟草花叶病毒属亚组。

title: A Sequence-Independent Strategy for Amplification and Characterisation of Episomal Badnavirus Sequences Reveals Three Previously Uncharacterised Yam Badnaviruses.
note: 开发序列非依赖的多引物滚环扩增法（RCA），从薯蓣中鉴定并表征9个完整badnavirus基因组，含三种新病毒，加深了对DBV多样性的认识。

title: The complete genome of the tospovirus Zucchini lethal chlorosis virus.
note: 首次报道两个ZLCV分离株（ZLCV-SP和ZLCV-DF）的全基因组序列，系统发育显示与之前分离株聚类但NSm蛋白高度变异。

title: Complete genome sequence of a new enamovirus from Argentina infecting alfalfa plants showing dwarfism symptoms.
note: 通过深度测序从阿根廷中部苜蓿矮化病样品中发现一种新的enamovirus，暂命名为alfalfa enamovirus 1 (AEV-1)，属于Luteoviridae科。

title: The complete genomic sequence of a tentative new polerovirus identified in barley in South Korea.
note: 利用RNA测序和PCR方法确定韩国大麦中一种新的polerovirus(BVG)的全基因组序列，长5620 nt，含有6个典型ORF，与玉米黄矮病毒-RMV亲缘最近但氨基酸一致性低于90%，表明为新种。

title: Molecular and biological characterisation of two novel pomo-like viruses associated with potato (Solanum tuberosum) fields in Colombia.
note: 研究两种新型pomo-like病毒（CPSbV和SbV2）的分子和生物学特性，重点关注CPSbV，并讨论引入新地区的风险。

title: Infectious clones of the crinivirus cucurbit chlorotic yellows virus are competent for plant systemic infection and vector transmission.
note: 构建了CCYV全长cDNA侵染性克隆，通过农杆菌接种实现系统侵染，并可通过烟粉虱传播，为反向遗传学研究提供工具。

title: First Discovery of Polycarpine, Polycarpaurines A and C, and Their Derivatives as Novel Antiviral and Antiphytopathogenic Fungus Agents.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 设计合成多聚marine生物碱衍生物，首次评估其抗TMV和抗植物病原真菌活性，发现1g活性优异。

title: First Complete Genome Sequence of Pepper vein yellows virus from Australia.
note: 报道了澳大利亚辣椒上Polerovirus属辣椒脉黄病毒（PeVYV）的首个完整基因组RNA序列，并与日本和中国的完整基因组进行比较。

title: Discovery and small RNA profile of Pecan mosaic-associated virus, a novel potyvirus of pecan trees.
note: 通过小RNA深度测序在山核桃中发现了新型potyvirus（PMaV），确定全基因组序列，系统发育分析显示与莴苣花叶病毒最近缘。

title: The complete nucleotide sequence of pelargonium leaf curl virus.
note: 首次测定了从天竺葵和郁金香中分离的PLCV全基因组序列，并构建了感染性克隆，证明了其可复现天竺葵的叶卷曲症状。

title: Identification and molecular characterization of a new recombinant begomovirus and associated betasatellite DNA infecting Capsicum annuum in India.
note: 从印度辣椒叶片中分离并克隆一种新的重组begomovirus及其卫星DNA，经序列分析定名为chilli leaf curl Ahmedabad virus。

title: Red clover vein mosaic virus-A Novel Virus to New Zealand that is Widespread in Legumes.
note: 在新西兰南岛豆科作物中发现红三叶草脉花叶病毒（RCVMV），与苜蓿花叶病毒和白三叶草花叶病毒混合感染；通过全基因组测序和靶向调查，发现该病毒在南岛广泛分布。

title: Characterization of a Novel Polerovirus Infecting Maize in China.
note: 通过小RNA深度测序从中国云南玉米中发现一种新病毒MaYMV，基因组5642 nt，属Polerovirus；P0蛋白抑制RNA沉默；构建了侵染性克隆。

title: Monoclonal antibodies for differentiating infections of three serological-related tospoviruses prevalent in Southwestern China.
note: 开发了针对TZSV核衣壳蛋白的单克隆抗体，可区分三种血清学相关的tospoviruses：CCSV、TNSaV和TZSV。

title: Complete genome sequence of tobacco virus 1, a closterovirus from Nicotiana tabacum.
note: 首次报道烟草中长线形病毒科病毒的完整基因组序列，鉴定了一种新病毒TV1

title: Molecular characterization of a novel capillovirus from red currant.
note: 从红醋栗中鉴定出一种新的capillovirus，暂命名为currant virus A (CuVA)，确定其完整核苷酸序列为7925 nt，基因组结构类似capillovirus但更长。

title: Viroids: "living fossils" of primordial RNAs?
note: 本文回顾类病毒是否可能是原始RNA世界的活化石假说，分析证据后认为不支持古老起源，可能更近期进化。

title: Complete genome sequence of a Chinese isolate of pepper vein yellows virus and evolutionary analysis based on the CP, MP and RdRp coding regions.
note: 通过小RNA深度测序获得中国辣椒脉黄病毒分离株(PeVYV-HN)的完整基因组，序列长6244nt，与日本分离株相似度92%，并进行进化分析。

title: Complete genomic sequence of barley (Hordeum vulgare) endornavirus (HvEV) determined by next-generation sequencing.
note: 利用二代测序确定大麦内源病毒(HvEV)完整基因组序列，分析其基因组结构和编码蛋白。

title: Identification and molecular characterization of Panax notoginseng virus A, which may represent an undescribed novel species of the genus Totivirus, family Totiviridae.
note: 从三七中分离到一个dsRNA片段PN-S，通过测序和系统发育分析表明其可能代表Totivirus属的一个新种，命名为PnVA。

title: Field Trial and Molecular Characterization of RNAi-Transgenic Tomato Plants That Exhibit Resistance to Tomato Yellow Leaf Curl Geminivirus.
note: 对RNAi转基因番茄进行田间试验和分子表征，评价其抗TYLCV的持久性及潜在副作用。

title: Two Complete Genome Sequences of Phasey Bean Mild Yellows Virus, a Novel Member of the Luteoviridae from Australia.
note: 报道了来自澳大利亚的phasey bean mild yellows病毒两种完整基因组序列，并与来自phasey bean的部分序列比较，提出新病毒名称。

title: Complete Genomic Sequence of Maize Rough Dwarf Virus, a Fijivirus Transmitted by the Small Brown Planthopper.
note: 测定了意大利分离株的玉米粗缩病毒10个基因组片段的完整序列，是首个MRDV完整基因组。

title: Begomovirus-Associated Satellite DNA Diversity Captured Through Vector-Enabled Metagenomic (VEM) Surveys Using Whiteflies (Aleyrodidae).
note: 通过媒介昆虫宏基因组学调查，鉴定了双生病毒伴随的卫星DNA多样性，发现新类型和类群。

title: Complete genome sequence of a strain of Actinidia virus X detected in Ribes nigrum cv. Baldwin showing unusual symptoms.
note: 从表现叶片褪绿和畸形的黑加仑中分离到Actinidia virus X的株系AVX-RV3124，首次报道该病毒在Ribes属中的检测及完整基因组序列。

title: A new tobamovirus infecting tomato crops in Jordan.
note: 完成了约旦温室番茄中一种新tobamovirus的全基因组序列，提议命名为tomato brown rugose fruit virus，系统发育独立于ToMV和TMV分支。

title: The complete genome sequence of a novel maize-associated totivirus.
note: 通过小RNA深度测序从中国西南玉米中鉴定了一种新dsRNA病毒，其序列和基因组组织类似totivirus，暂命名为玉米相关totivirus (MATV)。

title: Low Temperature Storage of Southern Rice Black-Streaked Dwarf Virus-Infected Rice Plants Cannot Sustain Virus Transmission by the Vector.
note: 为维持病毒毒源，将SRBSDV感染水稻在-80°C储存45或140天，评估作为病毒源经介体传播的可能性。

title: Molecular characterization of a distinct bipartite Begomovirus species infecting ivy gourd (Coccinia grandis L.) in Tamil Nadu, India.
note: 在印度泰米尔纳德邦的虎瓜上发现一种新的双组分begomovirus，引起花叶病，克隆了完整DNA A和B，鉴定为新种Coccinia mosaic virus。

title: A Novel Ilarvirus Is Associated with Privet Necrotic Ringspot Disease in the Southern United States.
note: 从美国南部日本女贞中分离出一种新病毒，命名为女贞环斑病毒(PrRSV)，与坏死环斑病相关，确定其为伊利病毒属新成员。

title: Opium poppy mosaic virus, a new umbravirus isolated from Papaver somniferum in New Zealand.
note: 从新西兰罂粟中分离到一种新病毒OPMV，引起花叶症状，与烟草丛顶病毒亲缘最近，属于umbravirus。

title: Comprehensive Virus Detection Using Next Generation Sequencing in Grapevine Vascular Tissues of Plants Obtained from the Wine Regions of Bohemia and Moravia (Czech Republic).
note: 利用NGS技术检测捷克葡萄藤维管组织中的病毒和类病毒，首次在捷克记录Grapevine rupestris vein feathering virus和Grapevine yellow speckle viroid 1。

title: Molecular characterization of a first begomovirus associated with lentil (Lens culinaris) from India.
note: 对印度扁豆上发现的一种具有扭曲、斑驳等症状的病毒进行分子鉴定，确定其为番茄曲叶病毒新德里病毒的一个新株系。

title: Rice Stripe Mosaic Virus, a Novel Cytorhabdovirus Infecting Rice via Leafhopper Transmission.
note: 在中国发现一种新水稻病毒病，经叶蝉传播，通过小RNA深度测序获得全基因组，鉴定为细胞质弹状病毒新种，命名为水稻条纹花叶病毒。

title: A novel, highly divergent ssDNA virus identified in Brazil infecting apple, pear and grapevine.
note: 在巴西苹果、梨和葡萄树上发现一种新型高度分化的ssDNA病毒，命名为TFDaV，基因组约3.4kb，有五个ORF。

title: Complete genome sequence of a tentative new caulimovirus from the medicinal plant Atractylodes macrocephala.
note: 通过高通量RNA测序从药用植物白术中检测到caulimovirus样序列，确定完整DNA基因组，提议为新种并命名为白术轻度斑驳病毒。

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel endornavirus isolated from hot pepper.
note: 测定感染辣椒的新型内源RNA病毒全基因组，提出命名为hot pepper endornavirus (HPEV)。

title: Sequence and genome organization of papaya meleira virus infecting papaya in Brazil.
note: 报道了木瓜粘性病病毒PMeV的完整8.7kb dsRNA基因组序列和组织，预测了两个ORF。

title: Synthesis and biological activity evaluation of novel amino acid derivatives as potential elicitors against Tomato yellow leaf curl virus.
note: 研究评估两种氨基酸衍生物对TYLCV的抗病毒效果，揭示其通过抑制病毒、增强防御酶活性和Ty-1表达来诱导抗性。

title: Complete genome sequence of bellflower vein chlorosis virus, a novel putative member of the genus Waikavirus.
note: 从bellflower中分离新病毒，测定全基因组，序列分析表明是Waikavirus新种，命名为BVCV。

title: Tomato chlorotic mottle Guyane virus: a novel tomato-infecting bipartite begomovirus from French Guiana.
note: 首次描述了法属圭亚那番茄上一种新的双组分begomovirus的完整基因组序列，暂定名ToCMoGFV。

title: The complete genome sequences of two isolates of cnidium vein yellowing virus, a tentative new member of the family Secoviridae.
note: 测定了两个从蛇床子分离的毒株完整基因组，系统发育显示与草莓潜隐环斑病毒近缘，可能代表Secoviridae科暂定新种。

title: Nucleotide sequence and genome organization of a new proposed crinivirus, tetterwort vein chlorosis virus.
note: 完全测序了韩国来源的白屈菜叶脉褪绿病毒(TVCV)基因组，显示其为Crinivirus属新种，基因组结构与其它crinivirus相似但具有新特征。

title: The complete nucleotide sequence and genome organization of lychnis mottle virus.
note: 确定了lychnis mottle virus的完整基因组序列，为双分体RNA，属于Secoviridae科，与strawberry latent ringspot virus最接近。

title: Newly identified RNAs of raspberry leaf blotch virus encoding a related group of proteins.
note: 在覆盆子叶斑驳病毒中鉴定出三个新RNA片段（RNA6-8），编码互作蛋白，其中P6和P7增强病毒滴度和症状严重度。

title: NIK1, a host factor specialized in antiviral defense or a novel general regulator of plant immunity?
journal: BioEssays : news and reviews in molecular, cellular and developmental biology
note: 研究揭示NIK1受体样激酶介导的抗病毒机制：通过RPL10-LIMYB下调翻译机器，抑制病毒mRNA翻译，产生耐受；同时提示NIK1可能负调控细菌免疫

title: Bean common mosaic virus Isolate Exhibits a Novel Pathogenicity Profile in Common Bean, Overcoming the bc-3 Resistance Allele Coding for the Mutated eIF4E Translation Initiation Factor.
note: 鉴定了一个能克服普通菜豆bc-2和bc-3抗性的新BCMV分离物1755a，并分析了其基因组重组和VPg变异。

title: First full-length genome sequence of the polerovirus luffa aphid-borne yellows virus (LABYV) reveals the presence of at least two consensus sequences in an isolate from Thailand.
note: 首次测定泰国丝瓜样品中LABYV的全长基因组序列，确认其为Polerovirus新种，并发现一个分离物中存在两种共识序列。

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel velarivirus infecting areca palm in China.
note: 在中国海南表现叶片黄化的槟榔树中鉴定了一种新病毒，暂命名APV1，并完成了其完整基因组序列分析

title: Complete genome sequence of a novel monopartite geminivirus identified in mulberry (Morus alba L.).
note: 报道了桑树皱叶症状样品中新型双生病毒的全基因组序列，该病毒基因组2952 nt，具有独特重复序列，系统发育表明为新种

title: Cymbidium chlorotic mosaic virus, a new sobemovirus isolated from a spring orchid (Cymbidium goeringii) in Japan.
note: 从日本春兰中分离出一种新sobemovirus——CyCMV，进行分子特征分析，发现其基因组结构与sobemovirus相似，与番木瓜致死黄化病毒亲缘最近。

title: An assemblage of divergent variants of a novel putative closterovirus from American persimmon.
note: 通过深度测序从美国柿叶片发现至少4种不同的closterovirus-like分子，确定两个完整基因组，提议为新病毒Persimmon virus B。

title: Identification and characterization of a novel geminivirus with a monopartite genome infecting apple trees.
note: 通过高通量测序从苹果树中发现一种新的双生病毒，克隆并验证其感染性，基因组2932 nt，单组分DNA，未归入已知属，在中国苹果树中检出率7.2%。

title: Deep sequencing of dsRNAs recovered from mosaic-diseased pigeonpea reveals the presence of a novel emaravirus: pigeonpea sterility mosaic virus 2.
note: 通过双链RNA深度测序从花叶病木豆中鉴定出一种新的emaravirus，命名为PPSMV-2，具有6个负义RNA片段，与已知木豆不育花叶病毒(PPSMV-1)序列相似性低，由瘿螨Aceria cajani传播，在印度海德拉巴地区广泛分布。

title: Phylogenetic Studies of the Three RNA Silencing Suppressor Genes of South American CTV Isolates Reveal the Circulation of a Novel Genetic Lineage.
note: 通过RT-PCR和克隆分析乌拉圭柑橘衰退病毒分离株的遗传多样性和群体结构，发现三个已知基因型和一个新谱系。

title: Identification of Hop stunt viroid infecting Citrus limon in China using small RNAs deep sequencing approach.
note: 利用小RNA深度测序鉴定中国柠檬上的Hop stunt类病毒，分析siRNA特征及可能的作用机制。

title: A pospiviroid from symptomless portulaca plants closely related to iresine viroid 1.
note: 从无症状马齿苋中鉴定出一种潜在新pospiviroid，基因组351nt环状RNA，与伊莱病毒1序列一致性约80%。

title: Application of molecular antiviral compounds: novel approach for durable resistance against geminiviruses.
note: 综述了分子抗病毒化合物及其作用机制，以产生对双生病毒的持久抗性。

title: Overview on Sobemoviruses and a Proposal for the Creation of the Family Sobemoviridae.
note: 对Sobemovirus属病毒基因组结构、表达、蛋白功能、颗粒结构、病理学和系统发育进行综述，基于系统发育分析提议建立新科Sobemoviridae，包含Sobemovirus和Polemovirus两个属。

title: Deep sequencing reveals a novel closterovirus associated with wild rose leaf rosette disease.
note: 利用深度测序从野生玫瑰叶丛病样本中鉴定出一种新长线形病毒RLRaV，同时发现三种已知病毒。

title: Detection of a New Luteovirus in Imported Nectarine Trees: A Case Study to Propose Adoption of Metagenomics in Post-Entry Quarantine.
note: 2013年春在加州发现进口油桃树生长受阻、木质部凹陷，通过dsRNA提取和二代测序发现新型黄矮病毒，暂命名Nectarine stem pitting-associated virus。

title: Asystasia mosaic Madagascar virus: a novel bipartite begomovirus infecting the weed Asystasia gangetica in Madagascar.
note: 首次报道马达加斯加杂草Asystasia gangetica上一种新的双分双生病毒AMMGV，DNA-A和DNA-B与已知贝戈莫病毒同源性低，属于旧世界新谱系。

title: A novel grapevine badnavirus is associated with the Roditis leaf discoloration disease.
note: 利用NGS测序siRNA，从表现典型RLD症状的Roditis葡萄藤中发现并组装了一个新坏病毒基因组，命名为GRLDaV，认为其与Roditis叶片褪色病密切相关。

title: Identification of novel Bromus- and Trifolium-associated circular DNA viruses.
note: 从新西兰和法国的雀麦及反曲三叶草中鉴定出六个新型环状ssDNA病毒基因组，其Rep蛋白与双生病毒或gemycircular病毒最相似。

title: Complete genome sequences of two new virus isolates associated with cotton blue disease resistance breaking in Brazil.
note: 在巴西抗蓝病棉花品种中发现新病害，鉴定两个新病毒分离物，基因组分析显示与CLRDV高度相似但P0蛋白差异大。

title: Complete genome sequence of yacon necrotic mottle virus, a novel putative member of the genus Badnavirus.
note: 从韩国庆州一株yacon植物上分离到一种新病毒，基因组测序和系统发育分析表明其为Badnavirus属新种，命名为YNMoV。

title: Shining a light on LAMP assays--a comparison of LAMP visualization methods including the novel use of berberine.
note: 比较了多种LAMP可视化方法检测PSTVd，包括新型的berberine染料，评估了各方法在田间应用中的性能。

title: Rottboellia yellow mottle virus is a distinct species within the genus Sobemovirus.
note: 对RoMoV完整基因组测序分析，表明应视为Sobemovirus属独立种，与黑麦草花叶病毒等亲缘关系近。

title: First Report of Fig mosaic virus Infecting Common Fig (Ficus carica) in China.
note: 首次报道Fig mosaic virus感染中国新疆的无花果，通过RT-PCR和Northern杂交检测确认。

title: First Report of Grapevine redglobe virus (GRGV) in Grapevine in France.
note: 首次在法国波尔多地区葡萄中检测到Grapevine redglobe virus，通过高通量测序和RT-PCR确认，感染率83%，但症状因混合感染无法区分。

title: First Report of Blueberry Mosaic Disease Caused by Blueberry mosaic associated virus in Kentucky.
note: 首次报道肯塔基州蓝莓花叶病由BlMaV引起，通过RT-PCR和测序确认病毒存在，部分无症状植株也带毒。

title: First Report of Cucumber mosaic virus Infection in Pachysandra in the United States.
note: 首次报道美国Pachysandra terminalis上黄瓜花叶病毒和苜蓿花叶病毒的混合感染，通过电镜、免疫电镜和RT-PCR鉴定。

title: First Report of Tomato leaf curl Albatinah virus (ToLCABV) and its Associated Betasatellite Infecting Papaya in Oman.
note: 首次报道ToLCABV及其β卫星侵染阿曼的木瓜，引起严重卷叶病，发病率50-70%。

title: First Report of Beet necrotic yellow vein virus on Red Table Beet in Brazil.
note: 在巴西红甜菜上发现BNYVV引起的根腐症状，通过RT-PCR和测序确认病毒存在，并进行土壤传播实验，为该病毒在巴西的首次报道。

title: First Report of the Presence of Plum pox virus Rec Strain in France.
note: 首次在法国报道李痘病毒Rec株系，感染李树，通过ELISA、PCR及测序确认，果园感染率6.25%，正进行根除。

title: Novel genus-specific broad range primers for the detection of furoviruses, hordeiviruses and rymoviruses and their application in field surveys in South-East Australia.
note: 设计五组属特异性RT-PCR引物检测furoviruses、hordeiviruses和rymoviruses，在澳大利亚维多利亚州三年田间调查中发现8900株谷物均未感染。

title: Analysis of geminivirus AL2 and L2 proteins reveals a novel AL2 silencing suppressor activity.
note: 通过分析双生病毒AL2和L2蛋白，发现AL2具有新型沉默抑制活性，且L2抑制效果受植物发育阶段影响。

title: Development of three full-length infectious cDNA clones of distinct brassica yellows virus genotypes for agrobacterium-mediated inoculation.
note: 构建了三种BrYV基因型的全长cDNA克隆，通过农杆菌接种本氏烟，RT-PCR和western blot验证感染效率达100%，为后续研究提供工具。

title: The complete genome sequence of a new polerovirus in strawberry plants from eastern Canada showing strawberry decline symptoms.
note: 通过深度测序从加拿大东部草莓样品中鉴定出一种新的多分体病毒，命名为SPV1，系统发育分析表明其为Polerovirus属新成员。

title: Discovery and molecular characterization of a new cryptovirus dsRNA genome from Japanese persimmon through conventional cloning and high-throughput sequencing.
note: 通过高通量测序和常规克隆，从意大利南部柿树中鉴定出一种新的双链RNA病毒，暂命名为Persimmon cryptic virus (PeCV)，其基因组包含两个片段，分别编码RdRp和CP。

title: A novel virus transmitted through pollination causes ring-spot disease on gentian (Gentiana triflora) ovaries.
note: 本研究从龙胆中鉴定出一种新病毒，引起子房环斑，通过授粉传播。病毒为双片段RNA，属于Virgaviridae科但不属于现有属，暂命名为龙胆子房环斑病毒。

title: Complete genome sequence of motherwort yellow mottle virus, a novel putative member of the genus Torradovirus.
note: 从韩国安东的益母草上分离到一种新病毒，引起黄斑、轻花叶和矮缩症状。基因组由两条单链RNA组成，系统发育分析支持为Torradovirus属新种，暂命名为MYMoV。

title: Tomato mottle wrinkle virus, a recombinant begomovirus infecting tomato in Argentina.
note: 该研究对阿根廷番茄中发现的新型begomovirus进行分子特征描述，证明其感染性，命名番茄斑点皱叶病毒。

title: Complete genome sequence of a divergent strain of Japanese yam mosaic virus from China.
note: 鉴定中国薯蓣叶斑驳症状的日本山药花叶病毒新株系JYMV-CN，测定全基因组序列，与日本分离物核苷酸同源性仅74.7-74.8%，可能为新种或分化中的株系。

title: Molecular identification of a new begomovirus associated with leaf crumple disease of Jatropha curcas L. in India.
note: 通过RCA和测序从印度麻风树叶片皱缩病样中鉴定了新begomovirus，暂命名为Jatropha leaf crumple India virus。

title: Recombination analysis of Maize dwarf mosaic virus (MDMV) in the Sugarcane mosaic virus (SCMV) subgroup of potyviruses.
note: 分析SCMV亚组中MDMV与其他potyviruses的重组事件，新测序两个MDMV全长基因组，发现重组是病毒进化及新变异产生的主要驱动力。

title: First Report of Cucumber mosaic virus from Eggplant (Solanum melongena) in Bangladesh.
note: 首次在孟加拉国茄子中报道CMV，引起花叶和斑驳，减产50%。通过免疫条和RT-PCR确认，序列分析表明属于CMV亚组1B。

title: First Report of Grapevine Pinot gris virus (GPGV) in grapevine in France.
note: 法国首次报道GPGV，通过Illumina测序鉴定，RT-PCR检测显示35%植株阳性，与欧洲分离物高度同源。

title: First Report of Bean common mosaic virus in Cudrania tricuspidata in Korea.
note: 首次报道BCMV感染柘树，引起花叶、黄化、畸形症状，产量下降，通过高通量测序和RT-PCR鉴定获得全基因组序列。

title: Characterization of New Isolates of Apricot vein clearing-associated virus and of a New Prunus-Infecting Virus: Evidence for Recombination as a Driving Force in Betaflexiviridae Evolution.
note: 通过深度测序从李属样品中发现新病毒CPrV和AVCaV新分离株，提出新属Prunevirus，并探讨重组在Betaflexiviridae进化中的作用。

title: Characterization by Small RNA Sequencing of Taro Bacilliform CH Virus (TaBCHV), a Novel Badnavirus.
note: 利用小RNA深度测序鉴定芋头中的新病毒TaBCHV，完成全基因组测序和系统发育分析，确认其为Badnavirus新成员。

title: First Report of Grapevine leafroll-associated virus 2 Infecting Muscadine (Vitis rotundifolia) and Summer Grape (Vitis aestivalis) in the United States.
note: 首次报道GLRaV-2侵染圆叶葡萄和夏葡萄，通过dsRNA、RT-PCR和杂交鉴定，发现两个分离物分别与叶卷株系和嫁接不亲和株系高度相似，未观察到症状。

title: Control of viruses infecting grapevine.
note: 综述了葡萄主要病毒病的控制措施，包括清洁种苗生产、媒介管理和抗性育种。

title: Analysis and application of viroid-specific small RNAs generated by viroid-inducing RNA silencing.
note: 以PSTVd和HSVd为例，介绍分析类病毒特异性小RNA的方法，包括构建感染性cDNA克隆、深度测序和生物信息学分析。

title: First Report of Tomato chlorotic spot virus Infecting Tomatoes in Ohio.
note: 首次报道TCSV在俄亥俄州感染番茄，通过血清学和分子检测确认病毒存在。

title: Characterization by Deep Sequencing of Prunus virus T, a Novel Tepovirus Infecting Prunus Species.
note: 通过深度测序从樱桃和李树中鉴定出一种新的Tepovirus病毒，命名为PrVT，并开发了RT-PCR检测方法。

title: First Report of Potato mop top virus Causing Potato Tuber Necrosis in Colorado and New Mexico.
note: 首次报道PMTV在科罗拉多州和新墨西哥州引起马铃薯块茎坏死，通过RT-PCR和测序确认。

title: First Report of Apple chlorotic leaf spot virus in Hawthorn in China.
note: 首次报道ACLSV在中国山楂上发现，通过转录组组装和RT-PCR验证了病毒基因组，并检测了30份种质中的感染情况。

title: First Report of Catharanthus mosaic virus in Mandevilla in the United States.
note: 首次在美国Mandevilla上报道Catharanthus mosaic virus，通过电镜、RT-PCR、序列分析和血清学鉴定。

title: First discovery of acetone extract from cottonseed oil sludge as a novel antiviral agent against plant viruses.
note: 发现棉籽油污泥丙酮提取物对TMV、RSV、SRBSDV有抗性，分离出棉酚和β-谷甾醇，体内和田间试验效果优于商品药剂。

title: A novel plant-produced Pfs25 fusion subunit vaccine induces long-lasting transmission blocking antibody responses.
note: 利用植物病毒载体在本氏烟中高效表达疟疾候选疫苗Pfs25，纯化后免疫动物产生持久抗体。

title: Identification of a new tospovirus causing necrotic ringspot on tomato in China.
note: 从贵州番茄坏死环斑样品中分离到一个新的tospovirus，命名为番茄坏死环斑病毒(TNSV)，完成S RNA全长测序及系统发育分析。

title: A novel combination of a new umbravirus, a new satellite RNA and potato leafroll virus causes tobacco bushy top disease in Ethiopia.
note: 研究埃塞俄比亚烟草丛顶病的病原，发现一种新umbravirus、新卫星RNA和马铃薯卷叶病毒共同引起，由蚜虫传播。

title: Molecular characterization of yam virus X, a new potexvirus infecting yams (Dioscorea spp) and evidence for the existence of at least three distinct potexviruses infecting yams.
note: 对YVX进行全基因组测序和系统发育分析，发现其为新种，并证实存在至少三种不同的potexvirus感染薯蓣。

title: Discovery of replicating circular RNAs by RNA-seq and computational algorithms.
note: 通过改进的计算程序PFOR2分析小RNA和长RNA文库，发现葡萄潜伏类病毒和苹果锤头类病毒样RNA。

title: First Report of Kudzu (Pueraria montana) Infections by Tobacco ringspot virus in Mississippi.
note: 首次报道密西西比州葛藤感染烟草环斑病毒(TRSV)，通过机械接种、ELISA和RT-PCR确认，发现8个县11个样品阳性。

title: First Report of Grapevine virus A and Grapevine fleck virus in the Former Yugoslav Republic of Macedonia.
note: 对马其顿4个地点的葡萄样品进行DAS-ELISA和RT-PCR检测，首次在该国报道GVA和GFkV。

title: First Report of Euphorbia leaf curl virus and Papaya leaf curl Guangdong virus on Passion Fruit in Taiwan.
note: 首次报道两种双生病毒侵染台湾百香果，引起轻微症状但影响果实外观，温暖季节症状隐退。

title: First Report of Carnation vein mottle virus Infecting Dianthus amurensis in China.
note: 首次报道CVMoV感染中国长春中药苗圃中的Dianthus amurensis，引起花叶、叶扭曲等症状。

title: First Report of Watermelon mosaic virus Infecting Melon and Watermelon in Bosnia and Herzegovina.
note: 首次报道西瓜花叶病毒（WMV）在波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那感染甜瓜和西瓜，并检测到“emerging”分离株。

title: First Report of Broad bean wilt virus 2 in Leonurus sibiricus in Korea.
note: 首次报道BBWV-2在韩国益母草上引起花叶、黄化和矮化症状，通过NGS和RT-PCR鉴定，分析了全基因组序列。

title: First Report of Maize chlorotic mottle virus on Sweet Corn in Taiwan.
note: 2014年台湾甜玉米爆发严重病害，经检测发现MCMV，由玉米蓟马传播，为台湾首次报道。

title: First Report of Citrus yellow vein clearing virus on Lemon in Yunnan, China.
note: 在云南瑞丽柠檬上首次报道柑橘黄色脉明病毒，症状包括脉明、皱缩，嫁接传播，电镜观察和RT-PCR检测确认。

title: First Report of a Potyvirus Infecting Albuca rautanenii in the Namib Desert.
note: 对Namib沙漠的Albuca rautanenii植株观察到褪绿条纹症状，电镜见线状病毒颗粒，RT-PCR扩增NIb基因并测序，系统发育分析表明属于Potyvirus新种，暂命名AlbMV。

title: Complete nucleotide sequence and genome structure of a Japanese isolate of hibiscus latent Fort Pierce virus, a unique tobamovirus that contains an internal poly(A) region in its 3' end.
note: 在日本木槿中检测到HLFPV-J，测定其完整基因组序列和结构，发现3'端含有可变长度的内部poly(A)区域，与HLSV相似。

title: First Report of Tomato chlorosis virus (ToCV) in Tomato Crops in Saudi Arabia.
note: 2014年1月在沙特利雅得地区番茄田发现黄化症状，通过RT-PCR和序列分析确认ToCV感染，首次报道。

title: First Report of Grapevine leafroll-associated virus-2 and -3 in Texas Vineyards.
note: 首次报道美国得克萨斯州葡萄园中存在GLRaV-2和GLRaV-3，通过RT-PCR、ELISA和测序确认，为葡萄卷叶病的防控提供依据。

title: First Report of Plum pox virus Strain M Isolates in Apricot in Sicily, Italy.
note: 首次报道PPV-M株系在意大利西西里岛杏树上引起Sharka病，通过血清学和分子检测确认，存在扩散风险。

title: First Report of Chilli veinal mottle virus Infecting Tomato (Solanum lycopersicum) in China.
note: 首次报道ChiVMV自然侵染中国番茄，在四川成都发现，症状包括斑驳、花叶等，通过血清学和分子检测确认。

title: First Report of Chickpea chlorotic dwarf virus Infecting Hot Pepper in India.
note: 首次在印度辣椒上报道Chickpea chlorotic dwarf virus，引起矮化和卷叶，通过滚环扩增和测序鉴定。

title: First Report of Actinidia virus A and Actinidia virus B on Kiwifruit in China.
note: 首次报道中国猕猴桃上存在AcVA和AcVB，通过RT-PCR和sRNA测序检测，与新西兰分离株序列有差异。

title: First Report of Potato leaf roll virus (PLRV) Naturally Occurring on Jute (Corchorus olitorius) in India.
note: 首次报道PLRV自然侵染印度黄麻，症状包括矮化、叶片卷曲等，发病率低于2%，但可能扩散影响纤维产量和质量。

title: First Report of Sweet potato leaf curl Georgia virus Infecting Tall Morning Glory (Ipomoea purpurea) in China.
note: 首次报道SPLCGV侵染中国圆叶牵牛，发现于湖北荆州。通过RCA和测序鉴定为SPLCGV分离株，田间发病率高。

title: First Report of Potato virus Y Strain N-Wilga Infecting Chrysanthemum in China.
note: 首次报道PVY N-Wilga株系感染中国四川的菊花，通过ELISA和RT-PCR鉴定。

title: First Report of Tomato spotted wilt virus in Lettuce Crops in Saudi Arabia.
note: 2014年3月在沙特阿拉伯中部地区莴苣田发现TSWV，经血清学和分子检测确认，为该地区首次报道。

title: Association of a distinct strain of hollyhock yellow vein mosaic virus and Ludwigia leaf distortion betasatellite with yellow vein mosaic disease of hollyhock (Alcea rosea) in India.
note: 该研究鉴定了与蜀葵黄色叶脉花叶病相关的一个独特HoYVMV株系和LuLDB，并通过农杆菌浸润实验证实其致病性。

title: Molecular characterization of the hippeastrum chlorotic ringspot virus L segment and its protein.
note: 对云南2013年发现的HCRV L片段测序并分析，完成全基因组序列，L蛋白与番茄黄环病毒高度相似。

title: Cassava Ivorian bacilliform virus is a member of the genus Anulavirus.
note: 描述了Cassava Ivorian bacilliform virus (CIBV)的完整基因组序列，确认其属于Anulavirus属，与Pelargonium zonate spot virus和Amazon lily mild mottle virus亲缘关系近。

title: The complete genome of a putative endornavirus identified in yerba mate (Ilex paraguariensis St. Hil.).
note: 首次报道感染巴拉圭冬青的一种新内源RNA病毒，完成全基因组测序和注释。

title: Transmission specificities of plant viruses with the newly identified species of the Bemisia tabaci species complex.
note: 综述烟粉虱物种复合体传播植物病毒的特异性，涉及五个病毒属，重点分析Begomovirus和Crinivirus的传播关系，指出历史数据匹配困难。

title: Identification of a distinct strain of cotton leaf curl Burewala virus.
note: 研究鉴定了一个新的棉花曲叶Burewala病毒株系，该病毒与棉花曲叶Multan卫星DNA（CLCuMB）共感染，引起棉花曲叶病。

title: Circomics of Cuban geminiviruses reveals the first alpha-satellite DNA in the Caribbean.
note: 利用Circomics方法（滚环扩增、RFLP、454测序等）鉴定古巴双生病毒，发现新病毒Peristrophe mosaic virus及首个加勒比地区的alpha-satellite DNA，并描述了多个新株系。

title: First Report of Tomato chlorosis virus Infecting Tomato Crops in Uruguay.
note: 2012-2013年在乌拉圭番茄产区调查，发现症状疑似ToCV或TICV，通过PCR、测序及粉虱传毒实验确证为ToCV。

title: First Report of Rose rosette virus Associated with Rose Rosette Disease Infecting Knockout Roses in Florida.
note: 首次报道佛罗里达州Knock Out玫瑰上玫瑰簇叶病毒，引起典型症状，通过RT-PCR和杂交检测确认。

title: First Report of Moroccan pepper virus in Association with Yellows on Escarole in the United States and the World.
note: 2013年秋季美国新泽西州苦苣出现黄化坏死症状，经ELISA和RT-PCR检测确认Moroccan pepper virus感染，为全球首次报道MPV侵染苦苣。

title: First Report of Maize chlorotic mottle virus Infecting Maize in the Democratic Republic of the Congo.
note: 首次报道MCMV在刚果民主共和国侵染玉米，引起严重斑驳症状，通过RT-PCR、ELISA和测序确认。

title: First Report of Tomato mottle mosaic virus Infection of Pepper in China.
note: 在中国西藏和云南的辣椒上首次检测到ToMMV，通过ELISA、电镜和RT-PCR鉴定，发现其有限宿主范围和低发生率。

title: First Report of Rice yellow mottle virus in Rice in Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia.
note: 首次在埃塞俄比亚报道水稻黄斑驳病毒，通过症状观察、ELISA检测和RT-PCR鉴定，确认病毒存在及其血清型。

title: First Report of Cucumber mosaic virus in Tulipa sp. in Serbia.
note: 首次在塞尔维亚郁金香上报道黄瓜花叶病毒，症状包括叶片条纹扭曲和生长受阻，发病率约20%。

title: First Report of Okra enation leaf curl virus and Associated Cotton leaf curl Multan betasatellite and Cotton leaf curl Multan alphasatellite Infecting Cotton in Pakistan: A New Member of the Cotton Leaf Curl Disease Complex.
note: 本研究首次报道巴基斯坦棉花上由Okra enation leaf curl virus及其伴生卫星组成的CLCuD复合体新成员，通过分子鉴定和系统发育分析确定。

title: First Report of Pepper vein yellows virus Infecting Hot Pepper in Sudan.
note: 在苏丹辣椒上检测到Pepper vein yellows virus，通过RT-PCR和测序确认，序列与已知PeVYV高度同源。

title: First Report of Rice stripe necrosis virus Infecting Rice in Burkina Faso.
note: 首次报道布基纳法索水稻条纹坏死病毒(RSNV)感染水稻，通过症状、血清学、分子检测确认。

title: First Report of Watermelon chlorotic stunt virus Infecting Watermelon in Saudi Arabia.
note: 首次在沙特阿拉伯西瓜上检测到西瓜褪绿矮缩病毒(WmCSV)，通过PCR和滚环扩增获得全基因组序列，与已知分离物高度同源。

title: First Report of Clover yellow vein virus on White Clover (Trifolium repens) in South Korea.
note: 首次报道韩国白三叶草上Clover yellow vein virus的感染，通过芯片和RT-PCR鉴定，并测定了实验寄主范围。

title: First Report of Cucurbit chlorotic yellows virus in Cucumber, Melon, and Watermelon in Greece.
note: 首次在希腊的黄瓜、甜瓜和西瓜上检测到CCYV，开发了RT-PCR方法，确认可通过烟粉虱传播。

title: A new genus and species of Delphacini (Hemiptera: Fulgoroidea: Delphacidae) from Argentina.
note: 描述阿根廷飞虱新属新种，实验证实可传播MRCV，寄主包括多种禾本科作物和野生禾草。

title: Small changes result in large differences: discovery of (-)-incrustoporin derivatives as novel antiviral and antifungal agents.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 从硝基烯烃设计合成(-)-incrustoporin衍生物，评估其抗TMV和抗真菌活性，发现3,4-位微小结构差异导致生物活性显著不同。

title: Virus-induced tubule: a vehicle for rapid spread of virions through basal lamina from midgut epithelium in the insect vector.
note: 发现SRBSDV通过编码的P7-1蛋白形成管状结构，帮助病毒从昆虫中肠上皮穿过基底膜扩散到肌肉组织，揭示植物病毒跨基底膜传播的新机制。

title: A novel role of the potyviral helper component proteinase contributes to enhance the yield of viral particles.
note: 发现马铃薯Y病毒科HCPro蛋白的新功能：通过稳定外壳蛋白增加病毒粒体产量，该功能不依赖于已知活性，且在同源病毒中特异。

title: First Report of Tomato spotted wilt virus in Brugmansia suaveolens in Korea.
note: 首次报道韩国木曼陀罗感染番茄斑萎病毒，通过血清学、机械接种和分子检测确认。

title: First Report of Tomato yellow leaf curl China virus with Betasatellite Infecting Panax notoginseng.
note: 首次报道番茄黄化曲叶中国病毒伴随卫星DNA侵染三七，引起黄化皱缩病，通过分子检测和侵染性克隆确认病原。

title: First Report of Cucumber mosaic virus in Catharanthus roseus in Korea.
note: 在韩国长春花上首次发现黄瓜花叶病毒，引起花叶畸形症状，通过血清学、电镜、RT-PCR鉴定。

title: First Report of Cucumber mosaic virus Subgroup IA Isolate Infecting Yucca aloifolia in Italy.
note: 在意大利坎帕尼亚地区发现丝兰出现亮绿斑和环斑症状，经检测确认为黄瓜花叶病毒亚组IA分离物，为首次报道。

title: First Report of Clover yellow vein virus on Glycine max in Korea.
note: 首次在韩国大豆上发现Clover yellow vein virus，通过RT-PCR和生物学鉴定，完成全基因组测序和宿主范围分析。

title: First Report of Peanut mottle virus Infecting Soybean in South Korea.
note: 首次在韩国大豆上检测到Peanut mottle virus，通过RT-PCR和序列分析确认。

title: First Report of Ageratum enation virus, Betasatellite and Alphasatellite Causing Leaf Curl and Enation Disease of Amaranthus hypochondriacus in India.
note: 2011年2月在印度勒克瑙尾穗苋上发现典型双生病毒症状，经鉴定为Ageratum enation病毒与其卫星分子共同侵染，并完成柯赫氏法则验证。

title: The First Report of Tomato chlorotic spot virus (TCSV) Infecting Long Beans and Chili Peppers in the Dominican Republic.
note: 报道TCSV在多米尼加共和国侵染长豆和辣椒，利用高通量测序和分子技术鉴定病毒，并分析其与TSWV共感染情况。

title: A new ophiovirus is associated with blueberry mosaic disease.
note: 传统方法与高通量测序发现一种新ophiovirus与蓝莓花叶病相关，在所有北美样品中检测到，命名为blueberry mosaic associated virus，系统发育属于Ophioviridae。

title: A betasatellite-dependent begomovirus infects ornamental rose: characterization of begomovirus infecting rose in Pakistan.
note: 在巴基斯坦发现感染观赏玫瑰的新型菜豆金色花叶病毒属病毒，命名为玫瑰曲叶病毒，其依赖beta卫星引起症状

title: Complete nucleotide sequence and genome organization of an endornavirus from bottle gourd (Lagenaria siceraria) in California, U.S.A.
note: 测定加州葫芦内生病毒LsEV-CA的全基因组序列，分析基因组组织、保守结构域，初步判断其与田间黄化症状无关。

title: First Report of Cucumber green mottle mosaic virus on Melon in the United States.
note: 2013年7月在美国加州甜瓜田中发现黄瓜绿斑驳花叶病毒，经ELISA和RT-PCR确认，为美国首次报道，并发现种子为感染源。

title: The First Report of Tomato spotted wilt virus on Gerbera and Chrysanthemun in Venezuela.
note: 首次在委内瑞拉报道TSWV感染非洲菊和菊花，通过症状观察、ELISA和RT-PCR鉴定，序列与已知分离物高度同源。

title: First Report of Cherry mottle leaf virus Infecting Cherry in China.
note: 首次在中国山东邹城樱桃园发现樱桃斑驳叶病毒，通过RT-PCR检测确认感染。

title: First Report of Iris yellow spot virus Infecting Allium tuberosum in India.
note: 首次报道IYSV感染印度韭菜，描述了症状、检测和序列分析。

title: First Report of Tomato mosaic virus on Common Sow Thistle in Iran.
note: 首次报道ToMV感染伊朗的苦苣菜，通过ELISA和RT-PCR检测，序列分析证实，机械接种重现症状。

title: First Report of Tomato yellow leaf curl virus Infecting Eustoma (Eustoma grandiflorum) in Korea.
note: 2012年在韩国龟尾市发现洋桔梗出现卷叶和矮化症状，经分子鉴定为TYLCV，确认系统侵染和粉虱传播。

title: First Report of Citrus leprosis virus Nuclear Type in Sweet Orange in Colombia.
note: 首次在哥伦比亚甜橙上报道柑橘斑驳病毒核型（CiLV-N），并发现与CiLV-C2混合感染。通过RT-PCR和测序鉴定，确认病毒存在。

title: First Report of Taro vein chlorosis virus Infecting Taro (Colocasia esculenta) in the United States.
note: 首次在美国夏威夷的芋头上检测到TaVCV，通过分子检测和序列分析确认病毒存在，并进行田间调查。

title: First Report of Tomato apical stunt viroid in Tomato in Italy.
note: 2013年10月在意大利西北部番茄温室中观察到疑似类病毒症状，经检测为番茄顶枯类病毒(TASVd)，系意大利首次在番茄上报道。

title: First Report of Sweet potato golden vein associated virus Infecting Sweet Potato in Korea.
note: 对2013年韩国甘薯样品进行病毒检测，通过RCA和克隆获得完整基因组，BLAST比对及系统发育分析确认为SPGVaV，为首次在美洲以外报道

title: Tall oatgrass mosaic virus (TOgMV): a novel member of the genus Tritimovirus infecting Arrhenatherum elatius.
note: 从表现花叶症状的燕麦草中分离到一种新的Tritimovirus病毒，命名为TOgMV，确定了其基因组序列和系统发育位置。

title: Revisiting the classification of curtoviruses based on genome-wide pairwise identity.
note: 利用已有的19条全长基因组序列重新评估菜豆金黄花叶病毒属的物种和株系分类标准，提出了新的划分阈值和分类指南。

title: Complete genome sequence of Jacquemontia yellow mosaic virus, a novel begomovirus from Venezuela related to other New World bipartite begomoviruses infecting Convolvulaceae.
note: 本研究克隆并测序了委内瑞拉感染Jacquemontia sp.的双生病毒完整基因组，鉴定为新种，命名为JacYMV。

title: Genomic characterization of Ambrosia asymptomatic virus 1 and evidence of other Tymovirales members in the Oklahoma tallgrass prairie revealed by sequence analysis.
note: 对俄克拉荷马高草草原植物进行病毒普查，从西部豚草中分离并鉴定一种新病毒AAV1，分析其基因组结构与进化地位，同时发现其他相关病毒。

title: A novel set of polyvalent primers that detect members of the genera Bromovirus and Cucumovirus.
note: 开发了一套针对Bromovirus和Cucumovirus RNA1保守序列的RT-PCR通用引物，可高特异性、高灵敏度检测5种病毒，具有常规诊断应用潜力。

title: First Report of Sugarcane yellow leaf virus Infecting Barley in Tunisia.
note: 首次报道甘蔗黄叶病毒自然侵染突尼斯大麦，ELISA和RT-PCR检测并测序，发现与BYDV-RPV血清交叉反应。

title: First Report of Apple chlorotic leaf spot virus, Cherry green ring mottle virus, and Cherry necrotic rusty mottle virus on Peach in Montenegro.
note: 在黑山桃树上首次检测到ACLSV、CGRMV和CNRMV三种病毒，通过RT-PCR和嫁接指示植物验证，序列分析确认感染。

title: First Report of Leek yellow stripe virus in Allium sativum in Western India.
note: 首次报道印度西部大蒜自然感染韭葱黄条病毒，通过ELISA和RT-PCR检测并序列分析确认。

title: First Report of Tomato chlorotic spot virus in Lettuce in Puerto Rico.
note: 首次报道波多黎各生菜上发现番茄褪绿斑病毒（TCSV），引起严重坏死轮斑等症状，造成巨大经济损失，确认由苏丹蓟马传播。

title: First Report of Garlic virus X in Garlic Plants in Brazil.
note: 在巴西四个州采集的302份大蒜样品中，通过RT-PCR和测序检测到大蒜病毒X（GarV-X），这是巴西首次报道。

title: First Report of Recombinant Potato virus Y Strains Infecting Potato in Jordan.
note: 约旦首次报道马铃薯Y病毒重组株系感染马铃薯，包括PVYNTN-NW和PVYNTN，通过ELISA和RT-PCR检测，序列分析确认与叙利亚分离物高度同源。

title: First Report of Cucumber mosaic virus Associated with Capsicum chinense var. Scotch Bonnet in Florida.
note: 首次报道佛罗里达州Scotch Bonnet辣椒上黄瓜花叶病毒的发生。通过免疫学、分子生物学方法鉴定CMV亚组I。

title: First Report of Bean common mosaic virus Infecting Azuki Bean (Vigna angularis) in China.
note: 首次报道BCMV与CMV共同侵染中国北京小豆，引起花叶、皱缩和矮化，发病率30-100%，产量损失50-95%。

title: First Report of Grapevine Pinot gris virus Infecting Grapevine in Slovenia.
note: 首次在斯洛文尼亚葡萄上检测到GPGV，引起短节间和叶片畸形等症状。通过RT-PCR和测序证实病毒存在，核苷酸序列与意大利分离株高度同源。

title: First Report of Potato Virus H on Solanum muricatum in China.
note: 首次在无症状的人参果中检测到马铃薯H病毒（PVH），通过RT-PCR和测序确认，扩增了2.6kb序列，与马铃薯分离物高度同源。

title: First Report on the Occurrence of Cucumber mosaic virus on Fragaria ananassa in China.
note: 首次报道CMV自然感染中国河北草莓，调查2012-2013年间草莓病毒症状，检测发现CMV阳性，部分与SVBV复合感染。

title: Unraveling complex viral infections in cassava (Manihot esculenta Crantz) from Colombia.
note: 通过生物学、血清学和分子检测，鉴定哥伦比亚木薯叶片症状的病原，发现三种新病毒，其中Secoviridae科成员单侵染可诱发症状。

title: Molecular diversity of poleroviruses infecting cucurbit crops in four countries reveals the presence of members of six distinct species.
note: 利用RT-PCR和测序，在4国葫芦科黄化样品中鉴定出多种polerovirus，包括两个新种。

title: First Report of Zucchini yellow mosaic virus in Watermelon in Bosnia and Herzegovina.
note: 首次在波黑西瓜上检测到ZYMV，通过ELISA和RT-PCR确认，序列分析显示与塞尔维亚和奥地利分离株高度同源。

title: First Report of Onion yellow dwarf virus, Garlic common latent virus and Shallot latent virus on Garlic in Poland.
note: 首次在波兰大蒜上检测到OYDV、GCLV和SLV，通过ELISA和RT-PCR验证，并进行了序列分析。

title: First Report of Lettuce chlorosis virus Infecting Bean in Spain.
note: 在西班牙温室菜豆上首次发现莴苣褪绿病毒感染，通过分子鉴定和白粉虱传播试验确认新株系不感染莴苣，强调加强粉虱控制。

title: Identification of a disease complex involving a novel monopartite begomovirus with beta- and alphasatellites associated with okra leaf curl disease in Oman.
note: 鉴定了一个新的 monopartite begomovirus 及其伴随的 beta-和 alphasatellite，与阿曼秋葵叶卷曲病相关。

title: Genome diversity and evidence of recombination and reassortment in nanoviruses from Europe.
note: 调查欧洲豆科植物nanovirus感染，发现两个新种BMLRV和PYSV，测序多个分离株，揭示重组和重配事件及基因组复杂性。

title: First Report of Sweet potato leaf curl virus on Blue Morning Glory in Greece.
note: 报道了希腊蓝牵牛花上的番薯卷叶病毒，引起黄色叶脉症状，通过滚环扩增和测序鉴定为SPLCV分离物。

title: First Report of Mosaic Disease Caused by Colombian datura virus on Solanum lycopersicum Plants Commercially Cultivated in Japan.
note: 在日本千叶县商业番茄上发现花叶病，经鉴定为Colombian datura virus (CDV)，通过机械接种和RT-PCR确认。

title: First Report of Moroccan watermelon mosaic virus in Zucchini Crops in Greece.
note: 2012年夏季希腊伯罗奔尼撒地区西葫芦出现严重畸形和疱疹，首次检测到MWMV。经机械和蚜虫传播试验验证，并发现西瓜也被侵染。

title: First Report of European mountain ash ringspot-associated virus in Sorbus aucuparia in Norway.
note: 首次在挪威的花楸树上报道了欧洲花楸环斑相关病毒（EMARaV），通过RT-PCR和序列分析确认，病毒RNA3的3'UTR区域显示出较高的遗传多样性。

title: First Report of Tomato yellow leaf curl virus in Tomato in Costa Rica.
note: 首次报道哥斯达黎加番茄黄化曲叶病毒，通过分子检测和系统发育分析表明该病毒为TYLCV-IL，与亚洲和墨西哥分离物近缘。

title: First Report of Cucumber green mottle mosaic virus Infecting Greenhouse Cucumber in Canada.
note: 2013年加拿大阿尔伯塔温室黄瓜出现病毒症状，经检测为CGMMV，部分混合感染MNSV，序列分析显示与亚洲分离物亲缘最近。

title: First Report of Potato spindle tuber viroid Naturally Infecting Field Tomatoes in the Dominican Republic.
note: 报道多米尼加共和国番茄田发生严重类病毒病害，通过ELISA和RT-PCR检测并测序确认病原为PSTVd。

title: A new endornavirus species infecting Malabar spinach (Basella alba L.).
note: 从Malabar spinach中分离出一种新的内源RNA病毒，dsRNA基因组14,027 nt，编码多聚蛋白含保守域，感染无症状。

title: Lettuce necrotic leaf curl virus, a new plant virus infecting lettuce and a proposed member of the genus Torradovirus.
note: 2011年荷兰露天莴苣中发现新病毒，引起坏死和卷叶，属于Torradovirus属，建议命名为LNLCV。

title: Interfamilial recombination between viruses led to acquisition of a novel translation-enhancing RNA element that allows resistance breaking.
note: 鉴定到一个新MNSV分离物，其3'-UTR含有来自CABYV的重组插入，该插入作为翻译增强元件，使病毒突破eIF4E抗性。

title: First Report of Maize chlorotic mottle virus Infecting Sugarcane (Saccharum officinarum).
note: 首次报道MCMV自然感染甘蔗，与SCMV复合侵染引起褪绿花叶症状。

title: First Report of Cucumber mosaic virus in Saintpaulia ionantha in Korea.
note: 在韩国温室非洲紫罗兰上发现黄瓜花叶病毒，通过血清学、电镜、机械接种和RT-PCR确认，完成柯赫法则，首次报道。

title: First Report of Lettuce big-vein associated virus (Varicosavirus) Infecting Lettuce in Mexico.
note: 首次报道LBVaV感染墨西哥生菜，通过RT-PCR和测序确认，并完成机械接种验证。

title: First Report of Capsicum chlorosis virus Infecting Waxflower (Hoya calycina Schlecter) in the United States.
note: 首次报道辣椒褪绿病毒（CaCV）感染夏威夷的观赏植物蜡花，通过分子检测确认病毒存在。

title: First Report of Leek yellow stripe virus in Garlic in Ohio.
note: 首次在俄亥俄州大蒜中报告韭葱黄条病毒，通过DAS-ELISA和RT-PCR检测，序列与已知LYSV polyprotein基因同源96-98%。

title: First Report of Cucumber mosaic virus in Taro Plants in China.
note: 首次报道CMV在中国芋头植株上发生，通过RT-PCR检测和序列分析确认病毒属于亚组I。

title: First Report of Watermelon mosaic virus in Zucchini Squash in Bosnia and Herzegovina.
note: 首次报道WMV在波黑感染西葫芦，通过血清学和分子鉴定，序列分析表明属于经典组。

title: Deep-sequencing analysis of an apricot tree with vein clearing symptoms reveals the presence of a novel betaflexivirus.
note: 利用深度测序技术从具脉透明症状的杏树中鉴定出一种新病毒，暂命名AVCaV，基因组7315nt，含4个ORF，与柑橘叶斑病毒同源性约40%。

title: Characterization of an isometric virus isolated from yam (Dioscorea rotundata) in Nigeria suggests that it belongs to a new species in the genus Aureusvirus.
note: 从尼日利亚薯蓣中分离出一种等轴病毒，分类分析表明其属于Aureusvirus属新种。

title: Recent evolution of a novel begomovirus causing tomato leaf curl disease in the Al-Batinah region of Oman.
note: 在阿曼Al-Batinah地区调查番茄曲叶病，发现新病毒ToLCABV，由ChLCV-OM和ToLCOMV重组产生，可侵染番茄和本氏烟。

title: First Report of Tomato yellow leaf curl Kanchanaburi virus Infecting Eggplant in Laos.
note: 在老挝茄子样品中检测到番茄黄曲叶Kanchanaburi病毒（TYLCKaV），通过分子鉴定确认，系该病毒在老挝的首次报道。

title: A New Begomovirus Species in Association with Betasatellite Causing Tomato Leaf Curl Disease in Gandhinagar, India.
note: 报道印度甘地讷格尔番茄曲叶病病原为一个新双生病毒种及其伴随的新β卫星，实验验证其致病性。

title: Involvement of host regulatory pathways during geminivirus infection: a novel platform for generating durable resistance.
note: 综述双生病毒感染中宿主调控通路的作用，探讨利用这些通路开发抗性策略。

title: Infectious cDNA clones of four viroids in Coleus blumei and molecular characterization of their progeny.
note: 构建了CbVd-1,-3,-5,-6的感染性cDNA克隆，评估生物学特性，证明CbVd-5和-6可经种子传播，并分析后代遗传多样性。

title: Design, synthesis, antiviral activity, and structure-activity relationships (SARs) of two types of structurally novel phenanthroindo/quinolizidine analogues.
journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry
note: 设计合成两类结构全新的菲并吲哚/喹里西啶类似物，评估其抗TMV活性，发现16a活性优异，可作为潜在先导化合物。

title: First Report of Curly Top Disease of Basil Caused by Beet severe curly top virus in California.
note: 首次报道加利福尼亚帝国谷罗勒上由甜菜严重曲顶病毒引起的曲顶病，通过PCR、克隆、测序及接种实验确认病原。

title: Effect of Raspberry bushy dwarf virus, Raspberry leaf mottle virus, and Raspberry latent virus on Plant Growth and Fruit Crumbliness in 'Meeker' Red Raspberry.
note: 研究RBDV、RLMV和RpLV在红覆盆子碎果病中的单独与混合感染效应，通过田间试验评估对生长和果实品质的影响，并调查病毒分布。

title: First Report of Potato virus Y in Potato in West Java, Indonesia.
note: 首次在印度尼西亚西爪哇马铃薯上报道PVY，通过免疫试纸条和RT-PCR检测确认。

title: A Distinct Strain of Chickpea chlorotic dwarf virus Infecting Pepper in Oman.
note: 2011年在阿曼辣椒上发现一种双生病毒新株系，通过克隆测序鉴定为鹰嘴豆褪绿矮化病毒CpCDV株系F。

title: First Report of Chrysanthemum stem necrosis virus on Russell Prairie Gentian in Brazil.
note: 在巴西商业温室中，洋桔梗出现坏死斑和茎坏死症状，经电镜、机械接种、RT-PCR及测序鉴定为菊花茎坏死病毒（CSNV）。

title: First Report of Wheat mosaic virus Infecting Wheat in Western Australia.
note: 首次在澳大利亚西部确认小麦花叶病毒(WMoV)感染小麦，由小麦卷叶螨传播，常与小麦条纹花叶病毒混合感染。

title: First Report of Tobacco streak virus Infecting Pigeon Pea (Cajanus cajan) in India.
note: 首次报道Tobacco streak virus侵染印度木豆，通过症状、ELISA、RT-PCR及序列分析确认，描述了地理分布及产量损失。

title: First Report of Grapevine leaf roll-associated virus-2 and -3 in Ohio Vineyards.
note: 首次在俄亥俄州葡萄园检测到GLRaV-2和-3，与典型卷叶症状相关，需纳入病害管理。

title: First Report of Tomato chlorotic spot virus in Processing Tomatoes in the Dominican Republic.
note: 对多米尼加加工番茄产区进行病害调查，通过血清学和分子检测确认TCSV感染，并鉴定传毒介体种类。

title: The use of tobacco mosaic virus and cowpea mosaic virus for the production of novel metal nanomaterials.
note: 综述了利用烟草花叶病毒和豇豆花叶病毒进行金属功能化，生产新型纳米材料的方法

title: Population of endogenous pararetrovirus genomes in carrizo citrange.
note: 通过454测序获得Carrizo citrange中三个内源性副逆转录病毒完整基因组，与矮牵牛脉明病毒最接近，并在甜橙基因组中发现同源序列。

title: Carrot yellow leaf virus is associated with carrot internal necrosis.
note: 利用高通量测序宏基因组分析，发现Carrot yellow leaf virus与胡萝卜内部坏死症状高度相关，并检测到多种已知和新病毒。

title: Bioinformatics approaches for viral metagenomics in plants using short RNAs: model case of study and application to a Cicer arietinum population.
note: 比较sRNA测序组装工具，用参考引导和从头策略重建病毒基因组，应用于鹰嘴豆群体，发现番茄花叶病毒和啤酒花矮化类病毒。

title: First Report of Sweet potato chlorotic fleck virus Infecting Sweet Potato in Sichuan Province, China.
note: 首次在四川省甘薯上检测到SPCFV，发现其与SPFMV和SPVG复合侵染，通过分子鉴定确认病毒存在。

title: First Report of Rice yellow mottle virus in Rice in the Central African Republic.
note: 首次在中非共和国水稻中发现RYMV，通过ELISA和RT-PCR鉴定，序列与乍得和喀麦隆分离株高度同源。

title: First Report of Freesia sneak virus in Commercial Freesia hybrida Cultivars in Korea.
note: 利用RT-PCR检测韩国商业小苍兰品种中的FreSV，感染率71.7%，首次报道该病毒在韩国出现。

title: First Report of Tomato spotted wilt virus in Peppers and Tomato in the Dominican Republic.
note: 首次确认多米尼加共和国温室辣椒和番茄上番茄斑萎病毒的发生，症状明显，通过免疫试纸条和RT-PCR验证。

title: First Report of Chilli leaf curl India virus Infecting Mentha spicata (Neera) in India.
note: 本研究首次在印度薄荷上发现Chilli leaf curl India病毒，通过分子鉴定和传毒实验确认，为防控提供依据。

title: Sequence diversity among badnavirus isolates infecting black pepper and related species in India.
note: 分析印度黑胡椒及相关Piper属植物上badnavirus（PYMoV）的序列多样性，发现PYMoV在多种物种中发生，并在五个物种中发现可能的新badnavirus。

title: Plant virology and next generation sequencing: experiences with a Potyvirus.
note: 利用下一代测序对BYMV和ClYVV分离株进行基因组测序和系统发育分析，提出基于全基因组的命名系统取代旧分类。

title: The First Report of Cucumber Mosaic Virus Infecting Water Chestnut in China.
note: 首次报道黄瓜花叶病毒在中国感染荸荠，引起花叶、褪绿、矮化等症状，通过ELISA和RT-PCR确认。

title: First report of cucumber green mottle mosaic virus association with the leaf green mosaic disease of a vegetable crop, Luffa acutangula L.
note: 首次报道黄瓜绿斑驳花叶病毒侵染丝瓜，引起叶绿花叶病。

title: Appearances can be deceptive: revealing a hidden viral infection with deep sequencing in a plant quarantine context.
note: 利用深度测序技术（siRNA和VANA）在检疫甘蔗中发现了一种新的高度分化的mastrevirus (SWSV)，该病毒未被常规检疫检测到。

title: Plant-based vaccines: novel and low-cost possible route for Mediterranean innovative vaccination strategies.
note: 综述植物生物反应器生产疫苗的路线，重点讨论利用植物病毒载体表达人类病毒抗原（HCV、HSV-2）的研究案例

title: Nine novel DNA components associated with the foorkey disease of large cardamom: evidence of a distinct babuvirus species in Nanoviridae.
note: 该研究鉴定了与大卡片foorkey病相关的九种新型DNA组分，证明CBDV是Nanoviridae科Babuvirus属的一个新种，首次侵染Musaceae科以外的植物。

title: Molecular characterization and population structure of blackberry vein banding associated virus, new Ampelovirus associated with yellow vein disease.
note: 描述了一种与黑莓黄脉病相关的新病毒BVBaV，属于Ampelovirus亚组I，基因组含10个ORF，并分析了美国群体的遗传多样性。

title: Complete nucleotide sequence of Rosa rugosa leaf distortion virus, a new member of the family Tombusviridae.
note: 描述了一种引起玫瑰叶片扭曲的新病毒RrLDV的完整基因组序列和结构，属于番茄丛矮病毒科。

title: Characterization of a new apscaviroid from American persimmon.
note: 在美国柿子中发现一种新的358nt环状RNA分子，属于Apscaviroid属，通过嫁接传播，序列与柑橘类病毒VI相似性最高(72-73%)，系统发育独立成支，可能为新种。

title: First Report of Turnip mosaic virus Infecting Brassica carinata (Ethiopian Mustard) in the United States.
note: 首次报道Turnip mosaic virus在美国感染Brassica carinata，通过分子检测确认，发病率>80%。

title: First Report of Hop stunt viroid Infecting Japanese Plum, Cherry Plum, and Peach in Greece.
note: 首次在希腊报道Hop stunt viroid感染日本李、樱桃李和桃，采用组织印迹杂交和RT-PCR检测，序列分析确认。

title: First Report of Citrus tristeza virus in Citrus Orchards in Bosnia and Herzegovina.
note: 首次在波黑柑橘园中检测到柑橘衰退病毒，通过ELISA和RT-PCR鉴定，病毒分布广泛但症状不典型。

title: First Report of Rice yellow mottle virus on Rice in the Democratic Republic of Congo.
note: 首次报道RYMV在刚果民主共和国引起水稻黄化斑驳病，通过ELISA和RT-PCR鉴定，系统发育分析表明属于S4-lv株系，可能从邻国传入。

title: First Report of Soybean vein necrosis virus in Soybean Fields of Oklahoma.
note: 首次报道SVNV在俄克拉荷马州大豆田中的存在，通过DIBA和RT-PCR确认，发现53个阳性样本。

title: First Report of Iris yellow spot virus Infecting Green Onion in Indonesia.
note: 首次报道IYSV感染印度尼西亚青葱，通过免疫检测和分子检测确认病毒存在。

title: First Report of Tomato rugose yellow leaf curl virus Infecting Tomato in Argentina.
note: 在阿根廷番茄上首次报道番茄粗缩黄叶卷曲病毒，症状为叶片变形卷曲黄化，经分子鉴定确认为双生病毒新种。

title: A new, previously undescribed monopartite begomovirus infecting Premna serratifolia in Vietnam.
note: 克隆并测定了越南感染Premna serratifolia的曲叶、脉肿和耳突症状植株中的单组分begomovirus完整基因组，根据分类标准确定为新种PrLCV

title: First Report of Squash vein yellowing virus Affecting Watermelon and Bitter Gourd in Puerto Rico.
note: 首次报道SqVYV在波多黎各引起西瓜和苦瓜病毒病，通过机械和烟粉虱传播，RT-PCR和测序确认。

title: First Report of Cucumber vein yellowing virus on Cucumber in Lebanon.
note: 首次在黎巴嫩黄瓜上报道黄瓜脉黄化病毒（CVYV），通过RT-PCR和测序鉴定，并研究其传播及与毛形病毒的混合感染。

title: First Report of Konjac mosaic virus in Zamioculcas zamiifolia.
note: 首次报道Konjac mosaic virus感染Zamioculcas zamiifolia，通过电镜、RT-PCR和序列分析鉴定病毒，并进行了机械接种和血清学测试。

title: First Report of Freesia sneak virus Associated with Foliar Necrosis of Freesia refracta in Bulgaria.
note: 2011-2012年在保加利亚温室中观察到香雪兰叶坏死症状，通过RT-PCR和测序鉴定为FreSV感染，同时检测到FreMV混合感染。

title: First Report of Watermelon mosaic virus Naturally Infecting Cucumis anguria.
note: 首次报道西瓜花叶病毒自然侵染Cucumis anguria，获得全基因组序列，系统发育分析表明属于G2组，与智利分离株亲缘最近。

title: First Report of Grapevine yellow speckle viroid-1 and Hop stunt viroid Infecting Grapevines (Vitis vinifera) in India.
note: 首次在印度葡萄园中检测到GYSVd-1和HpSVd，发现两个GYSVd-1序列变异和一个HpSVd序列变异，但症状不能归因于类病毒感染。

title: First Report of Sweet potato virus G and Sweet potato virus 2 Infecting Sweetpotato in North Carolina.
note: 首次报道北卡罗来纳州甘薯田中SPVG和SPV2的侵染，检测其发生频率和混合感染情况。

title: First Report of Iris yellow spot virus Infecting Onion in Pakistan.
note: 首次在巴基斯坦的洋葱上报道鸢尾黄斑病毒（IYSV），通过血清学和分子检测确认，序列与智利分离株高度同源。

title: In planta protein interactions of three alphacryptoviruses and three betacryptoviruses from White Clover, Red Clover and Dill by bimolecular fluorescence complementation analysis.
note: 通过双分子荧光互补分析(BiFC)研究三种α隐病毒和三种β隐病毒的CP-CP、RdRp自互作及CP-RdRp互作，比较属内与属间相互作用差异。

title: Complete genome sequence of a new tobamovirus naturally infecting tomatoes in Mexico.
note: 通过深度测序和组装小RNA获得番茄中一种新烟草花叶病毒的全基因组序列，经Sanger验证，基于低序列一致性确定为新种。

title: Identification and characterisation of a highly divergent geminivirus: evolutionary and taxonomic implications.
note: 从南非野生大戟中分离到高度分化的双生病毒EcmLV，自然宿主无症状，但在番茄和本氏烟上引起严重症状，建议成立新属Capulavirus。

title: Identification of a new enamovirus associated with citrus vein enation disease by deep sequencing of small RNAs.
note: 通过深度测序小RNA鉴定出一种与柑橘脉突病相关的新enamovirus，命名为CVEV，并完成其基因组表征。

title: Characterization of burdock mottle virus, a novel member of the genus Benyvirus, and the identification of benyvirus-related sequences in the plant and insect genomes.
note: 确定了牛蒡斑驳病毒的全序列，发现其基因组结构类似甜菜坏死黄脉病毒等，是Benyvirus属新种。

title: A new cryptic virus belonging to the family Partitiviridae was found in watermelon co-infected with Melon necrotic spot virus.
note: 在感染梅隆坏死斑病毒的西瓜中通过SOLiD高通量测序发现一种新的Partitiviridae病毒，命名为Citrullus lanatus cryptic virus，基因组为两个dsRNA片段。

title: Prevalence and genetic diversity of an unusual virus associated with Kobu-sho disease of gentian in Japan.
note: 研究新发现病毒GKaV在解旋酶和RdRp编码区的遗传多样性，分析30个样品，发现地理隔离驱动分化，但无明确地理模式。

title: First Report of Sweet potato leaf curl Georgia virus on Sweet Potato in China.
note: 2011年在中国六省调查甘薯卷叶病毒，通过嫁接接种、PCR和测序，在河北样本中检测到SPLCGV，与已知同源性90.8%。

title: First Report of Nerine yellow stripe virus in Amaryllis in the United States.
note: 报告美国加利福尼亚州Amaryllis belladonna上首次分离到Nerine yellow stripe virus，通过多种方法鉴定

title: First Report of Artichoke yellow ringspot virus in Globe Artichoke in Turkey.
note: 调查土耳其洋蓟产区，首次发现AYRSV自然感染洋蓟，通过RT-PCR和生物测定确认。

title: First Report of Soybean vein necrosis virus on Soybeans in Michigan.
note: 首次报道SVNV在密歇根州大豆上发生，通过ELISA和RT-PCR确认病毒广泛存在。

title: First Report of Pepper chat fruit viroid in Traded Tomato Seed, an Interception by Australian Biosecurity.
note: 澳大利亚检疫部门在2012年9-10月从以色列和泰国进口的番茄种子中首次拦截到PCFVd，通过RT-PCR和测序确认，该病毒可通过种子传播，对番茄和辣椒生产构成威胁。

title: Molecular characterization of five betacryptoviruses infecting four clover species and dill.
note: 报道了三种已指定Betacryptovirus成员和两种新候选Betacryptovirus的分子特性，基于dsRNA克隆测序。

title: Infectious transcripts of an asymptomatic panicovirus identified from a metagenomic survey.
note: 从美国俄克拉荷马州高草草原保护区宏基因组调查中发现一种新的无症状panicovirus，命名为TPAV，基因组4195 nt，编码6个蛋白，与PMV和CMMV相似。

title: Complete genome sequence of a South Korean isolate of Brugmansia mosaic virus.
note: 完成韩国Brugmansia mosaic病毒分离株全基因组测序，与典型株比较，发现显著序列变异。

title: Complete nucleotide sequence of rose yellow mosaic virus, a novel member of the family Potyviridae.
note: 确定了玫瑰黄花叶病毒（RoYMV）的完整基因组序列，发现其具有Potyviridae科特征但缺少6K1顺反子，系统发育分析表明其为新成员。

title: First Report of Zucchini yellow mosaic virus Infecting Gherkin (Cucumis anguira) in India.
journal: Indian journal of virology : an official organ of Indian Virological Society
note: 首次报道ZYMV自然侵染印度小黄瓜，描述田间症状和病原鉴定。

title: Molecular characterization of a trisegmented chrysovirus isolated from the radish Raphanus sativus.
note: 从萝卜中分离并鉴定了一种新的三节段双链RNA病毒，命名为RasCV1，属于Chrysoviridae科

title: First Report of a Novel Potyvirus from Florida Causing Chlorotic Mottling in Squash (Cucurbita pepo).
note: 首次报道佛罗里达南瓜上一种引起褪绿斑驳的新病毒，通过形态学和分子生物学方法确认为新种

title: First Report of Alfalfa mosaic virus Occurrence in Hydrangea in the United States.
note: 报道了苜蓿花叶病毒在绣球花上的首次发现，描述了症状、检测鉴定过程及意义，提醒种植者和诊断人员注意潜在威胁。

title: First Report of a Natural Occurrence of Tomato yellow fruit ring virus on Pepper in Iran.
note: 2010-2011年在伊朗德黑兰省辣椒田调查，首次报道TYFRV自然感染辣椒，通过ELISA和RT-PCR确认。

title: First Report of Pepper vein yellows virus Infecting Sweet Pepper in Spain.
note: 首次报道Pepper vein yellows virus在西班牙甜椒上引起严重病害，描述症状和分子检测结果。

title: First Report of Prune dwarf virus and Prunus necrotic ringspot virus on Peach in Montenegro.
note: 在黑山桃树中检测到Prune dwarf virus和Prunus necrotic ringspot virus，通过ELISA和RT-PCR确认，部分样本与Plum pox virus混合感染。

title: First Report of Broad bean wilt virus-2 in Pepper in the Czech Republic.
note: 2012年8月在捷克摩拉维亚辣椒上检出BBWV-2，通过ELISA、电镜和RT-PCR确认，为该国首次报道。

title: First Report of Tomato spotted wilt virus on a New Host Leuzea carthamoides in Bulgaria and the World.
note: 首次报道TSWV侵染药用植物Leuzea carthamoides，通过指示植物、ELISA和RT-PCR鉴定，描述症状及减产情况。

title: First Report of Sweet potato virus G Infecting Sweet Potato in Taiwan.
note: 首次报道SPVG在台湾侵染甘薯，通过RT-PCR和测序鉴定两个分离株，并进行田间调查检测复合侵染情况。

title: Gene from a novel plant virus satellite from grapevine identifies a viral satellite lineage.
note: 从葡萄双链RNA深度测序中鉴定出一个新型病毒卫星基因组，编码两个ORF，其中一个与已知卫星蛋白相似，且存在重叠密码子和假结结构。

title: Natural association of two different betasatellites with Sweet potato leaf curl virus in wild morning glory (Ipomoea purpurea) in India.
note: 在印度新德里野生牵牛花中观察到卷叶和黄脉症状，经烟粉虱传播。通过RCA扩增获全基因组克隆，序列分析确认SPLCV，并发现两种不同beta卫星分别与两种症状相关。

title: Complete genome sequence of keunjorong mosaic virus, a potyvirus from Cynanchum wilfordii.
note: 确定了keunjorong mosaic virus的完整基因组，与辣椒斑驳病毒和香雪兰花叶病毒相似度最高(57.5%)，系统发育分析表明为Potyvirus新种。

title: Molecular characterization of a new alphasatellite associated with a cassava mosaic geminivirus in Madagascar.
note: 对马达加斯加木薯花叶病株中的新alphasatellite进行分子鉴定，其辅助病毒为EACMKV，卫星与棉花曲叶Gezira alphasatellite最相近。

title: Genetic characterization of novel putative rhabdovirus and dsRNA virus from Japanese persimmon.
note: 对日本柿树果实顶端紊乱的叶片进行深测序，发现两种新病毒，系统发育分析分别归入Cytorhabdovirus属和可能的新dsRNA病毒属

title: Making sense of nuclear localization: a zinc-finger protein encoded by a cytoplasmically replicating plant RNA virus acts a transcription factor: a novel function for a member of large family of viral proteins.
note: 发现细胞质复制的RNA病毒CVB编码的锌指蛋白p12定位于细胞核并作为转录因子直接调控宿主基因表达，揭示了RNA病毒操纵宿主转录的新机制。

title: First Report of Cherry green ring mottle virus and Cherry necrotic rusty mottle virus in Sweet Cherry (Prunus avium) in Chile and South America.
note: 在智利甜樱桃上首次检测到CGRMV和CNRMV，通过RT-PCR、克隆测序和分子杂交确认。

title: First Report of Impatiens necrotic spot virus in Mexico in Tomatillo and Pepper Plants.
note: 首次在墨西哥的tomatillo和辣椒中报道INSV，通过ELISA和RT-PCR鉴定，并实验接种西瓜等寄主确认侵染性。

title: First Report of Southern tomato virus on Tomatoes in Southwest France.
note: 通过454焦磷酸测序和RT-PCR首次在法国西南部番茄中检测到南方番茄病毒，该病毒具高种子传播率，致病性仍存疑。

title: First Report of Cucumber mosaic virus on Melon in Bosnia and Herzegovina.
note: 首次报道CMV侵染波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那的甜瓜，引起花叶、褪绿等症，发病率60%。

title: First Report of Tomato chlorosis virus in China.
note: 首次在中国报道番茄褪绿病毒，引起设施番茄严重黄化病，发病率5-80%，经分子检测和电镜确认。

title: Transmission efficiency of tomato apex necrosis virus by Bemisia tabaci (Hemiptera: Aleyrodidae) biotype B in tomato.
note: 研究番茄顶枯病毒(ToANV)与其媒介烟粉虱生物型B的传播效率，包括获毒、接毒、种群密度、潜育期和持毒期。

title: First Report of Rose yellow vein virus in Rosa sp. in New Zealand.
note: 2011年1月在新西兰Wanganui地区采集玫瑰样品，通过PCR检测到RYVV，测序证实，首次报道该病毒在新西兰感染玫瑰。

title: Molecular characterization of a novel monopartite begomovirus isolated from Pouzolzia zeylanica in China.
note: 从中国广西的患金色花叶症状的苎麻属植物中分离并鉴定一种新型双生病毒，提议命名为苎麻金色花叶病毒。

title: First Report of Cowpea mild mottle virus in Cowpea and French Bean in Taiwan.
note: 2009年在台湾南投县某菜园发现超过50%的法国豆表现严重病毒症状，经鉴定为豇豆轻斑驳病毒（CpMMV），并通过银叶粉虱传播，为台湾首次记录。

title: First Report of Alfalfa mosaic virus Infecting Lavandula × intermedia in Croatia.
note: 首次在克罗地亚杂种薰衣草上检测到苜蓿花叶病毒，通过ELISA、机械接种和RT-PCR证实。

title: First Report of Impatiens necrotic spot virus on Begonia in Bosnia and Herzegovina.
note: 首次在波黑秋海棠上检测到INSV，通过ELISA、RT-PCR和测序确认，序列与中国的INSV分离物高度同源。

title: First Report of Fragaria chiloensis cryptic virus, Fragaria chiloensis latent virus, Strawberry mild yellow edge virus, Strawberry necrotic shock virus, and Strawberry pallidosis associated virus in Single and Mixed Infections in Strawberry in Central Mexico.
note: 对墨西哥中部草莓繁育计划中的病毒进行检测，发现7种病毒的单侵染或混合侵染，其中5种为墨西哥首次报道。

title: First Report of Cucurbit chlorotic yellows virus Infecting Cucumber, Melon, and Squash in Iran.
note: 首次报道伊朗葫芦科作物上发生CCYV，并检测到CYSDV，调查了多个省份的温室和田间样本。

title: First Report of Cucumber mosaic virus Infecting Peperomia tuisana in Serbia.
note: 首次报道黄瓜花叶病毒侵染Peperomia tuisana，引起坏死环斑等症状，通过ELISA和RT-PCR鉴定。

title: First Report of Raspberry bushy dwarf virus in Andean Blackberry (Rubus glaucus) in Central Ecuador.
note: 在厄瓜多尔中部安第斯黑莓上首次报道树莓丛矮病毒，通过dsRNA提取和测序鉴定，RT-PCR检测显示病株和无症状植株均带毒。

title: First Report of Apple Top Working Disease Caused by Viruses (Apple stem grooving virus, Apple chlorotic leaf spot virus, and Apple stem pitting virus) in Apple in India.
note: 首次报道印度苹果顶工作病由ASGV、ACLSV、ASPV三种病毒引起，通过生物学、ELISA和RT-PCR检测鉴定。

title: First Report of a Tospovirus in Mulberry.
note: 利用小RNA深度测序和RT-PCR在桑树中鉴定出一种新的Tospovirus，命名为Mulberry vein banding virus，为首次报道Tospovirus感染桑树。

title: Complete nucleotide sequence of a monopartite Begomovirus and associated satellites infecting Carica papaya in Nepal.
note: 从尼泊尔番木瓜中分离到单分体Begomovirus（AYVV）及其beta卫星和alpha卫星，进行了全基因组测序与鉴定。

title: Molecular characterization of the full-length L and M RNAs of Tomato yellow ring virus, a member of the genus Tospovirus.
note: 本研究对Tomato yellow ring virus（TYRV）的L和M RNA进行全长测序与分析，确定其编码蛋白及系统发育地位，支持与Iris yellow spot virus和Polygonum ringspot virus的密切关系。

title: Genetic characterization of Blueberry necrotic ring blotch virus, a novel RNA virus with unique genetic features.
note: 在美国东南部蓝莓上发现新病毒BNRBV，基因组约14kb，四段ssRNA，具有独特遗传特征，建议成立新属。

title: Genetic diversity of Sugarcane bacilliform virus isolates infecting Saccharum spp. in India.
note: 对印度甘蔗上5个SCBV分离株进行全基因组测序，发现高遗传多样性，鉴定出至少三个新种。

title: First Report of Tomato spotted wilt virus on Brugmansia sp. in Serbia.
note: 首次报道塞尔维亚Brugmansia上的TSWV，通过ELISA、RT-PCR和序列分析确认感染。

title: First Report of Barley yellow dwarf virus and Cereal yellow dwarf virus Affecting Cereal Crops in Azerbaijan.
note: 阿塞拜疆首次报道BYDV-PAV和CYDV-RPV感染谷物及野生小麦近缘种。

title: First Report of Impatiens necrotic spot virus (INSV) Infecting Basil (Ocimum basilicum) in the United States.
note: 报道了在美国华盛顿州商业温室罗勒上首次发现INSV，引起叶斑、环斑、畸形和茎坏死。

title: First Report of Lettuce mosaic virus Infecting Lactuca sativa in India.
note: 首次分子证据证实LMV侵染印度莴苣，通过RT-PCR和测序鉴定病毒。

title: First Report of the Natural Infection of Robinia pseudoacacia with Alfalfa mosaic virus.
note: 首次报道刺槐作为苜蓿花叶病毒自然宿主，2012年在塞尔维亚观察到症状，ELISA和RT-PCR检测证实，序列分析显示与大豆分离物高度同源。

title: First Report of Transmission of Little cherry virus 2 to Sweet Cherry by Pseudococcus maritimus (Ehrhorn) (Hemiptera: Pseudococcidae).
note: 首次报道葡萄粉蚧(Pseudococcus maritimus)可传播Little cherry virus 2，对甜樱桃产业有重要意义。

title: A remarkable synergistic effect at the transcriptomic level in peach fruits doubly infected by prunus necrotic ringspot virus and peach latent mosaic viroid.
note: 研究桃果实单独和双重感染PNRSV和PLMVd后的转录组变化，发现双重感染有协同效应，导致更多基因表达变化。

title: Complete genome sequence and biological characterization of Moroccan pepper virus (MPV) and reclassification of Lettuce necrotic stunt virus as MPV.
note: 测定三个MPV分离株基因组，与LNSV序列比对显示高度同源；构建侵染性克隆，评价寄主反应，支持将LNSV重新归类为MPV。

title: A novel virus of the genus Cilevirus causing symptoms similar to citrus leprosis.
note: 在哥伦比亚发现一种新型Cilevirus病毒，引起类似柑橘褪绿病症状，基因组结构与已知CiLV-C相似但不同。

title: The complete genome sequences of a Peruvian and a Colombian isolate of Andean potato latent virus and partial sequences of further isolates suggest the existence of two distinct potato-infecting tymovirus species.
note: 通过siRNA测序和组装获得两个马铃薯tymovirus分离物完整基因组，序列一致性仅约65%，结合血清学和CP基因比较，建议将APLV分为两个种：APLV和APMMV。

title: A new virus-induced gene silencing vector based on Euphorbia mosaic virus-Yucatan peninsula for NPR1 silencing in Nicotiana benthamiana and Capsicum annuum var. Anaheim.
note: 利用EuMV-YP构建基因沉默载体pEuMV-YP:ΔAV1，在烟草和辣椒中成功沉默ChlI和NPR1基因，并研究NPR1在病毒相容性互作中的作用。

title: First Report of Banana mild mosaic virus Infecting Plantain in Ivory Coast.
note: 首次在象牙海岸大蕉上检测到香蕉温和花叶病毒，与香蕉条纹病毒混合感染。

title: First Report of Soybean Vein Necrosis Disease Caused by Soybean vein necrosis-associated virus in Wisconsin and Iowa.
note: 首次报道SVNaV在威斯康星和爱荷华州引起大豆脉坏死病，通过PCR、测序和ELISA确认病毒存在。

title: First Report of Columnea latent viroid (CLVd) in Tomato in Mali.
note: 首次在马里番茄上检测到Columnea latent viroid，症状包括矮化、叶脉坏死等，通过机械接种和RT-PCR确认。

title: Dahlia latent viroid: a recombinant new species of the family Pospiviroidae posing intriguing questions about its origin and classification.
note: 在无症状大丽花中检测到新型类病毒RNA DLVd，具有Pospiviroidae科特征，但其重组起源导致分类归属存疑。

title: First Report of Garlic common latent virus Infecting Garlic in Sudan.
note: 首次在苏丹大蒜中检测到GarCLV，通过分子和血清学方法确认。

title: First Report of Coleus blumei viroid 5 from Coleus blumei in India and Indonesia.
note: 在印度和印度尼西亚首次检测到CbVd-5，通过分子杂交和RT-PCR确认，测序显示与参考序列高度相似，接种试验产生白化症状。

title: First Report of Tobacco ringspot virus Infecting Kudzu (Pueraria montana) in Louisiana.
note: 首次报道TRSV自然感染葛藤，发现于大豆田附近，可能成为大豆病毒的侵染源。

title: Complete genome sequences of two novel begomoviruses infecting common bean in Venezuela.
note: 报道了委内瑞拉侵染菜豆的两种新begomovirus的完整基因组序列

title: First Report of Iris yellow spot virus Infecting Onion in Bosnia and Herzegovina.
note: 首次报道波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那洋葱上IYSV的发生，对症状、血清学及分子检测进行了描述。

title: First Report of Hosta virus X Infecting Hosta Plants in China.
note: 首次报道Hosta virus X在中国北京感染玉簪，通过血清学和分子检测确认，序列与已知HVX高度同源。

title: First Report of Recombinant Potato virus Y Strains in Potato in Jalisco, Mexico.
note: 对墨西哥Jalisco州种薯进行PVY调查，发现重组株系PVYNTN和PVYN-Wi，首次在该地区报道。

title: First Report of Ageratum yellow vein China virus Infecting Zinnia elegans in Vietnam.
note: 首次报道Ageratum yellow vein China virus (AYVCNV)感染百日草(Zinnia elegans)。

title: First Report of Tomato spotted wilt virus on Gloxinia in Bosnia and Herzegovina.
note: 首次报道波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那的大岩桐感染番茄斑萎病毒，通过血清学和分子方法鉴定。

title: First Report on the Association of Squash leaf curl virus and Watermelon chlorotic stunt virus with Tomato Yellow Leaf Curl Disease.
note: 在约旦番茄上发现严重番茄黄化曲叶病症状，通过分子检测证实Squash leaf curl virus和Watermelon chlorotic stunt virus与TYLCV共同侵染，首次报道这两种病毒与TYLCD的关联。

title: Molecular characterization of artemisia virus A, a new sobemovirus isolated from Artemisia annua.
note: 从瑞士实验田感病黄花蒿中分离出一种新的类南芥菜花叶病毒属病毒，命名为Artemisia virus A，基因组为ssRNA(+)，4138nt，与黑麦草斑驳病毒亲缘关系近。

title: A new begomovirus-betasatellite complex is associated with chilli leaf curl disease in Sri Lanka.
note: 在斯里兰卡辣椒上发现一种新双生病毒-卫星复合体，引起辣椒曲叶病，可经烟粉虱传播至辣椒、番茄和烟草。

title: Soybean chlorotic spot virus, a novel begomovirus infecting soybean in Brazil.
note: 在巴西大豆中发现一种新双生病毒，通过滚环扩增克隆DNA-A和DNA-B，系统发育分析确认为Begomovirus新种，命名为SoCSV，接种引起大豆褪绿斑点及菜豆严重症状。

title: Complete nucleotide sequences of two begomoviruses infecting Madagascar periwinkle (Catharanthus roseus) from Pakistan.
note: 确定了巴基斯坦感染长春花的两种begomovirus全序列，其中一种为新种CYMV，另一种与印度报道的PaLCrV高度同源，并发现两者均为重组病毒。

title: First Report of Impatiens necrotic spot virus on Hiemalis Begonia (Begonia × hiemalis) in Canada.
note: 首次报道加拿大四季秋海棠上发生INSV，描述症状、检测和鉴定过程，确认该病毒已在北美扩散。

title: First Report of Bhendi yellow vein mosaic virus Associated with Yellow Vein Mosaic of Okra (Abelmoschus esculentus) in Thailand.
note: 在泰国秋葵上发现黄脉花叶病，通过PCR和ELISA确诊为BYVMV，首次在东南亚报道。

title: First Report of Tomato yellow spot virus Infecting Leonurus sibiricus in Brazil.
note: 首次在巴西报道杂草Leonurus sibiricus自然感染番茄黄斑病毒(ToYSV)，出现黄色叶花叶症状，经PCR和全基因组测序确认，并通过烟粉虱传播实验验证其致病性。

title: First Report of Bean common mosaic necrosis virus (BCMNV) Infecting Sweet Bean in Nepal.
note: 首次报道BCMNV在尼泊尔侵染甜豆，引起花叶坏死等症状，通过ELISA、电镜、RT-PCR鉴定。

title: A novel application of methacrylate based short monolithic columns: concentrating Potato spindle tuber viroid from water samples.
note: 开发了一种使用甲基丙烯酸短整体柱浓缩水样中马铃薯纺锤块茎类病毒的方法，优化了回收率。

title: The complete genomic sequence of pepper yellow leaf curl virus (PYLCV) and its implications for our understanding of evolution dynamics in the genus polerovirus.
note: 测定了辣椒黄化卷叶病毒(PYLCV)的完整基因组序列，分析其结构、进化关系，发现其与烟草脉扭曲病毒(TVDV)和瓜类蚜传黄化病毒(CABYV)存在重组事件。

title: The complete nucleotide sequence of the genome of Barley yellow dwarf virus-RMV reveals it to be a new Polerovirus distantly related to other yellow dwarf viruses.
note: 报道了BYDV-RMV Montana分离株的全基因组序列（5612 nt），发现其为新的Polerovirus，与其他YDV远源，提议更名为MYDV-RMV。

title: Distribution of Barley yellow dwarf virus-PAV in the Sub-Antarctic Kerguelen Islands and Characterization of Two New Luteovirus Species.
note: 在凯尔盖朗群岛系统搜索病毒，检测到BYDV-PAV并分析其地理分布和遗传多样性，鉴定出两个新Luteovirus种。

title: Characterization of a new Anulavirus isolated from Amazon lily plants.
note: 从栽培的亚马逊百合中分离出一种新的准球形病毒，可机械传播至健康植株引起轻度花叶或斑驳症状，命名为Amazon lily mild mottle virus (ALiMMV)，与Anulavirus属相关。

title: Donkey orchid symptomless virus: a viral 'platypus' from Australian terrestrial orchids.
note: 通过高通量测序从无症状的澳大利亚陆生兰花中发现并鉴定了新病毒DOSV，分析了其基因组结构和进化起源。

title: Mapping and candidate-gene screening of the novel Turnip mosaic virus resistance gene retr02 in Chinese cabbage (Brassica rapa L.).
journal: TAG. Theoretical and applied genetics. Theoretische und angewandte Genetik
note: 通过集团分离分析（BSA）和Indel标记，将中国白菜中新的隐性TuMV抗性基因retr02定位于A04染色体，候选基因为eIF(iso)4E，序列多态性与抗性相关。

title: Discovery of a novel mastrevirus and alphasatellite-like circular DNA in dragonflies (Epiprocta) from Puerto Rico.
note: 利用捕食性昆虫（蜻蜓）作为采样工具，发现新的植物病毒和伴生卫星DNA，拓展了病毒地理分布认知。

title: Serological and molecular studies of a novel virus isolate causing yellow mosaic of Patchouli [Pogostemon cablin (Blanco) Benth].
note: 鉴定一种引起广藿香黄色花叶的新病毒分离物，属于Potyvirus属，命名为PaYMV，通过生物学、血清学和分子方法表征。

title: First Report of Potato spindle tuber viroid Naturally Infecting Greenhouse Tomatoes in North Carolina.
note: 首次报道马铃薯纺锤块茎类病毒自然感染北卡罗来纳州温室番茄，通过RT-PCR和测序确认，并机械接种验证

title: First Report of Grapevine leafroll-associated virus 7 in Two Native Grape Varieties in China.
note: 本研究首次报道GLRaV-7在中国本地葡萄品种中的发生，通过RT-PCR和ELISA检测确认。

title: Thermotherapy, chemotherapy, and meristem culture in banana.
note: 介绍香蕉受多种病毒影响，以及热疗、化疗和茎尖培养等病毒消除技术，其中茎尖培养最有效。

title: A leafhopper-transmissible DNA virus with novel evolutionary lineage in the family geminiviridae implicated in grapevine redleaf disease by next-generation sequencing.
note: 通过二代测序鉴定与葡萄红叶病相关的新型单链DNA病毒GRLaV，由叶蝉传播，系统发育分析表明其在双生病毒科中属于新进化分支，病害严重影响产量和品质。

title: Rationale for developing new virus vectors to analyze gene function in grasses through virus-induced gene silencing.
note: 综述禾本科植物VIGS研究现状，评估现有系统，提出利用新型病毒载体提高沉默效率的策略

title: First Report of Coleus blumei viroid Infecting Coleus in India.
note: 首次在印度彩叶草上检出Coleus blumei viroid 1，经RT-PCR和序列分析确认两个变体Ind-1和Ind-2。

title: First Report of Tomato spotted wilt virus on Chrysanthemum in Serbia.
note: 在塞尔维亚温室菊花上首次检测到番茄斑萎病毒，通过ELISA和RT-PCR确认，测序N基因显示属于欧洲亚群2。

title: Discovery and SARs of trans-3-aryl acrylic acids and their analogs as novel anti-tobacco mosaic virus (TMV) agents.
note: 首次评估trans-3-芳基丙烯酸及其衍生物的抗TMV活性，发现多种化合物活性优异，可作为抗植物病毒新模板。

title: High-throughput sequence analysis of small RNAs in grapevine (Vitis vinifera L.) affected by grapevine leafroll disease.
note: 利用高通量测序比较有/无GLRD症状葡萄的小RNA，检测到病毒和三种类病毒特异sRNA，并鉴定新的microRNA。

title: Caladenia virus A, an unusual new member of the family Potyviridae from terrestrial orchids in Western Australia.
note: 鉴定了一种感染澳大利亚陆生兰花的新病毒CalVA，基因组特征符合Potyviridae科，与Poacevirus属最近缘，可能由螨虫传播

title: Capsicum annuum WRKY transcription factor d (CaWRKYd) regulates hypersensitive response and defense response upon Tobacco mosaic virus infection.
journal: Plant science : an international journal of experimental plant biology
note: 研究辣椒WRKY转录因子CaWRKYd在TMV-P0诱导的超敏反应和防御反应中的作用。

title: Identification and characterization of citrus yellow vein clearing virus, a putative new member of the genus Mandarivirus.
note: 对土耳其分离的CYVCV进行深度测序、基因组分析和血清学鉴定，确认其为黄脉清晰病病原体，是Mandarivirus属新种。

title: First Report of Tomato ringspot virus Infecting Pepper in Iran.
note: 在伊朗辣椒上发现番茄环斑病毒，通过ELISA、机械接种和RT-PCR鉴定，为伊朗首次报道。

title: First Report of Alfalfa mosaic virus and Soybean dwarf virus on Soybean in North Dakota.
note: 2010年对北达科他州200块大豆田调查，首次确认AMV和SbDV感染大豆。

title: First Report of Potato virus Y in Kalimeris indica in China.
note: 首次报道马铃薯Y病毒（PVY）感染马兰，通过ELISA和RT-PCR检测确认，获得完整基因组序列。

title: First Report of Tomato mosaic virus Infecting Pepino in China.
note: 首次报道ToMV感染中国人参果，引起花叶、皱缩等症状，通过ELISA和RT-PCR鉴定，序列相似性高。

title: First Report of Watermelon chlorotic stunt virus in Cucurbits in Lebanon.
note: 报道了黎巴嫩葫芦科作物上西瓜褪绿矮化病毒的首次发现，通过PCR和测序鉴定，分析了分布和混合感染情况。

title: First Report of Grapevine fleck virus in Idaho Grapevines.
note: 首次报道爱达荷州葡萄中检测到葡萄斑点病毒(GFkV)，监测该州种植材料病毒状况。

title: First Report of Cucumber mosaic virus Infecting Watermelon in Serbia.
note: 首次报道CMV感染塞尔维亚西瓜，田间发病率约40%，通过血清学和分子检测确认。

title: First Report of Alfalfa mosaic virus Associated with Severe Mosaic and Mottling of Pepper (Capsicum annuum) and White Clover (Trifolium repens) in Oklahoma.
note: 首次报道AMV感染俄克拉荷马州的辣椒和白三叶草，通过血清学和分子检测确认，可能威胁大豆等经济作物。

title: First Report of Cucurbit chlorotic yellows virus on Cucumber in Lebanon.
note: 首次报道黎巴嫩黄瓜上发生Cucurbit chlorotic yellows virus，通过白粉虱传播，RT-PCR鉴定并与日本分离物高度同源。

title: Analysis of the full-length genome sequence of papaya lethal yellowing virus (PLYV), determined by deep sequencing, confirms its classification in the genus Sobemovirus.
note: 通过深度测序确定木瓜致死黄化病毒(PLYV)的全长基因组序列，确认其属于Sobemovirus属。

title: Australian monocot-infecting mastrevirus diversity rivals that in Africa.
note: 研究澳大利亚天然和本土禾本科植物中mastrevirus的多样性，通过测序41个分离物，鉴定出4个新种，并与非洲病毒比较。

title: A novel mastrevirus infecting wheat in India.
note: 利用滚环扩增检测到感染小麦的新型mastrevirus，测定全基因组序列，通过农杆菌接种证实致病性，建议为新种。

title: Comprehensive diversity analysis of viroids infecting grapevine in China and Japan.
note: 对中国和日本葡萄类病毒进行多样性分析，包括分布、遗传多样性和分子特性，揭示两国类病毒种类差异可能与葡萄栽培历史有关。
